name: THRILLED (via VPP)
subject: re: Cory Booker 2028?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
This has the potential to reshape the ENTIRE future of the Democratic Party!
| Team, we’re THRILLED: [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/booker-president/?source=VPP_20250407_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC&t=6&akid=19472%2E878179%2EJS3yzb) This has the potential to reshape the ENTIRE future of the Democratic Party!

**There is NO WAY Cory Booker will consider a run for President without MASSIVE grassroots support — _that’s a fact, folks._**

_That’s why we _urgently_ need to know:_

[**Should Cory Booker run for President in 2028? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/booker-president/?source=VPP_20250407_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC&t=7&akid=19472%2E878179%2EJS3yzb) | [YES, HE SHOULD! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/booker-president/?source=VPP_20250407_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC&t=8&akid=19472%2E878179%2EJS3yzb)
---
[NO, HE SHOULD NOT »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/booker-president/?source=VPP_20250407_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC&t=9&akid=19472%2E878179%2EJS3yzb)
[I’M NOT SURE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/booker-president/?source=VPP_20250407_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC&t=10&akid=19472%2E878179%2EJS3yzb)
Thank you,

Team Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=19472%2E878179%2EJS3yzb). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=19472%2E878179%2EJS3yzb).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=19472%2E878179%2EJS3yzb) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=19472%2E878179%2EJS3yzb). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=19472%2E878179%2EJS3yzb)
---

If you want to be one of the FIRST Patriots to get the latest updates on efforts directly from the Republican Party, please make sure to follow us on **[Facebook](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/KPkfzZdpFfjL_iftgudevOAQSKfUnbvkvyjo22ToqP1WrChVeG7Yl8FkeFWGcYqdhgs6J8aMNiAcblEZhKzLL62bRfuOSWkt2IOvseGm_pjAUZKSRzPH6Jxz_ht-NMF4h2rFv8q5fwZmXoE3i-Q-UH16uX6jnQqI8yOl4x7r8YxXjCyxtiPhIlbe-eziYEHcben4dAI_hzvv_GvXyWClQuR-uBYP6JSxj9mMm-1BgNqo0e5ovg90lskGl8wM2IKIkcdlS84kZGCFOU50f94ROQiSg3VkT5bBOKOKW_cvAjo02HqCy-2thoRLsWw/U1OsxOoCICgefI9wfnD0bgRsqiZED3zH/7)** and **[Twitter,](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/WkAAb811N_8Qresh2q-hdmGAK8b1Ssc2VW7wq-jClzg1yHjX9G31rJeexH7BMXzgzXOYPRTt_ssqwFaH0NJ1vwAiR6yKpzWcPagITqcE1X9O4qaS18my2Us-PqVG4z6yw6hHLSc22Y-ksGBclevODBoQDeRPVQw62F47T71n-ANM142lCpjy5yhS9qhiIUYcvI8hH27nBjBmbNjtdM54r3hZdGh74N7LWE9ailud52uh-IetLuu4srEqBDSWBSI0/jbFY2tP6DOoBz5YG7UTDn4LCD9RhXelu/7)** and **TEXT WIN to 80810.**

body:
| | | Peter, On Saturday, millions of working people from across the country came out to tell Trump and Musk to keep their greedy hands off our Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid. Marking the largest protest since Trump’s return to office — from big cities to small towns, in red and blue districts alike — working people were fired up against Trump and Musk’s disastrous cuts and policies. clean_body: | | | Peter, On Saturday, millions of working people from across the country came out to tell Trump and Musk to keep their greedy hands off our Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid. Marking the largest protest since Trump’s return to office — from big cities to small towns, in red and blue districts alike — working people were fired up against Trump and Musk’s disastrous cuts and policies. Here’s just some of our favorite pics from around the country: St. Paul, MO - ABC News Lansing, MI - The Atlantic Helena, MT Opelika, AL Seattle, WA - Michael Moore's Substack Atlanta, GA - Getty Austin, TX - NPR Portland, OR - NPR Washington, DC - Getty NYC - Politico Saturday’s mass protests are only the beginning. Every day more people are catching on to Trump and Musk’s billionaire grift, and they’re choosing to stand up and fight back. Here at the Working Families Party, we're building a party that puts workers over bosses and people over the powerful. Help power this movement for the long haul. In solidarity, Working Families Party Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. name: Joe Hagerty - Political Director
subject: Campaign & Candidate Workshop - Limited Seats Available, Register Today!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY]( "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY")
body:
Are you considering running for office? | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/4a821df6ceae/n41kepo7ku-12766393?e=25844e23a8)
---
| | [ ](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=fd1e169bae&e=25844e23a8)
---
| | **The NEGOP is pleased to invite the Leadership Institute to host a[Campaign and Candidate workshop](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=910c92df61&e=25844e23a8) on Saturday, April 12th from 9am-4pm in Lincoln, Nebraska at the [Graduate Hotel: 141 N 9th St, Lincoln, NE 68508](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=a1194da064&e=25844e23a8).** [](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=9155066d16&e=25844e23a8) **The Campaign and Candidate Workshop is a full-day, hands-on program designed to help you build and run a winning campaign. Ideal attendees are individuals who are looking to become more politically active, candidates running for office, and campaign staff and volunteers who are involved or want to be involved in campaigns at any level. Those who want to hone their skills as a campaign manager and those just wanting to learn the basics of running a political campaign are also encouraged to attend. **
---
|
---
| **[](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=63fc3b198e&e=25844e23a8)**
---
| **[Register here](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=f68368c291&e=25844e23a8) for the Campaign and Candidate workshop. Your registration of $15 will include breakfast, lunch, and an afternoon snack. Drinks will be served throughout the entire training.**
---
| [Register Here](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=1e63e99d3d&e=25844e23a8 "Register Here")
---
|
---
| [ ](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=442ce84ce9&e=25844e23a8)
---
| **Topics covered at this workshop include:**
* **Intro to Leadership Institute **
* **Are You Ready to Run**
* **Campaign Strategy**
* **Campaign Plans and Structure**
* **Messaging to the Middle**
* **Increasing Name ID Before a Political Run**
* **Fundraising**

**View the full agenda and class descriptions for the Campaign and Candidate Workshop can be[viewed here](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=f08d109fc5&e=25844e23a8):**

---
| [View Class Descriptions](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=f3d158335c&e=25844e23a8 "View Class Descriptions")
---
|
---
| [ ](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=2980adbb58&e=25844e23a8)
---
| **[What is Leadership Institute?](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=e0586be614&e=25844e23a8)** **Through training and mentorship, the Leadership Institute helps conservatives become successful leaders – from state legislators to members of U.S. Congress, from college students to journalists and heads of organizations – and is unparalleled.** **While many organizations exist to increase the number of leftist activists, few similar organizations exist to serve conservatives. Because conservatism tends to focus on the power of ideas, most conservative organizations are think tanks that focus on policy or legislation.** **But those policies won’t get enacted without conservatives in positions of leadership to drive them forward.** **That’s why the Leadership Institute takes conservatives – who believe in free enterprise, limited government, strong national defense, and traditional values – and turns them into powerhouse leaders who advance these principles in places where they can make an impact.**

[](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=2cdfe84315&e=25844e23a8) **If you have any questions about this Campaign and Candidate Workshop, feel free to contact me:**
* **Joe Hagerty | Political Director |[political@ne.gop](mailto:political@ne.gop)**

---
| | No imagery or video is a paid promotion between the NEGOP or entities included in this email.
---
| [PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY]( "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY")
---
|
---

Nebraska Republican Party1610 N StLincoln, NE 68508-1871
[Add us to your address book](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/vcard?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=72fdf24cb0)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/profile?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=72fdf24cb0&e=25844e23a8&c=a8dc0750f9) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=72fdf24cb0&t=b&e=25844e23a8&c=a8dc0750f9).

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: I follow in the footsteps of fiery women like my grandmother
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Off the Sidelines PAC
body:
|
---
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105393355/538204090/589657885?source=LOC_EM_FR_2025.04.07_OTS-Kirsten-Reintro-2_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjFhMGM3Zi0wZTE0LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1S6iGuPvZURH2PsMaFUDeWIvXOJb3eWkhKwI4_agIJI=) She might not realize it yet, but the little girl in this photo is learning from her grandmother that her voice matters — and that her advocacy can make a difference.

In a world full of people telling young girls to be quiet and wait their turn, seeing my grandmother Polly be a fiery and outspoken advocate for women changed everything for me. She is the one who inspired me to be bold and raise my voice.

That’s the reason I ran for office: to be a voice for those who don’t have one, to take on the toughest fights in Washington and to stand up for what’s right.

Today, we have lots of tough fights ahead in the Senate under Donald Trump’s administration: for reproductive freedom, voting rights, climate action, affordable health care, national paid leave and access to child care.

I will be fearless in the fight to get the job done — just like my grandmother taught me.

**That’s why I need your help.**** Democrats are already strategizing now to take back our Senate majority in 2026. It will be an uphill battle against the GOP’s dark money and billionaire donors. But we’ve won this fight before, and we can win it again.**

**[_I started Off the Sidelines PAC to send a new generation of leaders to Congress who will fight tooth and nail for our rights — and our work is fueled by you and for you. Will you rush a donation of $5 or more?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105393356/538204091/589657885?amount=5&source=LOC_EM_FR_2025.04.07_OTS-Kirsten-Reintro-2_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjFhMGM3Zi0wZTE0LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1S6iGuPvZURH2PsMaFUDeWIvXOJb3eWkhKwI4_agIJI=)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Off the Sidelines will go through immediately:_ | | | [DONATE $5 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105393357/538204097/589657885?express_lane=true&amount=5&source=LOC_EM_FR_2025.04.07_OTS-Kirsten-Reintro-2_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjFhMGM3Zi0wZTE0LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1S6iGuPvZURH2PsMaFUDeWIvXOJb3eWkhKwI4_agIJI=)

clean_body: | | = She might not realize it yet, but the little girl in this photo is learning from her grandmother that her voice matters — and that her advocacy can make a difference. In a world full of people telling young girls to be quiet and wait their turn, seeing my grandmother Polly be a fiery and outspoken advocate for women changed everything for me. She is the one who inspired me to be bold and raise my voice. That’s the reason I ran for office: to be a voice for those who don’t have one, to take on the toughest fights in Washington and to stand up for what’s right. Today, we have lots of tough fights ahead in the Senate under Donald Trump’s administration: for reproductive freedom, voting rights, climate action, affordable health care, national paid leave and access to child care. I will be fearless in the fight to get the job done — just like my grandmother taught me. That’s why I need your help. Democrats are already strategizing now to take back our Senate majority in 2026. It will be an uphill battle against the GOP’s dark money and billionaire donors. But we’ve won this fight before, and we can win it again. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Off the Sidelines will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Together, I know there isn’t a single thing we can’t accomplish. Thank you for being by my side. Kirsten Gillibrand © 2025 | Paid for by Off the Sidelines PAC

Peter,
It's Day 1 of my campaign for Colorado Attorney General, and I have an important question to ask: Will you become a founding donor of my campaign for Colorado Attorney General? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2402-q2-jg-launch?refcode=250407-emailpm]

I’m running for Attorney General to fight for Coloradans—protecting our rights, defending our democracy, and standing up for justice. This won’t be an easy fight, and I will never be intimidated or back down. But I can’t do it alone.
The first 24 hours of a campaign are critical. If we build momentum now, we show the strength of our movement. That’s why I’m asking you to be a founding donor today.
Will you chip in today to help us kick off this campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2402-q2-jg-launch?refcode=250407-emailpm]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Jena Griswold

Peter,

**Republicans just got one step closer to overturning an election.** In a Friday ruling, two right-wing judges on the North Carolina Court of Appeals sided with the losing GOP candidate in November’s state supreme court race. They sided with the failed candidate trying to toss out over 65,000 legally cast ballots in an attempt to flip the outcome of the election. It’s hard to imagine a more flagrant attack on the sanctity of our elections. [**This team helped re-elect Democratic Justice Allison Riggs in 2024’s North Carolina Supreme Court race, and now we’re continuing the fight to protect free and fair elections from the MAGA GOP. Let’s be clear about how we got here.
Justice Riggs — one of the Democracy Defenders we were proud to endorse in 2024 — won re-election last November fair and square. Her victory was confirmed by a recount. Then it was confirmed by _another_ recount.
But the failed challenger in that election, Jefferson Griffin, has refused to concede and has instead challenged over 65,000 legitimate ballots.
That’s why Justice Riggs’ victory still has not been certified.
And while she will continue fighting in the courts to uphold the will of the people, Friday’s ruling puts North Carolina Republicans one step closer to stealing a seat on the state supreme court.
**Make no mistake: if Republicans succeed in overturning an election in North Carolina, they will export this blueprint to try to toss out legal votes everywhere they can get away with it.**
And let’s remember another big piece of the long game here: If Republicans steal this state supreme court seat, they’ll be in a stronger position to have a conservative majority on the court during the next round of post-census redistricting.
That majority could sign off on gerrymandered maps that give the GOP unearned power in the state legislature as well as Congress.
And it wouldn’t be the first time. In 2023, a new right-wing majority on the North Carolina Supreme Court overturned its _extremely_ recent precedent to greenlight a Republican map that helped flip three seats in the U.S. House of Representatives. If it weren’t for those three seats, Democrats could have won the House last November. And if Democrats had the majority right now, they could slam the brakes on Donald Trump’s agenda.
**From stealing House seats through gerrymandering, to potentially stealing a state supreme court seat by overturning an election, the MAGA GOP will continue their efforts to seize power at all costs.**
But we are fighting back: to defeat candidates who try to obstruct the will of the people, to elect Democracy Defenders like Justice Allison Riggs, to protect fair representation by ensuring a fair count in the census, to enact our 10 Year Plan for fair maps, and more.
[**If you’re outraged by the North Carolina GOP’s attempt to silence voters and reverse the outcome of an election they lost, then please pitch in a donation of $30 or more right now to help push back on the far right’s anti-democracy agenda.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105394046/538226704/1925646595?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_NCRR2_email_20250407-NDRC-Tier1-NCRR2-NOR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250407-NDRC-Tier1-NCRR2-NOR_&utm_campaign=NCRR2&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU5ZmRkZTM3LTE1MTQtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6_HHUj0OpDrIuksBh4hAPuLwF8lUou2UrEmWDqOIlHU=)

Peter,
I just stepped off the stage in Youngstown, Ohio, and I’ve got to tell you, something big is happening in America.
Over the past few weeks, I’ve held town halls in Iowa, Nebraska, Wisconsin, Texas, and now Ohio. Each community has its own unique concerns, but one message has come through loud and clear at every stop: people are angry.
They’re angry at Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and other members of the administration who are gutting our retirement plans, our schools, and our health care. They’re fed up with the Republican members of Congress who are nowhere to be found when it matters most. And they’re tired of shouting into the void and wondering if anyone is actually listening.
**I’m hitting the road to show Americans that while Republicans may be too afraid to face them, we are showing up, listening, and fighting for them. But I can’t do it alone. **
[**Peter, I need your help. Will you chip in $10, $25, $50, or whatever you can afford today to help us reach more communities?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105394189/538227613/1059908813?refcode=body&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGNjMDhhYy0xNTE0LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1hB2S2iErEKBpbSsGne_hinnv5LjUrmvPgUMgyUPye4=)

_**EXHIBIT 1 - JOINT FUNDRAISING NOTICE **_

Team Nunn ("JFC") is a joint fundraising committee composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn ("Campaign"), Call to Service PAC ("LPAC") and NRCC (each, a "Committee," and, collectively, the "Committees"). Any contribution to the JFC permissible under the Federal Election Campaign Act, as amended ("FECA"), from contributors who have not exceeded their applicable federal contribution limits, shall be allocated among the Committees pursuant to FECA and the formula set forth in this Notice.

_**Contributions Made by an Individual or Federal Non-Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Individuals or federal non-multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $322,100. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $7,000, designating up to $3,500 to the primary election and up to $3,500 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3\. NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $44,300 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

_**Contributions Made by a Federal Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $120,000. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $10,000, designating up to $5,000 to the primary election and up to $5,000 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3 .NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $15,000 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5 .NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

Contributions to Team Nunn, or to any participating Committee individually, are not deductible as charitable donations for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, national banks, federal government contractors, foreign nationals without green cards, and other federally impermissible sources are prohibited. The contributor's signature designates his or her contribution to the elections described above. Contributions that exceed a donor's contribution limit to a participating Committee shall be reallocated to the remaining Committees according to this allocation formula to the extent permitted by FECA. Any contributor may designate his or her contribution to a specific participant Committee to the extent permitted by FECA. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle or calendar year, as applicable.
Paid for by Team Nunn, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn, Call to Service PAC, and NRCC.

| What a disaster. I’ve never seen so much value destroyed deliberately. Global markets have lost $10 trillion in the past days because of Trump’s trade war. These tariffs are a catastrophe. Prices will go up. Domestic manufacturers who export will have less business. Employers will shed jobs. The stock market is in retreat and I believe the economy will soon follow. It’s a recession of our own making. You could argue, “pain is necessary to get someplace good.” But if your goal were to drive employment in certain sectors you would telegraph the tariffs well in advance, target specific industries, and give companies assurance that the new tariffs were here to stay so they could make long-term decisions. None of that is happening. This is destruction without the value on the other side. Some people think there’s some master plan at work. There isn’t. It’s just idiocy. And people will suffer. We will be made poorer through this and less safe as hostilities will increase between societies. I have been angry about this all week. We deserve better leadership. On the other side, Cory Booker gave a speech for 25 straight hours on the Senate floor about the victims of the administration’s actions. I discussed this with journalist Tara Palmeri on the [podcast](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=150bbf0c08&e=0f227c2ae3) this week as well as the ’28 field among the Democrats. I like Cory, but where was this when Joe Biden was holding the party hostage 15 months ago? The Democrats are suffering from a leadership void. I wrote an op-ed for [Newsweek](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=2849faf4a6&e=0f227c2ae3) that the Democrats should accelerate their nomination process. It follows below.

Meanwhile, Democrats overperformed in Wisconsin and Florida special elections this week because of the unpopularity of the current administration. The pain will soon be impossible to ignore. These are dark times. Hopefully we can rebuild in a way that provides people a real [path forward](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=562ba2bc9c&e=0f227c2ae3).

| [ ](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=3fe93d2c70&e=0f227c2ae3)
---
| _**One Key Way Democrats Can Start to Get Their Act Together**_

Who leads the Democratic Party? No one knows, and that void is forestalling any attempt to have a meaningful conversation about the future of the party.

Sen. Bernie Sanders (I-VT) and Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez (D-NY) are drawing huge crowds, Sen. Chris Murphy (D-CT) and Sen. John Fetterman (D-PA) are staking out a moderate message, Gov. Gavin Newsom, Democrat of California is podcasting, and Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer (D-NY) is staving off a mutiny. Former Secretary of Transportation Pete Buttigieg is doing press. The chorus of voices is making the party seem more like a chicken strolling around a barnyard pecking at random than a party striving to take back power.

To be clear, I'm not a Democrat—I'm an Independent who co-founded a new party. I happen to think that the Democrats with their 29 percent approval rating and inability to win the Senate are a structural minority party for the foreseeable future. Do you see them winning Senate races in Texas or Florida anytime soon? Me neither. Folks like The New York Times' Ezra Klein and podcast host Lee Drutman agree that a new political force is necessary to create meaningful competition in places like Kansas or Nebraska, and I'd add California and Massachusetts to that list. That's what I'm working on.

That said, watching the Democrats flail around gives me no pleasure. A dysfunctional party is bad for the country. And one could argue, with the Republicans' blind obeisance to Trump, we are down to zero functional major parties.

So, let's say I want to help the Democrats out. How to fix it?

The problem is this—the first votes for the Democratic presidential primary aren't cast until the beginning of 2028 and most candidates won't declare until after the midterms in 2026. That leaves about 20 months of rudderlessness and lack of definition before a real race begins and a conversation can be had.

Quick refresher—the Dem primary debates are likely to begin in summer of 2027 with candidates declaring a few months prior. Who is going to run?

Everyone.

| [ ](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=1e42c6f7ab&e=0f227c2ae3)
---
| Among the most likely are: Newsom; Illinois Gov. J.B. Pritzker; Maryland's Gov. Wes Moore; Michigan's Gov. Gretchen Whitmer; Buttigieg; Pennsylvania Gov. Josh Shapiro; Colorado Gov. Jared Polis; Rep. Ro Khanna of California; Minnesota's Sen. Amy Klobuchar; Minnesota Gov. Tim Walz; Former Chicago Mayor Rahm Emanuel; Murphy; Arizona Sen. Ruben Gallego; AOC; and probably a dozen more we haven't heard of. The field was about 23 the last time there was an open nomination process in 2020, which I was a part of, and this one will be at least as big.

So, how do you make this mess any better?

Start now. In 2025. Pull the whole process forward.

There are two main ways to do this. The first is easy. The second is tougher but manageable.

First, the DNC announces presidential forums on the future of the party to take place in Pennsylvania, Wisconsin, and Georgia this Summer. Only people who are seriously preparing presidential bids may participate. This will start to suss out some of the early contenders. The forums are obvious media events; CNN or MSNBC would televise them. Candidates would campaign and meet with folks around the state. And then you would hold a non-binding vote in each of these states on who they would like to see as the nominee.

If you are lazy, you could limit this to party activists at a state convention. It would be more compelling to have the public involved in the vote; you could even have people in that state vote on their smartphones using mobilevoting.org. You could build out a calendar giving candidates valuable exposure to important states and constituencies as well as shift the media narrative.

Second, you could pull up the primary process a year earlier. For places like New Hampshire, they just want to go first; does it matter if it's in '27 or '28? You could hold your primaries in '27 and then still have the national convention in Summer '28. That way, the big primary debates would be in '26. You get the country's attention a full year earlier.

What are the problems with these suggestions?

First, they extend the presidential campaign. You'd be making the campaign 12 to 18 months longer for some candidates. As someone who ran myself for years, that's a long time. Some of these folks are current officeholders with lots of obligations. The time to pick apart candidates is longer.

On the other hand, many campaigns might end a little bit earlier too. Some of these folks don't currently have jobs. A lot of the people who are planning to run are stealth campaigning right now anyway. And you have time for a more thorough vetting and getting people in front of the public.

Second, there are costs and practicalities. Running events and forums in various states would require resources and planning. And any adjustment to the primary calendar would require buy-in from multiple stakeholders.

The costs aren't a real issue though—if anything, you would energize donors and the grassroots and this would be generative. You think people in New Hampshire wouldn't be pumped to get an early look at the field?

The real impediment to these suggestions is that they would require the Democratic Party to be nimble. Agile. Adaptive. Do things a little bit differently and more aggressively rather than wait for '28.

You guys are underwater with your own voters. I'd suggest that if there was a time to do something different, it would be now.

To the Dems, feel free to ignore this. Who am I after all? I'm just a concerned citizen who stood up and said you should hold a competitive primary in '24 for Joe Biden . . . oh wait, that aged rather well.

Try to do better this time. An early start could help.
---
| **
Andrew Yang**
Co-Chair, Forward Party

clean_body: Targeting more seats in CA | = | Dear friends — Did you hear? The national pro-choice organization EMILYs List just came out with their targeted U.S. House races and there are no states where they are targeting more red-to-blue flips than here in California. The political experts at EMILYs List have clearly heard our message: The road to taking back control of the U.S. House runs straight through California. = = = EMILYs List is now officially targeted FOUR Republican-held seats here in California: 🔴Kevin Kiley (CA-03) 🔴David Valadao (CA-22) 🔴Young Kim (CA-40) 🔴Ken Calvert (CA-41) Here’s the simplest way we can put it: If we successfully flip these four seats, Democrats will take control of the U.S. House. The current GOP Majority is so small that we could win back the Speaker’s gavel with these seats alone. But it won’t be a cakewalk. In 2024, Elon Musk invested endless gobs of money to defend Republicans in California. That’s why we are organizing earlier than ever. We already have active phone-banking in some of these districts! But we need your help to keep it going. = = = = = = Thank you, \- CADEM | | = Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action. name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: New Numbers Show Over Five Million Names Cleaned from Voter Rolls Nationwide
body:
Judicial Watch announced today that its analysis and use of voter registration lists has led to lawsuits and legal actions under the National Voter Registration Act (NVRA) that have resulted in the removal of five million names from voter rolls in nearly a dozen states and localities over the last several years.

---

### [Judicial Watch Stands Up National Election Fraud Report Line For Voters to Report Voting Issues ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73248&L=33732&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbW9uaXRvci13aXNjb25zaW4tcG9sbHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=ffb334317b881d57f214752c2b8754af78202a4e0d5c83b7f508468ceab43a07) Judicial Watch Judicial Watch announced today that it will run an Internet hotline for voters in all states to report suspicions of election and voter fraud. Judicial Watch has cleaned up voter rolls across the country. In February 2022, it settled a voter roll clean-up lawsuit against North Carolina after the state removed over 430,000 inactive registrations from its voter rolls. name: Matthew Frohlich, WAGOP Executive Director
subject: Election Integrity
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/wsrp/election-integrity?e=6a281f566d)
---
| |
---
| |
# Help Us Fight for Election Integrity!

We are continuing the fight for fair and transparent elections. Our lawsuit in Clark County rages on.

In 2024, Democrats flipped a senate seat, which clinched unilateral control for them over state bonds, by 173 votes out of nearly 90,000 cast. We found over one thousand voters who had previously reported moving out of the district. As a result, we cannot definitively know the true outcome of the election.

Greg Kimsey, the Clark County Auditor, must be held accountable for his failure to keep our voter rolls clean and ensure the integrity of our elections. The only fair resolution is a new election we can have confidence in.

Most election integrity lawsuits get dismissed immediately with the liberal judges in our state. This one has legs because we went out and collected hundreds of affidavits from the current residents of addresses where voters, who had moved, had their votes counted from.

These affidavits attest to the fact that these voters did not live at these addresses at the time of the election and their votes should never have been counted.

While the case has been extended by the judge for both sides to submit additional arguments, the defense has argued that the evidence we submitted should not be admitted.

Help us fight this argument and submit a rebuttal. Help us get a new election; one that is fair and one that we can trust. [Click here](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=9d9723c141&e=6a281f566d) to chip in $5, $10, $20, $50, $100, or whatever you can afford to protect the sanctity of our elections and our country.

Thank you for fighting,

Matthew Frohlich
WAGOP Executive Director

body:
Well, well, well, Friend.

Look what we have here.

🤯 Democrats are melting down and turning on each other.

# **[Catholic sea ministry calls for regulators to promote human rights, labor protections](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9NjIwOTkifQ/3paj8kl9ypcWi9_1UF967g)**
---
A fishing boat returns to Bridlington Harbor after a day at sea on Jan. 31, 2025, in Bridlington, England. Bridlington is the leading shellfish port in Europe. / Credit: Ian Forsyth/Getty Images CNA Staff, Apr 7, 2025 / 06:00 am (CNA). A major U.K.-based Catholic seafarers ministry is calling on regulatory authorities to push for better labor conditions for workers in the seafood and fishing industries. Stella Maris, a support ministry for sea workers that boasts “the largest ship-visiting network in the world,” said in a statement to CNA that seafood certification programs “must adopt a stronger commitment to human rights due diligence” to ensure “labor protections,” “fair pay, safe working conditions,” and other measures to protect workers on the sea.

**ELON MUSK’S MESSAGE TO EVERY AMERICAN ABOUT THE FUTURE OF DOGE THAT EVERY TRUMP VOTER HAS TO READ BEFORE THE DAY IS OVER:**
**_"All we're trying to do is restore the will of the people through the president. There's a vast unelected Federal bureaucracy that is opposed to the President and the cabinet. _**
**_DC voting is 92% Kamala, that's a lot. That's basically almost everyone. If the will of the President is not implemented, and the President is representative of the people, that means the will of the people isn't being implemented. _**
**_That means we don't live in a democracy we live in a bureaucracy. I think what we're seeing here is a thrashing of the bureaucracy while we try to reestablish democracy and the will of the people."_**
—---
Thank you for taking the time to read Elon’s message.

A corrupt network of Obama-appointed activist judges has already ruled against President Trump’s most ambitious executive orders.
**_And now, Democrat members of Congress are calling for street violence against Elon Musk and EVERY Trump supporter._**
President Trump & Elon are doing everything they can, but the fact is, they can only do so much.
The real power lies with grassroots Patriots like you.
Your response - _right here, right now_ \- will send a message loud & clear that **WE THE PEOPLE** stand with President Trump & Elon at this critical moment in history.
But it has to be immediate, and it has to be massive.
Because anything short of an overwhelming response will be a failure.

subject: Asking for $1
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
body:
That’s not a typo – I’m really only asking for one buck.

[](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDQwOF9ORC1DOS4xMTQ1MTBfdDE2MjQxMzMtMzYyMyZleF90aWQ9MjAyNTA0MDhfTkQtQzkuMTE0NTEwX3QxNjI0MTMzLTM2MjMifQ/Z1YtqIc8fy7G3LyhGhTLQQ)Bernie Sanders thinks you're too weak to work hard and get ahead.
That's not an exaggeration - that's his worldview.
Right now, Bernie and AOC are touring the country, spreading their toxic message that success is a sin and only the government can save you. They believe that if you achieve greatness, you must have lied, cheated, and stolen to build your nest egg - and you're part of the problem.
**Let's be clear:** That's not progress, that's socialism fueled by envy and a desire to control your life.
[**That's why I'm stepping up to run for Governor of Ohio - to prove that Americans are capable of greatness without the government holding our hands.**](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDQwOF9ORC1DOS4xMTQ1MTBfdDE2MjQxMzMtMzYyMyZleF90aWQ9MjAyNTA0MDhfTkQtQzkuMTE0NTEwX3QxNjI0MTMzLTM2MjMifQ/eAw_GvS6wUFlwU6gWgPRdw) I'm putting my own skin in the game, just like President Trump did throughout his campaigns, because I believe in this country and I believe in you.
But I need your help. This mission to revive American greatness can't be accomplished with money alone. **It requires a movement - an army of patriotic Americans who are ready to take a stand and say "ENOUGH" to Big Gover****nment.** Here's what we're going to do:
* Cut red tape
* Slash taxes
* Empower families
* Unleash innovation
* And put you, the citizen, back in charge

I'm not running to control you - I'm running to set you free.
And now I'm asking you to take one small step with me: [**Chip in $1 today.**](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDQwOF9ORC1DOS4xMTQ1MTBfdDE2MjQxMzMtMzYyMyZleF90aWQ9MjAyNTA0MDhfTkQtQzkuMTE0NTEwX3QxNjI0MTMzLTM2MjMifQ/LJn2kll0d5athQIhVt6ACg)
**_Yes - just a buck._**
Not because it will fund the whole campaign, but because it sends a powerful message: that you, and millions of other proud Americans, believe in what we're building TOGETHER.
A campaign built by everyday citizens, not career politicians. That's how we win.
[**Do you think you could do me that favor today?**](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDQwOF9ORC1DOS4xMTQ1MTBfdDE2MjQxMzMtMzYyMyZleF90aWQ9MjAyNTA0MDhfTkQtQzkuMTE0NTEwX3QxNjI0MTMzLTM2MjMifQ/h1sBTeKWzuVljgk89PNQWg)[ CHIP IN JUST $1 NOW
](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDQwOF9ORC1DOS4xMTQ1MTBfdDE2MjQxMzMtMzYyMyZleF90aWQ9MjAyNTA0MDhfTkQtQzkuMTE0NTEwX3QxNjI0MTMzLTM2MjMifQ/XHm11w-3nhNaZh0_HRAugw)Let's build this together,Vivek Ramaswamy[](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDQwOF9ORC1DOS4xMTQ1MTBfdDE2MjQxMzMtMzYyMyZleF90aWQ9MjAyNTA0MDhfTkQtQzkuMTE0NTEwX3QxNjI0MTMzLTM2MjMifQ/CeMfxwlm3WDz0DwSXs8nvQ)| | |

body:
The Florida Gators [won the NCAA National Championship](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00L2unDAQxfGnMd2gwRjMFi7S0G3alMgf42USgxF2Fu3bX3H7Wx_pp6P_n-fytJx4f_22G5ka8yJRDoAKcFqC5fRZVBNMJJLUN2Q6rVSH44Bjsxo_aa-0fDgakXSwKg5RT_LhXD-RtGPD5tZQ4dQhdqpvqR_IP1w_kkPqBiUUUuCaz_Zv5r2uFNMnv-lsfd6aZNZajyL6X0LOQs7XdbWF70nI2eeU6EXgbPlH1dmUhJxjyicHCzfh80YFOgnHLUOgyJ4rvAus-X-peYfIZ6mwe2vBr3Y7OO9l5QMK755AIurmNOG4OCUuoxYKX5vl9P2t_tTqbeRXAAAA__8YCG4u) on Monday night, overcoming a 12-point deficit to beat the Houston Cougars 65-63 in a fierce game the Cougars led almost end-to-end.

## Florida Wins NCAA Championship
The Florida Gators [won the NCAA National Championship](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00L2unDAQxfGnMd2gwRjMFi7S0G3alMgf42USgxF2Fu3bX3H7Wx_pp6P_n-fytJx4f_22G5ka8yJRDoAKcFqC5fRZVBNMJJLUN2Q6rVSH44Bjsxo_aa-0fDgakXSwKg5RT_LhXD-RtGPD5tZQ4dQhdqpvqR_IP1w_kkPqBiUUUuCaz_Zv5r2uFNMnv-lsfd6aZNZajyL6X0LOQs7XdbWF70nI2eeU6EXgbPlH1dmUhJxjyicHCzfh80YFOgnHLUOgyJ4rvAus-X-peYfIZ6mwe2vBr3Y7OO9l5QMK755AIurmNOG4OCUuoxYKX5vl9P2t_tTqbeRXAAAA__8YCG4u) on Monday night, overcoming a 12-point deficit to beat the Houston Cougars 65-63 in a fierce game the Cougars led almost end-to-end. It’s Florida's third national championship, and [their first since winning back-to-back](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1uhDAQBp8GOiNjzE8KF2noLm1KtLYXvDnDIts5dG8fXVKn-ppPo9F83pYbUKRj-4AdTVl5UVL1Qmohp8UDxeeia29WRIVdjaYdtW7l0MuhDqafWrADymmyarQrDjjKfuytGmEcnHM1mRdNajm1Ura6a7Dr0b3ZbkArse11pSV6KpyaL6ajBFzjkx-YGsd7HU0o5cxV916puVLzdV1NPjmVfEf08PpUanYcI24oLOQ7FgsxVmpeIyfyIB5ZBP7OhQ9xQCE-IAoXYD-JjxzoFBvsKBI6Tl4EBC8K_22gXDg9xUVHFrlAyXUy_rwoRsrDWGm57UDxV7T8F-5h1E8AAAD__6eYdMI) NCAA titles in 2006 and 2007. This was Houston’s third appearance in the championship game without a victory. The Gators trailed through almost the entire game and didn’t take the lead until the final 46 seconds. On the final wild play, the Cougar’s Emanuel Sharp went up for a shot and instead left a loose ball on the floor as time expired. [You can see the play here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0Us3SnCAQfBq87RYMf3rwkPo2Vi6bS1JJbhbiqKRQLGA1X54-pZu9JSeY7qHphvl-b-_GebeMn82MdR5CCxTkhYoLLdveOP_eiqKvB0RAXmDNtBCMKklVMdVCKK5tz7UCrTtlFFqmGFqquTU99oWrDzUqaMkoZYJfkUu0VccVdhSZFERQ7F0O8fozuCVPOPj3sGG82jAXvp5yXhPhHwg0BJpfB0qg-bKGmNMbLhkjgSZlkx-JQMMqWgmhRFXqkgOTWlPCm4hDm6Il_Jb3YwUpP-ZhJyD1W96tmdcntCNmnDvs_zIZ43wy_5J9tozx2cAUKqNK7DTICkAIAUPXg6300CHndFBUgsTXlWE5jyXWElCHvUf0hN-eYUEeceURWEIzhquJuJirm8_6ZZA366PzLk3HC0h-w7QuF1VRrXHDJZ_Yp_u33z82s50F2LCkF_M1TzjjufVunHIR637dnfcuKU0EHWfj_PkF-X8jsdXwJwAA__-uxKsz).
## Trump Rejects EU Tariff Offer
The European Union proposed a [“zero-for-zero” deal](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2u3CAQhZ8Gd1hjwH8Fxd5E7m7alBY2w5oEMxawazlPHzmpbzWjc6RPOt_Pz_nT-ODj84fZURdHswDRclAchtkaH65ZVVY7RIGyQt30SjXQtdBVm-7VosZ-cK0csVnt6BwuFlQPcmiHzsjK65sGCoYGoFGyRtniOi6ywwWwaRVTgNYXSvUv8rFs6MJFb0z1SnsV9FbKkZl8MDExMZ3nWe853h0TE0b-ykxMO0W87mvSbyx38qbILSYe8MLIyTlMmZf02g_-BxNxR-n_U0zyzmVu0QROkZsQuI_2lUvyJvAnkb15JvHHo_mWtwOYnGj1lsnvH7czPPNHojNjlbQ9Th-Cz13PFDx348O_EeUrqW8t_gYAAP__YyJ7sw) on Monday to eliminate all industrial tariffs between the EU and the U.S., but President Trump swiftly rejected it, accusing the EU of abusing trade rules. Trump also threatened to [impose a 50% tariff on Chinese imports](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kD2zmzAQAH-N6MScPsByoSINndOmZIR0mIsFIuhs4n__xq9__c7Ozv65jbdAmbb777Ci57mMGnQnwUpwYwqU36Ntkp8RNZoGvbpYq6DvoG8Wn8w8xd4pd8WrceBwmmOvlLvEZDo7q4b8xwYWnAJQ1rRoOozXyfQ4AarOCguYiMvR_i208YJzfpcXHm0sa5P9wrxXYX4JPQg9nOfZ8oJMK9YPIPTwfAg97CUTU6xCD-FgihmFHtZwPJCrzIGxstzwrHLmirJyiQ_JJYW3zPRCycdz3eV_ODd2_9LUHD7tJ-VMtb8IC_c1UP7u4Z_-vLz-CgAA___Uwmoq) unless Beijing lifts its 34% retaliatory duties by today, warning that all talks with China would be canceled otherwise. He framed the move as essential to correcting longstanding trade imbalances. [U.S. markets ended modestly lower](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kD1vwyAYhH8N3rD4MrEHhrSVp6ZLh44WMS_J22KwgMTyv6_cveud7vTo-bpMF4sB4-3DLmCqT5NgoqNMUdZPzmLYJ9U44wEEyAYMPynFme6Ybu5Gz3B1vQNx0p3rvR8Uc7MbuNCguRugQXO8McV6zhhXsgXZwTxcpYYrA94pohg4rCm33wljvYMPe3pCbue0NMHca10LkWciRiLGbdvapcSjI2KESB-FiHFJEXYixppWWmqaf45wsyHQUjNApSWgg0JtoTU_lpU6vBWKkaZIq83o_TGwmZ7P_LWq9Z3IMc3oiHx7ObzAVj4hr002bt0wBCz6RBS7LRbDH2b9T9vTiN8AAAD__6pVcL4) on Monday: The Dow fell 349 points (0.9%), the S&P 500 declined by 0.2%, and the Nasdaq Composite edged up by 0.1%.
## Most Popular Cars in America by State
A state-by-state breakdown of [America’s top-selling vehicles](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFuhDAQBb_GdEZrY8AULtLQXdqUaLGXYyNznPAGdH8fXfr0T28083WbbsiZH_dP3CjIsk8WbKvBafBTQs6vyVUpLESWmoqC6Z0z0LXQVWvwvh8W48GYGahPtk0xLe1gHHrrBjQVh_cbOPAGwLimpqalOMxNRzOQaZ1yQIllP-rvnR-y0pJf-0lHHfetymEVeRbVfCg7Kjte11WfXH4wR3yyYOYi76Gyo6ykZyqiC-W3jT5p5ZhJ80PjRgdH1PNLF0EhZcfqCOl5cc5cul45uG_I-Y8p_zU4g_0NAAD__0OfX10) in 2024 shows the Ford F-Series as the nation's overall favorite, claiming the top spot in 24 states across the South, Midwest, and Mountain West. The Chevrolet Silverado followed closely, leading in states like Arizona, Alaska, and Kentucky. The Tesla Model Y took first place in California, Washington, and New Jersey, while the Toyota RAV4 proved popular along the coasts, winning states like Florida and Connecticut. A few states, like Arkansas, opted for more unique choices, such as the GMC Sierra, adding local flair to national trends. See [the full state-by-state list here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7GOhCAQgOGngU4zwIBaUFxjt9deaVCGlQuKEXbNvv1lr9_6T77k_7lNNxdT3O_fbiNbQ54kSN0ANtBP3sX0mpB7G4gkKU5WdIgCjAbDV-txdn4Qg3azD2SUMbqfOx0cBA8SiUf71gChFwACVUtK0zLMytAMJDQyBPKx5rP9zXGvK4X0yk862yVvPNm11qMw9cXkyOR4XVdLfnvsvrw7k-OWS22OfDySO5vFnYXJkZ_WH1dMKRbTMYT75mL69-qnv6eVfwEAAP__5aJSpA).

name: History Facts
subject: Why we "raise a toast" 🥂
body:
By the Middle Ages, the custom now known as a “toast” had evolved from its ancient Greek origins and was common in Europe, and the medieval era’s culinary habits contributed to its eventual name.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68epsleb0vfo0iot91l6iermq4kn17od01i15h0okqjhbfwdxr4v5hphpzlg01zorsyh1qpwi0ruenfv8xqezufjj1skb7ko6hfevtmu7js3snkfk6gkqh0c1kw4lzy7f9qyb1gi7ngp7hop9&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suea5i&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [The phrase “raise a toast” refers to actual toasted bread.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suea5i&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [Arts & Culture](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suea5i&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suea5i&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| B y the Middle Ages, the custom now known as a “toast” had evolved from its ancient Greek origins and was [common in Europe](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suea5i&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com), and the medieval era’s culinary habits contributed to its eventual name. Many meals at the time included a piece of soaked bread or toast (known as “sop”), and during the holiday season in England, communal bowls filled with a warm, spiced alcoholic drink such as mulled cider or ale were common. They were known as [wassail](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suea5i&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) bowls, a name derived from the Anglo-Saxon greeting of "waes hael,” meaning “be well” or “be in good health.” Wassail bowls were garnished with slices of toasted, spiced bread.
---
Some theories suggest the toast was used to augment the drink’s flavor or to serve as an accompanying snack — not hard to believe given the prevalence of sops. But it possibly had another purpose: In some cider-producing regions, the wassail tradition also included a blessing for good crops from farmers’ apple trees, during which villagers hung pieces of wassail-soaked toast in the branches for the robins. Throughout [the 17th century](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suea5i&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com), the word “toast” became distanced from just the charred drink topper. By the 18th century, according to linguist Dan Jurafsky, English dinner parties often honored a guest as the “toast” of the night, a tradition that eventually evolved into the verb “to toast.”
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suea5i&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suea5i&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## Shaking your head “no” actually means “yes” in some parts of the world.
The popular phrase “when in Rome, do as the Romans do” is an important reminder to respect unique customs and cultural etiquette around the world. In Bulgaria, that means [adopting a cue](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suea5i&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) that’s altogether the opposite of most other places in the world: shaking your head side to side to express “yes,” and nodding up and down for “no.” One theory for how this regional body language developed suggests that, during Ottoman rule, Orthodox Bulgarians used it as a way to resist pressure to renounce their faith, nodding their head “yes” when asked to convert religions while inside meaning “no.” Today, many Bulgarians try to accommodate visitors, who, if they’re aware of the custom, do the same for locals — leading to potentially confusing conversations.
---

| For 250 years, one of America’s most elite fighting forces has embodied courage, discipline, and an unwavering commitment to defending our nation’s freedoms. name: 51st State Alerts [Team Wagner]
subject: ONE CLICK POLL: Should Washington, D.C. become a state?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ann Wagner for Congress
body:
Do you believe the liberal stronghold of Washington, D.C. should become our 51st state?

| |
---
| | | | | | _**[ONE CLICK POLL:](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/vMf1Wp7nq6huNjKLtFdICjUrhIh3WqgjQH0zf8H7YbZlZKwaIn93Y1JRJoBHvT6IkPmV-OrOZNzMg_QRLpmion_SZ_WAuLtrZf02M0VyzEWb_YYOa5UikTgjnsWRDhNfSlIyIQL_XAinVOKlNWKQmUSVKTCZ0oTQLuRslPJCYM1i6f7XyFGOXdmflmqLzuPAp9GN57qRDRynqhXEVtw-dH-9Ig7L8m06NOqUdjgRgUSN7HHio3MSXp9CKJGE4AnKm67ArUvMDAdbcbbK4Qw7xHdiw41EsDBhRxMXzc8bAZw9Y2kF1D80bxK2A8ecisp3B9d2-m9VLh4AshprMxQSSDerNBsf-cLep8TaS8HKdVlDdBcFUo8S0myNDy9z545kADVaIj7GXccm5Dxj3jIx72GCwDDOAioFjf6A5zdaxgQGpG19Z1SPef6yXY0h-x8yLoHmYWpay1TURkQ1cV7WA66enDIcKOF9mjRxS-pVD1uyPkrazRw8j8dlrz8dESqqvBfXneQr6V-mdFfUbO_7YZNNGxDwC6VCpYA6hif6/JDnhvrczMIvEMk3ut2yd8wdzgvNiWI20/7 "ONE CLICK POLL:")**_

It's no secret- even though they're in the minority, the Radical Left Democrats aren't backing down on their plot for D.C. statehood.

That's why we're reaching out to our top Patriots to collect a list of freedom-loving Conservatives who stand for a 50 state USA.

If the Democrats get their way, we'd never win another election again. The Republican Party as we know it would cease to exist if Washington, D.C. headed down the path of statehood.

**[So, Friend, what say you? Do you believe the liberal stronghold of Washington, D.C. should become our 51st state?](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/ASA-DYG7UJBxuUFrHwfpeBGjMhyticge30AAVysqkfuKO1hImzDmuLTDKceAN9G4eEOHAIyBxPZbBVLTGbah8T4DucqrDtmZzgY80ruDQrwz5CLlB7crwl3i8wq6g4whUb6jVJQVUmsPXKP2RorSO-vI25IMWIbwtWRnmcbv0jGT3OvCsyEUSVPim9nmenBVQ4kcuhzU9-AyGP8GJgWJPC1Q6HfQvckqyIpdBeIRLZx5VmG1YIj5nfinD327UPPFafW0GQEj7H0cpN-gP3mobekWLIAgonFWgAwJyFVA3jQu9EFWOzqn565vcgCIkSwbsXSLMA7fYAkGCuMdy04ir4VzBNND9QB6QHWASbRfIoyKCXxqtraIdT2bevBliqw7OcHa9Y27MidCZo8tM-kxqtfNaaf5BjksEXSjilea5yHSxPNfTzG1FPZAqecBsua_zqwhz4ZPKbQ5LWM3vXAO319lfOsCDu6eHJtgwgYTd1NXHCIDIJtAR5-D-j1rDGbr6vDmLBJSRaw-wq6-ym0PYlRHxOWb1ljOfEsKOXfL/nugeREqX6Ino5pkO-6EySwANLdSc9uHD/7 "So, Friend, what say you? name: No Dem Left Behind PAC
subject: The Immigration Reform Movement is Growing
body:
People are taking to the streets to defend immigrants across the nation. We need to keep up this momentum of activism.
| | | | | | [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2x1t2o-w5izou-kyd76rh8/)
---
# **The Immigration Reform Movement is Growing**
---
| [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2x1t2o-w5izov-kyd76rh9/)
---
| | | | Dear friend, Last week, immigration reform protestors made history. **Over a thousand people took to the streets of Dallas** , marching from Cathedral Guadalupe to City Hall, standing up for justice, dignity, and the rights of every immigrant who calls this country home. Leaders like **Congressman Al Green, political activists, and local officials** stood with the protestors, demanding change. Demonstrations like this show that this movement for immigration reform is not just about policy; it’s about real people, real families, and real lives at stake. But here is the truth: the fight is not over. The same courage that filled the streets last week must fuel the next steps. We will not stop fighting until our leaders take action, until fear is replaced with justice, until families are no longer subjected to this unAmerican wave of anti-immigration. **To everyone who marched: thank you. To everyone who believes in this fight: stand with us.** NDLB is committed to electing leaders who will protect immigrant communities, not attack them. [**_Every dollar raised fuels this mission, supporting voter outreach, advocacy, and real change. You marched—now let’s make sure your voices are heard where it matters most. Chip in now and keep the fight alive._**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2x1t2o-w5izow-kyd76rh0/) In Solidarity, The No Dem Left Behind Team
---
| [Chip in $10](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2x1t2o-w5izox-kyd76rh1/)

---
Thank you for your support in this pivotal time.

name: The Texas Flyover
subject: Floods in East Texas, Fire Department Gender Reveal, Sweet or Spicy Pickles?
body:
Heavy rains and tornados ripped through East Texas over the weekend, [causing extensive damage](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGuqzAQRL_GdEZrY8AULl5Dl9feEm3wAlZMHNkrSP7-ivS3HI00c3R-btMNQwzP9T_u5Pi9pEmDbiUYCXbyGOJnMpV3d_CDqsip3hilACxUm5vJq65tEcnOgLpZ5t50fdcre0dSS1sFd42BAaugtdDUw923prHQwIBoBhAGyAdOueaNmN5YlvhJB-V6TnsV3cb8KqL5J_Qo9HieZ_0gflyl0OOTziL0yOklC6cc6EqFDsokT0LeKMtIeFCRHndcSS4xJR-eq8QYJc45lSIJC8vvtdBjlZ1_nSHGULpeGFh3DPHLwn_KOZz-DQAA__-mKWjI), especially in Smith and Wood counties. On Friday night, a dam serving Lindale’s Lake Lorraine washed out, flooding streets and buildings.

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kD-L4zAQRz-N3MWMNON_hYo7jJsjgTsOFrYxUjSOBXIc7EmcfPslybbbzjweP97Hvt-7mOL5dHATW7kPc2_AFDugHdR9cDE9esqC9RAanbHVFZHWADVkox3Kox88oSt1IF9ho4nR-QIHYuTBZNE-ZUBQayhqwLzxoSCsAaFxjhpQBByizEsuIwvf3Tqkx3zjJT_OU5bsKHJZFf5SplOm27YtnziehZcjX-TJKNNh1aD5q0z3_9_vw-efJ4rdNQaFraai1sqU69Vrha2M_K3vV3HC749R2J55WxOL8PK-ocIWqIf6VSNbbLhsMaW4lpUiOE0uptdC-THZzZqvAAAA__-Sqmpj) | |
# Tuesday, April 8, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1966, actress [Robin Wright](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z72OrCAYh_GrgW7MX0DFguI0dnOKbaY0LwPqm0UxSubj7jez_ZZP80ue23W8Eife5v-0RldeUx4VVHOBucCOgTi9RyOD8wh9LaOrO2PqGrCQi1M--mC6rm0VkdUTvNWIZAF1t76DZPfBYGBrNBa66n1ojLbQ6IlMD2EQA5d8VGWJJb7onNI7P-JR3fMqk1tK2U-h_wk1CDXErXryN-8xMFX5mIUaPi3U8JU9b-Pt4Hkp8nBhf3JKfLadMJhX4vTrlT8HH079BAAA__-sElIz) was born in Dallas. She’s best known for her role in 1980’s _The Princess Bride_. More recently, she’s appeared in films such as _Moneyball_ , _The Girl with the Dragon Tattoo,_ and _Blade Runner 2049_. A couple used a fire hose to spray colored water to announce their baby's gender. For photos, check out [our story](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00D2vpSAQxvFPg92YAdEDBcU2dnfbLQ0yg5LgS5DoPd9-s2fr2z7FL3n-f76mL59y2pfffmNXv-MxKVQ9oAY0E_mU35NuyM1IVjbs5EtrKRENNqsbIilEJNuFIHHwsY_qRfplfeDZ9rpJ7h-GGo3E3mDX2pl63Rns0HqvLQqNTKkepa0rV_72V8zv4-bShmNrsltrPS_R_RJqFGp8nqcN8yVtW2-hRl9qCpmFGnd-LqHGfASfhRrZXxU-GsRUGIhPX-rGe4WV8_l_jWlZKxd4UmR4Ul1h4Z24QOGbP0yPEqJVwRoKIOMQQc8awVJgmFXQcaY4GENNcXQ-Ked0DS-hcdl8yp8D9ceit1N_AwAA__8qIXgS) in today’s _Et Cetera_! We're sponsored today by [Rosetta Stone](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kD-L4zAQRz-N3MWMNON_hYo7jJsjgTsOFrYxUjSOBXIc7EmcfPslybbbzjweP97Hvt-7mOL5dHATW7kPc2_AFDugHdR9cDE9esqC9RAanbHVFZHWADVkox3Kox88oSt1IF9ho4nR-QIHYuTBZNE-ZUBQayhqwLzxoSCsAaFxjhpQBByizEsuIwvf3Tqkx3zjJT_OU5bsKHJZFf5SplOm27YtnziehZcjX-TJKNNh1aD5q0z3_9_vw-efJ4rdNQaFraai1sqU69Vrha2M_K3vV3HC749R2J55WxOL8PK-ocIWqIf6VSNbbLhsMaW4lpUiOE0uptdC-THZzZqvAAAA__-Sqmpj), offering their biggest sale of the year on their language learning software.

## Cougars Come Up Short in Championship
The Houston Cougars [came within three points](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFywyAQRL8GdWhOCFtQUKRR57QpNSc4GSZIaMTZsf8-Y1dpUu_Om933dZkumHLarp-4kuPHUiYF6iRBSzBTwJSfk26CmyHYriHXDVp3HYCBJjo9o1-GYbDBUme9GeYZQNNg_XK2gUyT3AsGGkwHJwN9a-dw0r2BHiyitiA0UEhcjpYjMT2wLvlZ7nS0vqxNdpF5r6L_EGoUaqx7Obi2T4ylvApCjb7kTFeSM9Zv4hlzFmrM6U5CjZtHlD7iuqey1Zh2-b72SuVtD8hUZfXloCqXXI4UUMZyq1w2udJW_zAll9ux4UobS9UDdADatJHX3Bwu7D8p51TPg9BwXTHl93j-1-bdqd8AAAD__-XXehA) of securing their first national championship in the title game against the Florida Gators on Monday night but lost in the final moments 65-63. The Cougars seemed to have the game in hand with a [12-point lead early](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOpDAQRL_GZD0yHrNjAoJLyPbSC0eN3UDrGozs3mHn709cvlElpSq99-fz-YksvC-_caNBv-f8dNZ1YD3Y8EzI8n76Jg2TTX3b0NA-vG9ba4Nt1uHRTW3o-48ZY6S-8xT6Rxc6F9o0T52LDQ_XmPU2tLYL9n7rp9T5e7B32yP63hpvKbHmctOVlL6xzvLOLyq3mLdGhlX1qOb-y7jRuPE8z1ucaj1y0Xo1jBtjFqGFYML6l3RCEePGnc5q3DhLLpwQTt4r7BER4orbwXmvKx-woOZS4bqLeSNI-WsSgsQLKySaObJCQZE3HFgV1vxVNe8w5wK6ckmgrELGjcKvK5oypONkEa4fD-PtsiHLfxL9Ue1rcP8CAAD__54PgDk) in the second half before the Gators rallied on both sides of the court, tying the score at 48 with just under eight minutes remaining. The contest remained [close to the end](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvgzAQRn-N2UDn4wj24KGLpQ7p2hGd4wuxagKKrRD-fZXuXb7lk96T3vd5OnPK6T5_8SKuvq7rhIBDC9SCmSKnfEzURBcgWt2I0yOR1gAGmpvTFEdiFO6R4mU0fYgWjUF71YM1ITTJvWFAYDQMBvrOhjhQb6AHy0wWFIHEVNdHV29S5cXlmo_1KY_usi5Ndrdat6L6D4Veod_3vZOy3d-nQr_IvbSXNWeZpQ1cfqQGzlmh3zIf4XivQj8p9DMv8hkVegI90gkMNg8Xtz3lnMppVATzwin_Weu_GZ4OfwMAAP__qrJdsw), but Houston failed to get a three-point shot off with time running out. The win made Florida coach Todd Golden, 39, the [youngest coach to win](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOpDAQRL_GZD0yHrNjAoJLyPbSC0eN3UDrGozs3mHn709cvlElpSq99-fz-YksvC-_caNBv-f8dNZ1YD3Y8EzI8n76Jg2TTX3b0NA-vG9ba4Nt1uHRTW3o-48ZY6S-8xT6Rxc6F9o0T52LDQ_XmPU2tLYL9n7rp9T5e7B32yP63hpvKbHmctOVlL6xzvLOLyq3mLdGhlX1qOb-y7jRuPE8z1ucaj1y0Xo1jBtjFqGFYML6l3RCEePGnc5q3DhLLpwQTt4r7BER4orbwXmvKx-woOZS4bqLeSNI-WsSgsQLKySaObJCQZE3HFgV1vxVNe8w5wK6ckmgrELGjcKvK5oypONkEa4fD-PtsiHLfxL9Ue1rcP8CAAD__54PgDk) a championship in the modern college basketball era. It marks the third national championship for the Gators.
## East Texas Hit with Floods
Heavy rains and tornados ripped through East Texas over the weekend, [causing extensive damage](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGuqzAQRL_GdEZrY8AULl5Dl9feEm3wAlZMHNkrSP7-ivS3HI00c3R-btMNQwzP9T_u5Pi9pEmDbiUYCXbyGOJnMpV3d_CDqsip3hilACxUm5vJq65tEcnOgLpZ5t50fdcre0dSS1sFd42BAaugtdDUw923prHQwIBoBhAGyAdOueaNmN5YlvhJB-V6TnsV3cb8KqL5J_Qo9HieZ_0gflyl0OOTziL0yOklC6cc6EqFDsokT0LeKMtIeFCRHndcSS4xJR-eq8QYJc45lSIJC8vvtdBjlZ1_nSHGULpeGFh3DPHLwn_KOZz-DQAA__-mKWjI), especially in Smith and Wood counties. On Friday night, a dam serving Lindale’s Lake Lorraine washed out, flooding streets and buildings.
After the home he built with his own hands was submerged by floodwaters in Hawkins on Friday, [Daniel Bancroft returned Saturday](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LGO3CAUheGnwR3WBUOAgiKNu02b0rqGi43EmJFh7Z23j2b6tKf4dPT__Vq-MJd8bH_wQb7_pLpIkJqD4mCXiLm8FjVEv0J0YiAvjFJCAFgYdg8hKENiRRsVrmQRpmBCslo7q42ehuzfGCiwArSFaXRr1GqyMIFDVA6YAoq513PsO3X6wZbKq150jqE-huL33p-NTb-ZnJmc7_sew9qEG_vF5Ixnz6EQk_NBd2NyLjVgYXImbJ1_NB7q97MQL7VR43TR-ep7PjYev4n3yiNd2Pp7SKXWmI-NyVmD4MlpqbSbOBkSXCUA7oxUXKYEpAwgmDScPj7vXEpuvwxTsD0wl8_x_t-Sl5f_AgAA___tAXOt) to wade through the wreckage. “ _We got married, engaged out here... This home has memories_ ,” Bancroft said. On Saturday in Pittsburg, [flash floods swept a herd of cows](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2OnTAQRp_GdEaD_ylcpKHbtCnRGA9gxcAVdvDet492-60_6TtH58_H_IEpp3P7jQf5-rleswChOSgObo6Y8ntWXfQB4jh05Aer1DAAOOh273AMiqxwIwoNZAbQIRgdyFprhYld8l9noMANoB3IfgxRK-lAwoioRmAKKKZ63X3dqdInljW_r4fufrmOLvu91ldh8hcTExNTa63_W0P5GpmYTmqFiWm5WuHl3_2khziulW4eKJ0bL41elWPDN08nJyyVfyP4mq8rpnNjYsK7piXTLCWGBdzKSWrJ1YKGOysi10NcgzHOWAX9Xo_c3T6-Wso5FWOZgu3AlL9t64_5Hi_-BwAA___-nHEW) into a culvert and carried them beneath a bridge. All of them made it back to dry land safely. Around 100,000 gallons of rainwater mixed with sewage overflowed from a [Nacogdoches water treatment plant](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLHOozAQhJ_GdEZrYye4cHENXa69Ei3YgJXFjmAVkrc_-e__LbaY0Xwazb_H-MBEKa9_cY-eP0sZNWgrwUjox4CJvqNpgp8gONVEr-7GKAXQQ7N5c5vd4tSEJmjTIU4K766zdg5Wazthk3yFgYFege2ha90UrOl66MAhGgfCQAyJy9HyFjl-8FzoW97xaOeyN-Q35tcpuj9CD0IP13W1T-J3NYUeKlvoAUx9N6GHGpQK6skViUo-ZdUWKtcpM85lDWXe4ikv5HhIPiLyHjPLF2FmmTIXSZgxo5yPGJ9CD83hw-tKROm83YWBdcdEP-3417neXv8PAAD__125bBk) into a nearby creek. City officials stated that the contamination threat is minimal.
## Austin Ranks in Healthiest Cities
According to a WalletHub study, Austin is one [of the 20 healthiest cities](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2OqzAQhZ8GOqPxDwEKF7ehy223RCYe45EMjvAkhLdfJbvtdjM6R58-na_rdHWUaFv-uxUtv0KeFKhWgBHQT95ROidTezuDH2SNVnbGSAnQQx1td9GAbTeHuRtkGIzuJELw-tJL2ZqANdk3DAz0EtoedDPMvjW6Bw2Dc2aAygB64rw3HJHx5UpIZ37i3tzyWicbme-l0v8qNVZqPI6jmWm55cfG-xnzine34LtaqXHDo1RqXB1t4vcueUWRg-CI4rFFdIkjYWFxIyYsgrafqAi34-d7G4jCD3-KEvMHUu_W3w9Kicqlqwwsq6P00eM_93pa9R0AAP__Z7lvaA) in the United States, ranked No. 14. Other Texas cities didn’t fare as well, with Arlington at No. 155, Amarillo at No. 167, Corpus Christi at No. 176, Laredo at No. 178, and Brownsville in last place at No. 182. The [study looked at factors](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z79ugzAQgPGnsTfQ-WzADB66sKVrR2TjS3ySKRFc_r19le6ZP-knfT-n-RS58u_lO64U5HneZgTsGnAN-DlHrq_Z6RwS5NFoCmZwzhgAD7oE8r4jjAQ2p9H1Q-pN8gvmISVCJKc5vDFw4A10Hmw7ptw568HCGKMbQTmgzLLtrRQSesbjXF_bnfZ22VZdQxG5Hsp-KZwUTo9YK0m5pXdVOFG-KZwKxSqF6ZBmYWE6FE7WwIB6D_n64Fr56Afl4LJGrv-wfDy9B_wLAAD__8zBVNk) including the cost of a medical visit, fruit and vegetable consumption, and the number of physically active adults.

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: What’s best for our cause:
body:
Saving our country requires sacrifice.

| | | | |
---
Fellow patriot,
I’m writing to you directly because I want you to know where I stand.
**_After wrestling with this decision, I’ve chosen to stay in the House of Representatives, fully committed to advancing the America First mission._**
Being asked by President Trump to serve as U.S Ambassador to the UN was an honor I didn’t take lightly -**I was fired up and ready to represent his administration on the world stage.**
But my priority has always been serving _you_ and championing the _America First cause._ When it became evident that I’d make the biggest impact staying in Congress, I didn’t hesitate when deciding to stay right where I am.
With President Trump leading from the White House and our House GOP majority on a knife’s edge, every moment and every fighter in this movement counts. I couldn’t turn my back on the effort to _**lock down our borders**_ ,_**rebuild our economy**_ , and _**shield our way of life**_ from the radical left’s agenda.
**_President Trump needs every ally he can count on in the House and I’m not going anywhere._**
Since I dug in the left has zeroed in on me like never before. They see me as a roadblock because **I am******a** conservative who will stop at****nothing******to** see America First succeed.**
They’re throwing everything they’ve got at me including**_relentless smear jobs_** ,**_shadowy cash_** flooding in to tear me apart, and**_plans to steal my seat next election_**.
They’re obsessed with shutting me down because they know**I am here for you**.
I’ve been focused on preparing for what I thought was the next step, not stockpiling campaign funds. Now, with the left’s assault in full swing, I’m scrambling to build up our defenses to hit back and keep our edge.**_That’s why I need you today._****__[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/ai64/?__vbtrk=Mjg0MDEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg0MDEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)__**
[STAND WITH ELISE](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/ai66/?__vbtrk=Mjg0MDEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg0MDEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**__[I’m here fighting for you and I am never going to give up or give in... But I need you to stand with me now and chip in whatever you can today to make sure that as their smears ramp up I will be able to push back](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/ai66/?__vbtrk=Mjg0MDEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg0MDEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_._**
**Can I count on you?**
I am grateful for the continued support of patriots across our nation as we maintain the fight to save America.
_Your fellow patriot,_
**Elise Stefanik**
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/ai66/?__vbtrk=Mjg0MDEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg0MDEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

And Peter, it doesn't even stop at calling them "suckers" and "losers." Now, he's gone so far as to appoint MAGA loyalist, Doug Collins as Secretary of Veteran Affairs, who would cut funding and services to millions of military veterans. Our veterans are willing to make the ultimate sacrifice to keep our country safe, but Donald Trump isn’t even willing to show them a shred of respect. We’re OUTRAGED! We can't sit idly by as Trump takes away the life-saving benefits of healthcare and additional support from our veterans! [Will you sign your name today to stand with our veterans and condemn Trump's administration for taking away their benefits? Together, we can demand Donald Trump and his MAGA allies to stop their disrespect!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T960e77c8-488e-4810-8fc8-014c8519aab6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbceb6223-694e-479b-9e7f-88cc2ec05a0b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 4/8/2025
body:
One Sunday, four laws and the collapse of middle ground in Colorado politics
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._UMnA/s3qd8cecab9)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._UMnA/s5n60cfce04)**
| | Hi friends,
Here is a summary of today's top stories:
**🏛️ Colorado Legislative Session Updates...** Colorado Democrats [fast-tracked four controversial bills](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._UMnA/s6h7beb3125) in one day—on abortion, gender care, misgendering, and telehealth—while pushing a new proposal to [shield illegal immigrants from ICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._UMnA/s7j99b24f85). Lastly, a commentary by Shania Cole argues HB-1312 [weaponizes pronouns](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._UMnA/s9k90fe45e6), exposing families and teachers to lawsuits.
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** Elizabeth’s school library battle deepens as a federal court temporarily halts a judge’s order to [return 19 removed books to school shelves](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._UMnA/sbr23e34061), keeping them in legal limbo. And Jena Griswold, Colorado’s embattled Secretary of State, announced her [campaign for Attorney General](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._UMnA/s3g2c6cb454), doubling down on her anti-Trump messaging despite past controversies including a voting system password leak.
🇺🇸**On the National Stage...** President Trump escalated his trade agenda with a [50% tariff threat on China](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._UMnA/sap3ef7a10b), as [50 nations](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._UMnA/s9k2a1948ca) rush to renegotiate under his “Liberation Day” policy. Rachel Gabel [backs the beef tariffs](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._UMnA/sfg4644048f), calling them overdue protection for U.S. ranchers.
🗣️ **Commentary Spotlight...** George Brauchler exposes a [shocking loophole](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._UMnA/s0m304b265c) in Colorado law that still allows probation for child rapists—thanks to six Democrat lawmakers who killed a bipartisan bill that would’ve guaranteed prison time for offenders. And Colleen Enos lays out what she calls [Colorado’s “radical trifecta”](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._UMnA/s4s6062a999): taxpayer-funded abortion, attacks on parental rights, and sweeping gun control—arguing the Left’s priorities are out of step with everyday Coloradans.
Listen to today's **Mountain Minute Podcast** [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._UMnA/s9md8afdea4), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._UMnA/ser2f6bec71) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._UMnA/s4k0f5f2634)! This is the Mountain Minute for Tuesday, April 8, 2025.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[One Sunday, four laws and the collapse of middle ground in Colorado politics](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._UMnA/s0o4a923dda)** BY JEN SCHUMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._UMnA/s3pf3faab3f)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._UMnA/s7j8c9f9881)
With the clock ticking on the legislative session, Colorado Democrats made their move—advancing four of the year’s most polarizing bills in a single day – Sunday. The marathon legislative blitz was notable not only for its controversial content, but for how it was executed: through rare weekend floor time, party-line votes and multiple Rule 16 motions that cut off debate and silenced opposing voices.
“Because of the actions today, I would request that this bill be read at length—and every other bill after this,” said Rep. Scott Weinberg, responding to the procedural move that ended discussion on one of the bills.
House Minority Leader Rose Pugliese added, “Coloradans deserve better than rushed debate and silenced voices.”
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._UMnA/seqb086deff)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._UMnA/s7s5d5efcdb)
|
---
**[Cole: HB-1312 turns pronouns into a weapon against parents and schools](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._UMnA/s5u199a2a25)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._UMnA/sakeca6cb18)
* HB-1312, the “Kelly Loving Act,” was rushed through the Colorado House with debate capped and opposition silenced, raising alarms about transparency and democratic process.
* The bill redefines misgendering and “deadnaming” as discriminatory acts, imposing fines up to $500 and exposing parents, teachers, and businesses to civil lawsuits.
* Critics warn it threatens parental rights and free speech, labeling it a dangerous expansion of state power based on subjective self-identification with no legal benchmarks.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._UMnA/sbt6e622f78)**
|
---
**[Enos: Abortion, parental rights and gun grabs—Colorado’s radical trifecta](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._UMnA/sblbfa35816)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._UMnA/s9m988b016a)
* Colleen Enos criticizes Colorado’s legislature for prioritizing radical policies—including taxpayer-funded abortion, aggressive gun control, and weakened parental rights—while ignoring the state’s $1.2 billion shortfall.
* SB25-183 would add abortion coverage to Medicaid at state expense, while SB25-003 and other gun bills impose sweeping restrictions on law-abiding citizens’ Second Amendment rights.
* She warns the legislative session has abandoned balance, urging Coloradans to stay alert for bills that threaten homeschooling, parental authority, and religious freedom.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._UMnA/sfs3fecd0d1)**
|
---
**[Colorado Secretary of State Jena Griswold joins Democratic primary for attorney general](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._UMnA/sdld7e5cdf7)** [COLORADO POLITICS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._UMnA/s4p8e296f00)
* Colorado Secretary of State Jena Griswold has entered the 2026 Democratic primary for attorney general, positioning herself as a defender against Donald Trump and “MAGA extremists.”
* Griswold is emphasizing her record on expanding voter access and standing up to Trump in the 14th Amendment ballot case, despite backlash over an election security breach involving leaked passwords.
* She joins a crowded field with two other prominent Democrats and brings over 100 endorsements into the race, while Republican Connor Pennington remains the only GOP candidate.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._UMnA/seifa5b3c50)**
|
---
** ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
**[Devotional: Perseverance – Keep Climbing! It’s Worth It!](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._UMnA/s8l5365e7bd)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._UMnA/s2v37aff334)****BY DRAKE HUNTER****| COMMENTARY | APRIL 6** _Ever found yourself halfway up a mountain thinking, Why did I do this? Your legs burn, your lungs gasp, and your motivation runs dry. The summit seems distant, and the parking lot below is tempting. This is perseverance—when quitting looks easy, the reward for pressing on is greater. “But the one who endures to the end will be saved.” – Matthew 24:13 (ESV)_
__
**[[UPDATED] Ganahl: Colorado GOP’s New Leadership Faces Rogue Holdouts as Williams’ Allies Cling to Power](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._UMnA/s0p554371ea)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._UMnA/s1ra3fd41ce)****BY HEIDI GANAHL | COMMENTARY | APRIL 6** _The Colorado Republican Party’s newly elected leadership, led by Chair Brita Horn, is battling a desperate power grab by ex-Chairman David Williams and his allies. They refuse to let go despite the Colorado Republican State Central Committee’s (SCC) move to dismiss a contentious lawsuit._
__
**[Davis: Democrat lawmakers target faith as discriminatory under HB25-1312](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._UMnA/s3h0da1c647)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._UMnA/s2g2b244c7b)****BY CHASE DAVIS | COMMENTARY | APRIL 5** _Colorado is rapidly becoming one of the nation’s most “progressive” states. And by “progressive,” I mean “radically opposed to God, family, life, marriage, and basic human biology and aggressively hostile to anyone who holds historic conservative and Christian beliefs on these issues.”_
__

**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [tori@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:tori@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\))) or send us a message on social media to chat!
|
