clean_body: Forget DOGE. If you want to understand government inefficiency, look no further than Missouri. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more Forget DOGE. If you want to understand government inefficiency, look no further than Missouri. | | | Apr 8 | | | | | | | | | | | | Two things are true: 1. DOGE is ineffective, harming Americans, damaging faith in our government at home and our standing abroad, and and generally bad person. 2. Government is bloated, and it's not particularly efficient. Want an example? Look no further than the counties in Republican-controlled Missouri.1 ? Article summary: Missouri 's centuries-old system of county government makes it harder to deliver high-quality services to its residents. Lots of states face similar issues. A lack of accountability --no recent public data, few journalists, exemptions from reporting requirements--makes it hard to know why certain counties are so much less efficient than others. If Missouri 's Republican supermajority were serious about efficiency, this is the first place they'd look. (But of course, they aren't serious.) We have way too many counties Missouri has 115 counties, . That stat alone indicates serious bloat, but when you dig into the data, you start to realize how absurd it is that Missouri has that many counties: 56 counties--nearly half!--have (For context, the U.S. population has .) 60 counties have populations smaller than 20,000. Those make up the vast majority of Missouri's counties that have been shrinking for the last century-plus. Once upon a time--when James Buchanan was President, and the was still a decade or two away--this made sense. In the horse-and-buggy era, even if you had paved roads, you And since back then, in practice you were moving even more slowly than that. In that era, the from surveying to getting licenses to recording transactions to registering births and deaths--you had to be close to your county seat. Otherwise, there was no other way to do any of this without spending days on the road. The need for this many counties is entirely obsolete The problem now is that this whole set-up is totally vestigial: You can reach your county offices by phone, and . You can access many records online. , and You can reach your county officials by email, and well over If all else fails, and you have to go to your county seat in person, you can get there in an automobile, and . (In rural Missouri, the rates are even higher than that.) You can drive there on roads where the , and usually much higher. We've set up an entire system of government that works really well for people living in 1861, back when Missouri's and was formed. But for people living in 2025? We're still using the exact same structure of government.6 It's costly and it's not necessary. Having this many counties is inefficient, wasteful, and dangerous Here's a comparison between some of the state's smallest counties and its largest.7 | | ---|---|--- People in rural Missouri . And across rural Missouri, counties are spending significantly more (as a percentage of county per capita income) than cities. The system we have now is inefficient, wasteful, and dangerous. This can and should be fixed. Here 's why it's inefficient. There are certain fixed costs associated with running counties: maintaining a county courthouse and paying 13 elected officials,8 for instance. If five small counties merged, they could cut these costs by 80%. But the inefficiency is much deeper than that. Take, for instance, the roads. , the seventh-highest rate in the country.9 Consequently, Missouri has some of the country's . Even the smallest counties have that they maintain.10 To get roads repaired, counties need to contract out that work. But with so many small counties: 1. Counties are forced to bid against other small counties, meaning that critical work doesn't get done for longer. 2. Counties lose the critical negotiating leverage with more volume, and they probably end up paying more. Because of the poor state of Missouri 's rural county roads, people are needlessly dying. With larger counties, we could address those issues faster and more cost-effectively. Here 's why it's wasteful. Let's compare Missouri's elected coroners.11 | | ---|---|--- First of all, I have no idea why Clark County pays its coroner so much more, given that it has roughly the same population as Putnam and Sullivan Counties. Second, I also wonder why Sullivan and Clark Counties, whose collective population is half of McDonald County's, each pays its coroner more than McDonald County. Finally, I question whether each of these counties can even find qualified coroners. Missouri's statutory qualifications for the position , requiring no knowledge of what it takes to be a coroner. There just aren't that many people I'd consider qualified for the role, since there are only in the whole country. I'm sure that the coroners of Putnam, Sullivan, Clark, and McDonald Counties are fine people.12 But statistically speaking, when 1-in-5,600 Americans is qualified to be a coroner, and when a the odds that they live in one of those counties and want to run for office are pretty darn low. With larger counties, the pool for these technical roles is larger. ; the Missouri Legislature, to its credit, recognizes this. Merging the state's smaller counties will lead to a larger pool of more qualified people running for office. We can joke about this with coroners. But when it comes to Prosecuting Attorneys or Treasurers--both elected positions--this is a very real and very acute problem, where (living) people will suffer if we don't have qualified people in those roles. Here 's why it's dangerous. I already talked about the fact that Missouri's inadequate roads are literally killing people. This goes beyond that. I wanted to run an analysis on whether Missouri's rural counties were systematically spending more. But I couldn't do that. Why? Only a small percentage of Missouri's counties have , because for no obvious reason, from certain reporting requirements with the State Auditor.14 Large swaths of Missouri, like the rest of the country, are without robust local reporting. In all of Missouri, there , one of the lowest ratios of reporters-to-residents in the country. In the northern part of the state,15 there are just 30.16 Why does this matter? Because without good data and without proper reporting, it 's extremely hard to hold all of these local governments accountable--either to responsible spending or to fend off corruption or both. Who's reviewing contracts to make sure there isn't self-dealing? Who's there to explain why Chariton County is so much less efficient than Linn County, its direct neighbor to the north? With this much inefficiency, no one is being properly held to account. And the way that Missouri has structured its governments is leading to less efficient spending, less accountability, and . This issue isn't limited to Missouri I'm using Missouri as an example, but this is true just about everywhere in the country. Hardly anyone has done anything to reconcile inefficient and outdated county governments I'm more familiar with Missouri than other states, but it's clear to me that other states are flailing around with the same bloated governments too. With the right reforms, government can work better There is a remarkable lack of imagination in government today. Our bloated, antiquated, dispersed systems of government are inefficient, dangerous, and bad for residents. In the grand scheme of things, does it matter whether a small county pays its coroner $16,000 or $52,000? No, not really. What does matter: our systems are not well set up to deliver the best services possible to people , around the state and around the country. This gets at the farce of DOGE: they . And unless they improve laws and processes, which they're not, what they're doing will make federal programs worse, and people will suffer as a result. Urban areas have their problems too, . Democrats are falling short in making government work well , and that's hurting Democratic electoral hopes everywhere. People are right to be angry about what they're seeing in some of the country's bluest states. No matter where you are, it 's essential that we do more to make government efficient. Democrats must be talking more about that--especially if the Trump Administration is . But since Republicans control Missouri, and since , why don't they show us the way: merge counties and create a better, leaner, more efficient government for everyone. ? Feel free to share this post with someone who will find this interesting. (If you're reading this email because someone sent it to you, .) For press inquiries, please contact press@ben-samuels.com. 1 For the Missourians here: make sure you vote in ! These are low-turnout affairs and your vote matters a ton. Here's more information on . 2 This is the first time I've directly used ChatGPT as a reference. I used the "Deep research" functionality, which was pretty cool. (And yes, I spot-checked this to make sure that it's accurate; as far as I can tell, it is.) 3 The of the Ohio Department of Transportation website as a source for horse-and-buggy speed is one of my all-time favorite citations. 4 With that said: this is less true among rural Missourians, where . 5 This data is from 2011, but I couldn't find more recent data than that. With that said, some less reliable sources have that number closer to 95% today, and that tracks--there's a lot of stuff in the modern world that'd be hard to do without an email address. 6 It should be noted that because of profound rural population loss in the last 150 years, this set-up hasn't been necessary for a long while. In 1900, , which was at the time the state's least populous. Today, there are 14 counties with populations smaller than that. It speaks to setting up a system that wasn't even necessary for people 125 years ago, much less now. 7 Lots of footnotes here: This is not a scientific or representative sample of counties. More , but because I was constrained by the data available (since from having to submit annual reports with the State Auditor), I tried to present a smattering of small counties to show how they compare to the state's largest. Here's where I pulled data for each of the counties: , , , , , , , . and are separate counties. This is data for St. Louis County and does not include the City. If you're curious, here's a . Getting really into the weeds: the data for St. Louis County is technically "Expenditures" and not "Disbursements." The two aren't exactly the same, but to use the most fitting possible expression, it's close enough for government work. I got per-capita income by Missouri county from the . I did not include counties where there was something (obviously) anomalous going on. Take , for instance-- for a county of its size, but that's a function of a one-time infrastructure project. (The , if you're curious.) However, just about every county spent money, and while that may be a one-time thing, I didn't exclude that from the analysis. Finally: can we get more creative with our county names? Across the U.S., there are , , , , and four . There are even two . (McDonald County, while unique, still doesn't feel very fun or creative. Credit where credit is due: Chariton County is unique and a good county name.) Give us a County! Or a County! County, Missouri has real potential as a tourist draw. We should be having way more fun with this. 8 Every county has three County Commissioners, an Assessor, a Circuit Clerk, a Collector, a County Clerk, an elected Coroner, a Prosecuting Attorney, a Public Administrator, a Recorder, a Treasurer, and a Sheriff. (Some of the larger counties have a different set of elected officials. But this is the case in most rural counties.) In some cases, some of those positions are merged (like Collector and Treasurer). But even still: it's a lot of elected officials. 9 Two states with higher rates of rural roads in poor condition are , who have very few rural road miles. In terms of rural road miles in poor condition, I'd venture that Missouri is among the highest. 10 There's more than a little nuance here in what exactly each county is responsible for, between and and a bunch of other things, but what's clear is that counties are generally on the hook for some meaningful amount of road repair and upkeep. 11 Here are the sources for , , and Counties, all from 2023. The don't separate out coroner compensation, which is itself part of the challenge here: it's very hard to do a proper compare/contrast, and it makes accountability really difficult. Instead, I pulled . It's a few years old, and so I'm guessing that his compensation has gone up, but it doesn't change the overall story here. Then there's a broader question here of why Missouri has elected coroners at all. Even 80 years ago, the state suggested , thinking back then that it may not be necessary. But like the whole infrastructure of counties, it's managed to hang on. 12 Or maybe they're not. I have no idea. Maybe I'll meet them one day. 13 This data is, technically, , not how many want to. But this is probably the more important data anyway: speaking from experience, there is a really big chasm between thinking you want to run and actually putting together a campaign, no matter what position you're running for. ! 14 This isn't an attack on the Auditor's Office, by the way. They do good work, often thanklessly. But they , and there's only so much they can do when you think about everything else they have to look at across the state. But the makes absolutely no sense. 15 The "North Missouri nonmetropolitan area," technically. 16 Two things: This includes sports reporters, meteorologists, etc. So there are even fewer political reporters. Alarmingly: since I started working on this post, the data seems to have disappeared from the Bureau of Labor Statistics. (I don't know why that is. , but this is the first time I can remember it just disappearing like this. I've sent some texts around and have reason to think this might be a function of DOGE cuts, which is pretty unsettling if that's true. But I don't know that definitively.) Fortunately, the data is still available on the . 17 "" is the Wikipedia page you never knew you needed! But you can use it to see just how seldom anything has changed in the last 125 years. | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Ben Samuels 548 Market Street PMB 72296, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?

name: Stop Trump via Our Revolution
subject: Trump’s Tariffs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

Over the weekend, as Trump’s tariffs sent the economy into a freefall,
guess what Donald Trump was doing? Playing another round of golf.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/24883?source=email-20250408&t=1011&akid=8129%2E5885482%2Ed3NLFL ]Headline about Trump playing golf and telling Americans to 'hang
tough'as universal tariffs begin.

Trump’s tariffs are pushing us to the edge of a recession. Families are
struggling as prices climb, wages stagnate, and 401ks and the stock market
PLUMMET. Yet, Trump remains indifferent, teeing off in luxury as Americans
feel the pinch.

Members of Congress are facing INCREDIBLE pressure to do something. And
the solution is clear: Congress can revoke these destructive tariffs and
restore responsible oversight over trade policy NOW, before the crisis
gets worse.

We only need to pick off a few Republicans, but they’re going to need to
feel MASSIVE public pressure in order to stand up to Trump.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/24883?source=email-20250408&t=1012&akid=8129%2E5885482%2Ed3NLFL ]That’s where we come in. Will you send an urgent message straight to
Congress that it MUST stand with everyday Americans, not billionaire
golfers?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/24883?source=email-20250408&t=1013&akid=8129%2E5885482%2Ed3NLFL ]ADD YOUR NAME

The damage is already being felt across the economy, hitting the most
vulnerable among us the hardest. As the stock market crumbled, wiping out
YEARS of retirement savings for millions, 4,000 factory workers also lost
their jobs. Automaker Stellantis announced layoffs for 900 workers, citing
conditions created by Trump's tariffs.

Economists are clear: these tariffs are incoherent, reckless and could
spell DISASTER for working families, small businesses, and the entire
economy. And while the president has broad discretion over tariff policy,
Congress can revoke or restrict that power through legislation.

Last week, FOUR Republicans joined with Democrats in the Senate to pass a
resolution that would nullify Trump’s tariffs on Canada. But so far, House
Speaker Mike Johnson has refused to give the resolution a vote. Together
we can change that.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/24883?source=email-20250408&t=1014&akid=8129%2E5885482%2Ed3NLFL ]Headline questioning whether Congress will act in the face of unease
over tariffs.

If you’re worried about what these tariffs will mean, you’re not alone. A
new poll shows 80% of Americans are concerned about the economic impacts
of tariffs.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/24883?source=email-20250408&t=1015&akid=8129%2E5885482%2Ed3NLFL ]Will you join in and help FORCE Congress to act, before the damage
spreads?

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13120?c0=email-20250408.23n57-&t=1008&akid=8129%2E5885482%2Ed3NLFL ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a 2024 Movement Builder with a

name: Newt Gingrich
subject: I just testified before Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC
body:
I couldn’t be silent, so I returned to the chamber where I once served as Speaker.
| Friend,
---
Our Founding Fathers deeply distrusted judges.
---
**They warned that the lawyer class – if given unbridled power – could undermine and destroy free society.**
---
And now, nearly 250 years later, the cautionary words of Thomas Jefferson have come back to haunt us... _Our Free Republic teeters on the brink of judicial tyranny._
---
The notion that unelected lawyers can micromanage the executive branch and override a commander-in-chief who received 77.3 million votes should trouble every American.
---
**This is potentially a coup d’état by judges.**
---
_**In these troubling times, I returned to the chamber where I once served as Speaker and testified before the House Judiciary Committee.**_
---
_I offered testimony on the left-wing judicial coup taking place in America and the impending constitutional crisis that will ensue if these rogue judges are not stopped._
---
**That’s how dire this situation has become.**
---
The People’s House MUST rein in these out-of-control judges and save our Republic before it’s too late.
---
The legislative and the executive branches have the constitutional right and power to put an end to judicial tyranny before it consumes our Republic.
---
I provided my testimony. But now, the most important testimony will come from Americans like _YOU_.
---
_At a time when the will of the American people is under attack, it has never been more important for the public to speak out against the threat posed by rogue district judges seeking to undermine voters._
---
[**Please add your name to the petition calling for the People’s House to put an END to judicial tyranny by rogue left-wing judges.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=213882f601bd41a4aa76e336d0ff5a1f&_e=GjmYbLIqvq1hTaCcvoSCw2nVkp3K9oiNiHKBfmNtpIm9GcGCVACijLANGEioiTSvBt9GaOCkdgdLSog3IaVP5TCaUBHsMrSgYzGKmkMebp-eGDZhgIrd7htOs6YAe-WaG1_JYICp-dR4cKfOgiJlErmRpymXl078PjApvpCiiPXAb7t5T71T4nvuHU80R9dsw5R4IKjgsN0WOxrACc8H5kfMNDBCcqRDrYjsM7WdA8k_U2_DO6Qa4UcF_648sUHKC005R4H-NIliZ9Bzv0bTbDSGeUZn3CoUj86ZTio5xahvPzXWIBb_foRC-GPFyD0TkErZcOx3dNhLBxtZ-PSMhDa7gWOYrf6P4FciLK3oSko%3D)
---

[ADD YOUR NAME >>](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=213882f601bd41a4aa76e336d0ff5a1f&_e=GjmYbLIqvq1hTaCcvoSCw2nVkp3K9oiNiHKBfmNtpIm9GcGCVACijLANGEioiTSvBt9GaOCkdgdLSog3IaVP5TCaUBHsMrSgYzGKmkMebp-eGDZhgIrd7htOs6YAe-WaG1_JYICp-dR4cKfOgiJlErmRpymXl078PjApvpCiiPXAb7t5T71T4nvuHU80R9dsw5R4IKjgsN0WOxrACc8H5iJHZUsV2qr75mVFfizYL3ApMnTFQqOxZfu-kCx6_EIPfyUnc7vG2NSdybTKFt_qJgXtS02TGozqgA9oejFUNtp--t52S1VDLcGDpdrmaW0Y8lfA7tttL5kP7t3-S_gzCxrR8WHONLpljoQ_mzsQSH4%3D)
---

Thank you,
---

_Former Speaker of the House_

name: Adam Schiff
subject: I just introduced my first bill!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=8454%2E5257348%2EDHzQAc ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek — I have
an update for you:

I just introduced my first bill in the U.S. Senate — a bipartisan piece of
legislation to protect communities impacted by natural disasters.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q22025_abs_em.gs9A_9&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250408_AM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=8454%2E5257348%2EDHzQAc ]Los Angeles Times: Schiff's first Senate bill proposes tax credit for
hardening homes against fire, disasters

The Facilitating Increased Resilience, Environmental Weatherization and
Lowered Liability Act — or FIREWALL for short — will provide tax credits
to families seeking to make their homes resilient to natural disasters in
their communities.

Derek, we are
just starting to rebuild from the disastrous fires in Southern California
earlier this year.

Ever since the first fires started in the area, my office and I have been
working to do everything we can to support the communities — and to make
sure disasters like this are mitigated to the furthest extent possible in
the future.

Alongside Republican Senator Tim Sheehy, a former aerial firefighter, I
wrote this bill to help reduce the level of damage inflicted by future
natural disasters like wildfires or floods.

I’m proud that my first bill introduced in the Senate is a bipartisan
effort that will directly help California communities upgrade their homes
with measures that we know will reduce damage and save lives. And it’s the
first of many bills to come.

I wouldn’t be in this position, able to support Californians and people
across the country from future natural disasters, without your support and
trust.

Thank you, and stay tuned for updates about our bill.

— Adam

+------------------------------------------------------------------------+

| Adam is fighting for Californians in the Senate — working to lower |
| costs, protect our communities from future natural disasters, and |
| safeguard our rights. |

name: KC Crosbie
subject: I just approved your application!

name: Giffords.org
subject: The Trump admin just made it easier to arm gun traffickers
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
This is a big deal, and it’s not great.
#

Friends -
In 2021, the Biden-Harris administration enacted a "zero tolerance" policy of revoking the licenses of federal licensed firearm dealers who knowingly broke the law by selling guns to people without a background check.
To put it plainly: people who sell guns to criminals they know couldn't pass a background check shouldn't have a license to sell guns.
It's common sense.
Yesterday, the Trump administration revoked that rule -- even though it would clearly result in higher crime.
But why? Why would they do this? As is often the case in the Trump administration, it comes down to greed and profit.
Repealing this rule benefits two parties: the gun sellers knowingly endangering communities, and the gun CEOs getting rich off of weapons sales to traffickers.
So here we are. This is what we're up against on a daily basis. It doesn't make the headlines like tariffs or a crashing stock market, but it is a constant erosion of gun safety laws that we have to fight back against.
But because these things happen under the cover of larger news, it makes it harder for us to fundraise. So we really have to rely on people who are tuned into what's happening and care enough to act and donate when these things happen.
So please, we're asking -- especially today:
[**Can Gabby count on you to make a contribution to GIFFORDS to help us fight for stronger gun laws in Congress and states across the country? The amount isn't as important as the donation itself because it will all add up when everyone chips in a few bucks.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-apr25.x-ZdIQ&refcode=em250408-1-b&t=1&akid=10285%2E3935704%2EguUlVV)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

subject: MassGOP Calls on Lisa Field to Come Clean About Lobbyist Work

---
|
### MassGOP Calls on Lisa Field to Come Clean About Lobbyist Work
---
---
| Boston, MA\- Today, Massachusetts Republican Party Executive Director John Milligan called on Lisa Field, Democratic candidate for State Representative in the 3rd Bristol District, to be transparent with voters about her profession as a registered lobbyist.
"Lisa Field needs to be honest with the people she hopes to represent," said Milligan. "We already have enough secrecy on Beacon Hill. The last thing we need is another politician who hides their role as a paid lobbyist from the public."
In public statements and campaign materials, Field refers to herself as an "Associate Director." However, records from the Secretary of the Commonwealth reveal she has been a registered lobbyist since 2016, earning over $273,000 in that role -- not including her income in 2025. She has been listed 36 times as a registered lobbyist with the Office of Campaign and Political Finance, and appears 26 times in OpenSecrets.org's federal lobbying database.
"It's a serious red flag when a candidate conceals a lobbying career from voters," added Milligan. "State Representatives are elected to serve the public -- not special interests, and not the highest bidder. Lisa Field's failure to disclose over $200,000 in lobbying income raises real concerns about who she's really working for."
The MassGOP is calling on Field to immediately update her campaign materials and publicly acknowledge her record as a lobbyist.
###

clean_body: | | | | | | | == | MassGOP Calls on Lisa Field to Come Clean About Lobbyist Work | Boston, MA\- Today, Massachusetts Republican Party Executive Director John Milligan called on Lisa Field, Democratic candidate for State Representative in the 3rd Bristol District, to be transparent with voters about her profession as a registered lobbyist. "Lisa Field needs to be honest with the people she hopes to represent," said Milligan. "We already have enough secrecy on Beacon Hill. The last thing we need is another politician who hides their role as a paid lobbyist from the public." In public statements and campaign materials, Field refers to herself as an "Associate Director." However, records from the Secretary of the Commonwealth reveal she has been a registered lobbyist since 2016, earning over $273,000 in that role -- not including her income in 2025. She has been listed 36 times as a registered lobbyist with the Office of Campaign and Political Finance, and appears 26 times in OpenSecrets.org's federal lobbying database. "It's a serious red flag when a candidate conceals a lobbying career from voters," added Milligan. "State Representatives are elected to serve the public -- not special interests, and not the highest bidder. Lisa Field's failure to disclose over $200,000 in lobbying income raises real concerns about who she's really working for." The MassGOP is calling on Field to immediately update her campaign materials and publicly acknowledge her record as a lobbyist. | | == | MassGOP | == | == == | | | | Massachusetts Republican Party | 85 Merrimac Street, Suite 505 | Boston, MA 02114 US | | | | | | | | |

body:
The lack of basic adult maturity among left-wing protesters is astonishing and disappointing

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..YCe5d9vumr8HTcZo8sR09Hb3ekJk-KRjJ66Uwyf1w0s?) for more

[](https://substack..EfNn5HQB9FmkpdqEj2pLeF-GqSttnxji3BKpY_y3AN0?)

# [DOGE confronts "Hands Off" protesters in Washington D.C. ](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=160856536&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYwODU2NTM2LCJpYXQiOjE3NDQxMjQ1MDIsImV4cCI6MTc0NjcxNjUwMiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMwNzI3ODAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.NTbVBk__nQ96vLgVatQFF893taXffReQC2IXO9xEVaQ)
### The lack of basic adult maturity among left-wing protesters is astonishing and disappointing
Apr 8
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=160856536&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYwODU2NTM2LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0NDEyNDUwMiwiZXhwIjoxNzQ2NzE2NTAyLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzA3Mjc4MCIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.fED_s3obreHwNJmA5huRAwsd8Y-8si04c6PQov6oZsU&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=160856536&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYwODU2NTM2LCJpYXQiOjE3NDQxMjQ1MDIsImV4cCI6MTc0NjcxNjUwMiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMwNzI3ODAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.NTbVBk__nQ96vLgVatQFF893taXffReQC2IXO9xEVaQ&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=160856536&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYwODU2NTM2LCJpYXQiOjE3NDQxMjQ1MDIsImV4cCI6MTc0NjcxNjUwMiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMwNzI3ODAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.NTbVBk__nQ96vLgVatQFF893taXffReQC2IXO9xEVaQ)
---
| | [](https://substack..JB9YZwPVTz9ImIv3GUdwZD9-bi8EnUP8vbdDXZabD4w?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/politibrawl/p/doge-confronts-hands-off-protesters?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

I went to the Hands Off protests this past weekend to question protesters and engage in debate on whether DOGE is a force for good and does our federal government desperately need to be trimmed of waste, fraud and abuse (yes it absolutely does).
A large number of those I found proactively and proudly offer up the fact that they currently or at one time worked for the government in departments including USAID and the Department of Education.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/8db93949-1d88-4941-bd36-820ea64fb956?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
They are blindly furious that a businessman, someone not of their world, from the "private sector" would dare lay his hands on their precious bureaucratic monstrosity. I'm not calling them "blindly furious" for hyperbole, watch the video and see for yourself.
And yes, I did go dressed in **[my signature DOGE Officer uniform](https://substack.com/redirect/2182fbd7-61a5-4fb3-bfe3-a24e25f6c95e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and that may have had something to do with the venom I received.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/02dd0aad-0ab4-4b6f-bc09-35907a3dc0ca?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
As you can see, these people are cartoons. Many of them lack the basic social skills of personal composure and mastery of one's emotions as well as the ability to articulate a rational argument. I will note that some of the people I spoke to were perfectly pleasant and did not fall into this category, but easily more than half saw me as the devil for asking "Does the American taxpayer have the right to want waste, fraud and abuse eliminated from the government?"
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..-DASlaaHvv4kAPF7TGb1ta2rqkxd_1fS79u97tNCpEM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=160856536)
How dare I!
Some admitted that there was waste, fraud and abuse, but Elon Musk and DOGE were "going about it the wrong way" and it should be dealt with slowly with the nerfed and ineffectual protocols within government rather than with a chainsaw. In other words, let's ask the criminals to investigate themselves...
"Government shouldn't operate like a business!" several protesters told me with firmly.
Why not?
**(Piece continues below)**
* * *
**[Presented By Mode Mobile](https://substack.com/redirect/7598f2d6-4677-42c8-8413-a137a2276adb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **Apple 's Starlink Update Sparks Huge Earning Opportunity**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7598f2d6-4677-42c8-8413-a137a2276adb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Apple just secretly added Starlink satellite support to iPhones through iOS 18.3.
One of the biggest potential winners? **[Mode Mobile.](https://substack.com/redirect/7598f2d6-4677-42c8-8413-a137a2276adb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Mode's EarnPhone already reaches +45M users that have earned over $325M, and that's before global satellite coverage. With SpaceX eliminating "dead zones" worldwide, Mode's earning technology can now reach billions more in unbanked and rural populations worldwide.
Their global expansion is perfectly timed, and you still have a chance to **[invest in their pre-IPO offering at just $0.26/share](https://substack.com/redirect/7598f2d6-4677-42c8-8413-a137a2276adb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[.](https://substack.com/redirect/7598f2d6-4677-42c8-8413-a137a2276adb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Mode's recent 32,481% revenue growth and their newly reserved Nasdaq ticker $MODE puts them one step closer to a potential IPO.
**[Invest in Mode's pre-IPO offering at $0.26/share and earn up to 100% bonus shares.](https://substack.com/redirect/7598f2d6-4677-42c8-8413-a137a2276adb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/7598f2d6-4677-42c8-8413-a137a2276adb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
_**(Continued)**_
In a business, every cog in the machine must justify its own existence, daily. Every piece is necessary, productive, and improving itself, or it is eliminated. If this relationship is built, then a profitable enterprise can produce more value for its customers than it did the previous year and their products and/or services become better, beating competitors, making consumers happier, etc.
If a government department is founded and afforded money by congress, it doesn't need to produce a profit, but it needs to deliver value and results for the taxpayer, who is the customer in this example. If thousands of frivolous workers have been hired to dozens of frivolous departments over several decades of fiscal irresponsibility, then you have a BIG problem on your hands... and that's where DOGE comes in.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..-DASlaaHvv4kAPF7TGb1ta2rqkxd_1fS79u97tNCpEM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=160856536)
Watch the video, and look at the entitlement and the rage these folks exhibit. They don't work for the American taxpayer, they work for their own ideologically driven agenda, on your dime. Observe the lack of diversity in their ranks as well. These are the white, ultra elite, over educated, ultra left-wing class of D.C. snobs who look dow their nose at the blue collar working man in middle America that have been sucking the lifeblood out of this country, one April 15th (tax day) at a time.
These are the people the MAGA movement was built to defeat, and they looked pretty defeated to me on Saturday. They defeated themselves really.
Unfortunately at one point, outside the Heritage Foundation on Capitol Hill, there was another crowd of protesters we came across on our way back from the main protests. Long story short, the cops told me I could not approach them and ask my questions like "does America need DOGE?" and "do the taxpayers have a right to be concerned about waste in government?"
I was extremely disappointed with this, though I'm not going to get super dramatic about it and say they were trampling my rights or whatever. They read the room, a lot of these folks were no bullshit ready to hit me and they didn't want to deal with it. I wish they would have focussed their preemptive attention on the psychos that were yelling at me for standing up for the taxpayer, but whatever, I get it, it was easier to remove me than 100 of them.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..-DASlaaHvv4kAPF7TGb1ta2rqkxd_1fS79u97tNCpEM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=160856536)
My biggest takeaway from putting myself in this situation among these protesters is this: some people can go through life, live 50-60 years, get a boring adult job like working for the federal government, start a family and have kids, and STILL never have learned how to deal with someone politely and respectfully disagree with them politically. It's literally fucking unbelievable how ungrounded some of these folks are, and they are the ones pulling the levers of this nation in Washington D.C.
Hopefully not for long.
* * *

name: The Democratic National Committee
subject: Update: DNC Announces New War Room Operation to Take on Trump Administration
body:
---
Derek, While Donald Trump continues to push an agenda that raises costs, destroys jobs, and ruins lives, he also continues to lie, spin, and cheat his way out of accountability. That’s why it is our responsibility to provide the American people with real facts and accurate information about the impact of his policies. And that’s exactly why we wanted to share this news with you: **_DNC Announces New War Room Operation to Take on Trump Administration_** Yesterday, the DNC announced the launch of a new War Room to expand and streamline the DNC’s communications, research, and mobilization operations. The War Room will incorporate four main pillars: expanding Democrats’ reach into new information spaces, modernizing the rapid response operation to drive aggressive daily messaging to counter the Trump Administration, leveraging creative opposition tactics and an expansive research operation, and launching a modernized misinformation counterprogramming vertical to combat the lies from the right. With the launch of a new War Room, the DNC will integrate the communications, research, and mobilization departments to drive a cohesive daily message against the Trump Administration and Republicans up and down the ballot, targeting messaging to Americans across information spaces and combating misinformation from the right. The effort will include:
* At the grassroots level
* In the influencer ecosystem
* Within conservative and mixed media spaces
* Daily rapid response
* Combatting misinformation and lies
* Putting Republicans on defense

Right now, it’s more important than ever that we hold Trump and MAGA Republicans accountable for their destructive and harmful policies, and that’s exactly what we’re working to do. [This work is only possible with your help. If initiatives like these are important to you, we hope you’ll consider pitching in a few dollars to help fund the work we’re doing:](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2025/?refcode=em_20250408_3156_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3163_22930333_nMgFrW&akid=3163%2E22930333%2EnMgFrW) **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2025?refcode=em_20250408_3156_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3163_22930333_nMgFrW&akid=3163%2E22930333%2EnMgFrW)** Thank you, and we’ll have more updates to share soon. The Democrats

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

name: Team Freedom Virginia
subject: 🐝We’ve Been Busy Busy Bees🐝
body:
Just because the General Assembly Session is over, doesn’t mean our work stops. In fact, we’re busier than ever, and here to catch you up on some of what we’ve been up to.
| | | | |
---
| 🐝We've Been Busy Busy Bees🐝
---
| Friends-
Just because the General Assembly Session is over, doesn't mean our work stops. In fact, we're busier than ever, and here to catch you up on some of what we've been up to.
In February, we went to the Nation's Capitol to visit Virginia's members of Congress and urge them to fight for fair taxes- that means middle class tax cuts and NO giveaways or tax breaks for billionaires and corporations.
---
|
---
We also joined with several other organizations for the "Where's Rep. Kiggans?" Town Hall, joining impacted constituents, advocates, and community members share their stories and demand accountability. We discussed how current policies are affecting jobs, health care, and essential services for the people of Hampton Roads.
---
|
---
In Occoquan, we joined Senator Jennifer Boysko, Delegate Briana Sewell, Voices for Virginia's Children, and impacted Virginians to urge Governor Youngkin to sign Paid Family & Medical Leave legislation into law. Though the Governor chose to veto the bill and continue choosing corporate interests over Virginian's livelihoods, the fight for Paid Family & Medical Leave in our Commonwealth continues!
Thank you to Sarah Burzio, owner of Hitchcock Paper Co., and Missy Alexander, for joining us and sharing your stories.

---
|
---
We busy bees have been flying all over Virginia advocating for economic security, and there's still more to come! Later this month, we will release our Affordability Scorecard, highlighting important affordability legislation from the General Assembly and legislators who stood out as economic champions and affordability allies.
Thank you to everyone who joined us at events, spread the word on social media, and spoke out by contacting your legislators and the Governor's office concerning important legislation. Together, we can create an affordable Virginia for everyone!
---
---

name: Riley Gaines
subject: Can a red crayon become a blue crayon?
body:
Scholastic Book Fair is promoting books about gender confusion to kids in preschool!

|
---
| | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z21bq43u93olu34bk4tk0l1st09cm3r6ss9uvn00_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chj61o76c1h2bs "SkyTree Book Fairs")
Friend,

Scholastic Book Fair is promoting books about gender confusion to kids in preschool!

In _Red: A Crayon 's Story_, one of the books that Scholastic markets, a crayon labeled as "Red" decides that he is actually "Blue." No matter how hard he tries to be red, he just can't! It's a story about "being true to your inner self and following your own path."
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zcsg5dm1s9172e0n233ulvvlk512u096kleqe5p0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chj61o76c1h2bs)
_Does this story sound familiar?_

It has eerie similarities to the narrative promoted by gender-transition advocates:

If you want it badly enough, if you declare it so, you can easily transition from boy to girl or girl to boy. It's a matter of feelings and not a biological reality. This kind of narrative is terribly confusing -- and even scary -- to kids whose brains are not mature enough to understand this line of thought.

This way of thinking also has real-world consequences. Consequences I am all too familiar with...

A _man_ who identifies as a woman stole my dream of winning the NCAA championship in _women 's_ swimming.

But don't worry, there's a solution! The solution is SkyTree Book Fairs.

Founded in 2023, SkyTree offers private AND public schools the opportunity to host a book fair that is 100% free from confusing, inappropriate, or otherwise adult-themed content.

The best part? They offer this extraordinary educational experience at zero cost to the schools!

[Want to make school book fairs innocent again? I'm asking you to join me today in supporting SkyTree Book Fairs. Donate $10, $35, $50, or even $500 today to help them fulfill the 150+ requests they received for book fairs. Click to make your tax-deductible gift and put a wholesome book into the hands of a child. >>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z81nk0t93fgg0kg2jgsf2gv5ldtv2j0gf0sbo188_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chj61o76c1h2bs)
[Donate](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z7mokv2t25c289v4svateponsti68871iskloglg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chj61o76c1h2bs)
Imagine trying to decide which is worse - your child missing out on learning time in school or having to explain to your grade-schooler that, actually, Red Crayon can't just decide to be a Blue Crayon.

Well, that's exactly the dilemma parents, grandparents, and guardians across the country are facing right now.

Stories like _Red: A Crayon 's Story_ are so ubiquitous that many parents are choosing to keep their children home from school during book fair week rather than risk them being exposed to this type of confusing and subversive content!

SkyTree Book Fairs believes that every child should have the opportunity to develop a lifelong love of reading through stories that build strong moral character and **let kids be kids**.

They are wholly committed to providing a superior book fair alternative that matches and even exceeds the ease and quality of the traditional Scholastic book experience.

>From classics like _Anne of Green Gables_ to new favorites like _The Green Ember_ , every book in SkyTree's catalog is aimed at empowering children to dream big, build a strong moral character, and embrace the spirit of adventure and personal responsibility that makes America so great.
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zpud0u500peo307he554hejbt3r7e20vdc0ojph8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chj61o76c1h2bs) [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zlj0ghcjs56g5vch90a6jj2j7bp1ns1opugj42vg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chj61o76c1h2bs)
[I hope you'll join me today in supporting SkyTree Book Fairs! It has never been easier or more important to make a positive impact on a child's life through literacy! Click here to send your tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $250, or more, and help SkyTree bring 150+ book fairs to schools across the country. >>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zeoj6bqcnu3c1ecdosjbcive12qruha91eu5au7g_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chj61o76c1h2bs)
[Donate $10](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zn5skti09p519jlv64hjgb5vn7siim3b295eg1q8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chj61o76c1h2bs)

[Donate $35](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zrhk4f6jl60tl3s7sc08f5s4d9qgd6l3onbqfro0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chj61o76c1h2bs)

[Donate $50](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zqnn646jsgghvifht72e0ug24k61dtc373hv7730_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chj61o76c1h2bs)

[Donate $100](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zd18k2c527kfd5n00ll1441sab6iqdfl44ed21ao_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chj61o76c1h2bs)

[Donate $250](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z3gd3ncuiu7bfkhv4n37olvpqrhpcg2fmei1t5qo_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chj61o76c1h2bs)

[Donate Any Amount](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zhe11h2fbgj93pnmqqagqukrmb64vr7eh3qjj5f0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chj61o76c1h2bs)
Stories shape our souls, which is why it is CRUCIAL that America's kids have access to wholesome, age-appropriate, and uplifting stories that let their imaginations soar while being rooted in truth.

Thank you in advance for your support!

For the love of reading,

Riley Gaines

P.S. I would consider it a personal favor if you choose to support SkyTree Book Fairs in their important work of providing wholesome and inspiring books to kids across the country. [Please send a donation of $10, $50, $100, or even $250 today.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zjr8k6ei2ltgbantv4lih1isl7k0v8dgl2il5fe8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chj61o76c1h2bs)

I thought you'd enjoy this picture of kids enjoying their time at a SkyTree book fair.
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zalps28j4hfmsilmte11o01g4clc4159hpmnc6u0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chj61o76c1h2bs)

SkyTree Book Fairs is a 501(c)(3) not-for-profit organization. Copyright SkyTree Book Fairs, 2023.

From classics like Anne of Green Gables to new favorites like The Green Ember , every book in SkyTree's catalog is aimed at empowering children to dream big, build a strong moral character, and embrace the spirit of adventure and personal responsibility that makes America so great. Stories shape our souls, which is why it is CRUCIAL that America's kids have access to wholesome, age-appropriate, and uplifting stories that let their imaginations soar while being rooted in truth. Thank you in advance for your support! For the love of reading, Riley Gaines P.S. I would consider it a personal favor if you choose to support SkyTree Book Fairs in their important work of providing wholesome and inspiring books to kids across the country. I thought you'd enjoy this picture of kids enjoying their time at a SkyTree book fair. SkyTree Book Fairs is a 501(c)(3) not-for-profit organization. Copyright SkyTree Book Fairs, 2023. Bill Abbott, President and CEO of Great American Media, joins the Moms for America Podcast to discuss his company's vision for
family-friendly television. Bill worked for years to develop the Hallmark Channel into a network of wholesome, patriotic shows and
made-for-TV movies. As so much of corporate America has gone woke and abandoned the values of everyday
Americans, Hallmark abandoned its original vision. That's when Bill founded Great American Media to offer the classic,
family-friendly television and streaming that we love. Like, subscribe and share.

Making Sure the Shows Your Child Watches
Pass the Mom Test

When it comes to kids' animated shows, it's a jungle out there. Much of the mainstream television and streaming content for
children is steeped in gender ideology, foul language, violence, demonism, witchcraft, and other themes that aren't good for
anyone, let alone our nation’s most vulnerable population. Thankfully, we also live in a time when many are stepping up to create
new shows with positive themes to counteract the wave of wokeness in Hollywood. We're sharing some shocking content from popular
kids' shows and some new alternatives streaming from talented, positive and patriotic creatives – and letting you in on where you
can find these better options.

clean_body: The MomView Season 2 episodes will be live Mondays at 10 ET! We're also sharing family-friendly media and new streaming services your family might love. If you are having trouble viewing this email click here to view in your browser. [] [] [] April 8, 2025 • Newsletter The Mom View [] [] Empowering Conversations Start Here! From parenting to public policy, The MomView delves into the topics that shape our culture, impact our nation and influence our homes, because every issue is a mom issue. Catch our new Season 2 Episodes Mondays at 10am ET View on YouTube [] View on Rumble [] Restoring Family-Friendly TV Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] [] Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] Bill Abbott, President and CEO of Great American Media, joins the Moms for America Podcast to discuss his company's vision for family-friendly television. Bill worked for years to develop the Hallmark Channel into a network of wholesome, patriotic shows and made-for-TV movies. As so much of corporate America has gone woke and abandoned the values of everyday Americans, Hallmark abandoned its original vision. That's when Bill founded Great American Media to offer the classic, family-friendly television and streaming that we love. Like, subscribe and share. View the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast on Spotify [] VISIT GREAT AMERICAN FAMILY TO SEE ALL THEIR INCREDIBLE SHOWS! LEARN MORE [] Moms for America Weekly Blog [] [] Making Sure the Shows Your Child Watches Pass the Mom Test When it comes to kids' animated shows, it's a jungle out there. Much of the mainstream television and streaming content for children is steeped in gender ideology, foul language, violence, demonism, witchcraft, and other themes that aren't good for anyone, let alone our nation’s most vulnerable population. Thankfully, we also live in a time when many are stepping up to create new shows with positive themes to counteract the wave of wokeness in Hollywood. We're sharing some shocking content from popular kids' shows and some new alternatives streaming from talented, positive and patriotic creatives – and letting you in on where you can find these better options. Read the Blog [] [] In Truth & Liberty, Kimberly Fletcher Founder and President Moms for America® [] [] A HEALTHIER 2025 WITH MOMS FOR AMERICA AND CARDIO MIRACLE At Moms for America, we prioritize sharing resources that promote health and wellness among our community. One such product is Cardio Miracle. We encourage you to explore Cardio Miracle and determine if it's the right fit for your health journey. Many moms, including our founder Kimberly Fletcher, have incorporated it into their daily routines and appreciate its commitment to quality and transparency. Watch the video below, and for more information and to see if Cardio Miracle aligns with your wellness goals, visit their website. | | The end game is finally coming in this case in North Carolina, Team,**** and we're heading for election theft in plain sight. **The backstory:** The**** North Carolina state supreme court stepped in to stop the certification of the election for a justice on their court, which is a huge breach of power and a clearly partisan action in a state where judges are affiliated with political parties. Back on Election Day 2024, incumbent Justice Allison Riggs (D) was reelected by a slim margin of a few hundred votes. Her disgruntled opponent, GOP Judge Jefferson Griffin, sued for and received two separate recounts -- _both of which increased Riggs' lead._ Now, a panel of the North Carolina Court of Appeals ruled in Griffin’s favor, deciding that 60,000 ballots must be recounted and verified. The ruling states that all 60,000 people must be notified and given 15 business days to provide proof of identity, or their vote will be thrown out. **This ruling will disenfranchise tens of thousands of people without showing any proof that any of these voters are actually ineligible.** “ _The Court of Appeals’ ruling is destined to disenfranchise thousands of North Carolinians, denying them due process and equal protection under North Carolina law_ ” Justice Riggs’ lawyers wrote in their appeal to the state supreme court -- the same body she should already be back serving on. [**We must keep the pressure up to stop this post-election interference with legitimate votes. Please pitch in $25 or whatever you can right now to help us spread the word and make these ballots count in North Carolina and stop suppression across the country >>**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105427482/538303188/1723810624?am=25.00&contactdata=aIi7wRNZaXk1BZFELUV803B2vjEqFRQ+NVlZoI+3OTNrm3KpqWPOf45p9yOtz23E25jhaNCiDWjhpBA1d00+ISPfdFl46sAd7pNlJq6GXqs=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5MjE1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA4N2EwMDhhLThhMTQtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TAX0R2vuRoQK3QTqFQVPWUuGSXcY4Z_MwMLIrk5vz3o=&emci=c2bbb5ee-8214-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=087a008a-8a14-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=33603084)

| | Now listen, Justice Riggs could still win on appeal. However, without her on the court, who will recuse herself, Griffin's fellow Republicans hold a 5-1 majority on the court in a case that is clearly about partisan election interference. What's really at stake here? **If Judge Griffin's campaign thought the registration process was legally flawed, he should have challenged it *before* the election.** This is a blatant attempt to change the rules just because he lost. And his partisan cronies are going along with it to protect their power and their majority on the court. Opponents of voting rights are blatantly trying to steal this election in plain sight. And you can bet they're going to try to do it in the 49 other states once they get away with it here. [**We've got to make sure everyone knows about this egregious intervention before these votes are stolen and the voices of the people are silenced. clean_body: Popular Information: The five-month campaign to steal a North Carolina Supreme Court seat| | | | | | | The end game is finally coming in this case in North Carolina, Team,** and we're heading for election theft in plain sight. The backstory: The North Carolina state supreme court stepped in to stop the certification of the election for a justice on their court, which is a huge breach of power and a clearly partisan action in a state where judges are affiliated with political parties. Back on Election Day 2024, incumbent Justice Allison Riggs (D) was reelected by a slim margin of a few hundred votes. Her disgruntled opponent, GOP Judge Jefferson Griffin, sued for and received two separate recounts -- both of which increased Riggs' lead. Now, a panel of the North Carolina Court of Appeals ruled in Griffin’s favor, deciding that 60,000 ballots must be recounted and verified. The ruling states that all 60,000 people must be notified and given 15 business days to provide proof of identity, or their vote will be thrown out. This ruling will disenfranchise tens of thousands of people without showing any proof that any of these voters are actually ineligible. “ The Court of Appeals’ ruling is destined to disenfranchise thousands of North Carolinians, denying them due process and equal protection under North Carolina law ” Justice Riggs’ lawyers wrote in their appeal to the state supreme court -- the same body she should already be back serving on. If you've saved your payment information with FastAction, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Now listen, Justice Riggs could still win on appeal. However, without her on the court, who will recuse herself, Griffin's fellow Republicans hold a 5-1 majority on the court in a case that is clearly about partisan election interference. What's really at stake here? If Judge Griffin's campaign thought the registration process was legally flawed, he should have challenged it before the election.** This is a blatant attempt to change the rules just because he lost. And his partisan cronies are going along with it to protect their power and their majority on the court. Opponents of voting rights are blatantly trying to steal this election in plain sight. And you can bet they're going to try to do it in the 49 other states once they get away with it here. | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. body:

| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0c6f5940-ba2a-4d3d-b4d0-22c51b212951/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| Peter, MAGA weirdo Elon Musk dropped tens of millions of dollars trying to buy a Republican majority on the Wisconsin Supreme Court – but he failed. | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb6ef6d74-5492-437c-ac9e-3fbbd2d347f8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Team Kaptur
subject: Spring forward, fight back!
body:
Friend, Spring is here. This year, we've turned our clocks forward, and we're fighting back.

| |
---
Friend, Every year, the arrival of springtime means turning our clocks forward. But this year, Republicans in Washington are determined to take our nation backward. _They're doing everything in their power to roll back our freedoms, slash the programs that Americans rely on, and undermine hard-won protections for workers, families, and the environment._ President Trump has spoken approvingly of taking us back to the Gilded Age, when billionaires raked in record profits by exploiting ordinary people. _**That's why this Spring, we're not just turning our clocks forward. We're also _fighting back._**_ Marcy is leading that fight in Congress, going to work everyday for good-paying jobs, Social Security, affordable healthcare, and transformative investments in our communities. **[Will you stand with us, friend?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105429545/538309130/1039792322?amp;refcode=250406_team_spring_l1&ms=250406_team_spring&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTM1OWNlNy04ZDE0LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xcXIyzBM1TzIbnVO9Uo2yRbseP3YiZrQi-qrh8YWSNQ=)** | [Give $25 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105429552/538309137/1039792322?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=250406_team_spring&ms=250406_team_spring&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTM1OWNlNy04ZDE0LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xcXIyzBM1TzIbnVO9Uo2yRbseP3YiZrQi-qrh8YWSNQ=) | [Give $50 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105429553/538309138/1039792322?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=250406_team_spring&ms=250406_team_spring&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTM1OWNlNy04ZDE0LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xcXIyzBM1TzIbnVO9Uo2yRbseP3YiZrQi-qrh8YWSNQ=)

### About Marcy Kaptur
Marcy Kaptur is a fighter for high-wage jobs, growing a workforce to meet the needs of the 21st century, and protecting our region’s most vital natural resource, the Great Lakes. She’s worked with both parties to secure investments in our communities and has been a true friend of veterans, seniors, first responders and working people. Thank you so much. — Team Kaptur | | | ---|---|--- About Marcy Kaptur Marcy Kaptur is a fighter for high-wage jobs, growing a workforce to meet the needs of the 21st century, and protecting our region’s most vital natural resource, the Great Lakes. She’s worked with both parties to secure investments in our communities and has been a true friend of veterans, seniors, first responders and working people. She’s a voice for us all in the People’s House. | = | = ---|--- Follow Marcy | | ---|--- Checks may also be mailed to: Kaptur for Congress - PO Box 899, Toledo, OH 43697 Paid for by Kaptur for Congress Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . name: Lacy Lunsford
subject: My husband is being railroaded by woke, anti-cop activists
body:
My husband saved the life of his fellow officer and now a Soros-prosecutor is making him a political victim.

| | |
---
| |
---
Dear Friend,My husband saved the life of his fellow officer and now a Soros-prosecutor is making him a political victim.That's my husband, Officer Brad Lunsford, with our boys in this photo.
---
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zetuterk43bgf9jffereupp4h0a8mtlabeo4o240_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chgm0or2c5h2bs)
---
Right now the New Mexico anti-cop Attorney General and a BLM activist are doing everything they can to put him behind bars. And since I'm told you're a patriotic American who respects our men and women in blue, **[**I'm swallowing my pride and asking you for help to save my husband.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zh364ukht4der2qgjpoirotgdvrfv9vh1vovj0u8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chgm0or2c5h2bs)** Our nightmare started the day my husband responded to a shoplifting call. When Brad and his partner, Officer Arbogast, identified the armed suspect they moved to detain him.But the suspect became violent and tried to disarm his partner, eventually grabbing a taser and pointing it at the prone officer.Brad's training immediately kicked in. He drew his pistol and fired, killing the suspect, and saving his partner's life. Maybe even his own. My husband did nothing wrong. After the episode, his department's internal investigation cleared him.AND the local district attorney was finishing the investigation to do so as well, but the Attorney General of New Mexico -- a woke, anti-cop politician funded by George Soros -- took matters into his own hands and charged Brad with Voluntary Manslaughter. Friend, I was so scared and didn't know who to turn to......the fight for my husband's freedom was going to be costly and I knew we didn't have the necessary funds.But as an answer to our prayers, we got a call from Jason Johnson, President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). Not only did LELDF decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, but when he was WRONGFULLY CONVICTED by a jury and sent to prison, they committed to doing whatever it takes to clear Brad's good name.But they can't do it alone. **[**That's why I'm humbly asking you to help LELDF fight for Brad by making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, or any amount.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zk4aakfnost92cplujgnk57hj3732sr72q0s3j6g_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chgm0or2c5h2bs)** And thanks to LELDF and Brad's attorney we've discovered the outrageous jury misconduct that occurred behind the scenes.The court not only made a mistake by dismissing and replacing two jurors without reason...But a Black Lives Matter activist neglected to disclose her anti-police bias to get on the jury. Worse, she became the jury foreperson, leading the deliberations and steering the case against Brad. My husband was denied a fair trial and spent 5 weeks in jail before the judge even heard his motion for a new trial!And we're still waiting to learn if there will be a new trial or if we'll have to file an appeal.I'd be lying if I said this entire situation wasn't overwhelming and terrifying. But I know it could be a whole lot worse. I've been to a few police officer funerals. My husband is alive. We can fight this and win.But the battle isn't finished and with six years in prison and no paycheck still hanging over Brad's head...I pray we raise the funds necessary to fight this to the end. **[**Will you please help LELDF fight for my husband -- for my family -- by donating $35, $50, $100 or more today?**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zrou47ke0vuthm108earud2nrs9ar2569ac4q44g_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chgm0or2c5h2bs)** Your generous gift will be put to immediate use helping Brad and other wrongly accused officers win in court and move on with their lives as free men.If you're able to make a larger contribution, that would be an incredible blessing to our family and so many others.No matter what, please pray for Brad and our family. Our boys are little, and they need their dad. I need my husband.Thank you in advance for your support.
---
Gratefully,
---
Lacy Lunsford
---
P.S. After Brad left the Army and became a cop, he made me one promise -- he would always come home to me. To think he may spend the next six years in prison because he followed his training so that his partner could make it home to his newborn baby. **[**Please help the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund fight for my husband and other wrongly accused officers by making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100 or more today.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zph45epv6htjg9l03rtkhsst8imtht97hhmkdm3o_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chgm0or2c5h2bs)** Thank you!
---
|
---
_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. And remember –Blue Lives Matter!_ © Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z7l5l46gmpg45ap8i2mh6ehe4tg9g7see3on3fq0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chgm0or2c5h2bs)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303
---
---

Pop Acta Media | American Briefing
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z1ur0flrg52iit89pnlp1va5rthfpqop9c6i9i8o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkgqracjkmoq37chieiqj6d5jmspqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4c5h66o30sdh238h1e8he4937c5gm8ob0cdh62oh5u)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2za3hl00kid06qb7gcl5e7br90rtndrjcg8s4f9o8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chgm0or2c5h2bs)_

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z3dtbfm8vrqvc68qnnmihia5gdjoaca9rvlu92so_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chgm0or2c5h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: California Dems
subject: Our Senators helped Cory Booker
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=header&amount=5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=header&amount=5]
Dear friends — did you see this?
Last week, Senators Alex Padilla and Adam Schiff joined Senator Cory Booker in holding the Senate floor to stand up to President Trump, Elon Musk, and this chaotic administration.
As you may know, Senator Booker broke the record for time holding the Senate floor with his over 24-hour marathon speech. This demonstration gave voice to the millions of Americans being harmed and ignored by the Trump Administration.
Our own Senators Alex Padilla and Adam Schiff joined the filibuster-like event, both asking questions during the speech that allowed Senator Booker to take breaks.
Senator Padilla praised Booker for his passion and empathy and highlighted the consequences of the President’s reckless actions for healthcare, disaster aid, and the climate crisis.
Senator Schiff described how the Trump administration's actions are an attack on American democracy.
This is what it means to be California Strong. Standing up to bullies and standing with your friends.
Will you rush a donation right now to help us fund and support our California Strong leaders like Senator Padilla and Schiff? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-april25?refcode=&amount=]
CHIP IN $ >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-april25?&refcode=&amount=]Here’s a little bit of what Adam Schiff said on the Senate floor:
“We look at institution after institution, and we see the guardrails of our democracy coming down. We see an assault on the rule of law unlike anything we have seen in modern history, maybe in the entire history of the United States of America, and why? Because they can. Because they feel that they can.”
And here’s a little bit of what Senator Padilla said:
“I know I’m angry with so much of what’s going on, and the American people have every right to be angry with what’s going on because none of what we’re seeing come out of the Trump White House is normal. But every day, this approach of ‘flooding the zone’ with more and more extreme actions runs the risk of making people grow numb to these attacks. And we certainly can’t surrender to the feeling of just being overwhelmed by their tactics. ”
We couldn’t agree more. We can’t let ourselves be overwhelmed. We can’t surrender.
That’s why the California Democratic Party has been hitting the pavement this past month. We arranged massive phone bank campaigns to hold Republicans accountable for trying to gut Medicaid to pay for billionaire tax cuts.
We even held a town hall in one of the most vulnerable GOP-held swing seats in the state.
But we’ve heard this call to action from Senator Booker and our own Senators Padilla and Schiff. We resolve to do even more.
Will you help? Please pitch in $ or $ to fund our organizing campaigns up and down the state. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-april25?refcode=&amount=]
CHIP IN $ >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-april25?&refcode=&amount=]
CHIP IN $ >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-april25?&refcode=&amount=]
CHIP IN $ >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-april25?&refcode=&amount=]
CHIP IN $ >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-april25?&refcode=&amount=]
CHIP IN $ >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-april25?&refcode=&amount=]Thank you!
- CADEM

DONATE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=&amount=20.24]
Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action.
If this email was forwarded to you, please sign up for our email list here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/zWMh-KAhmUiJYxMzOxKADQ2]
We rely on email to communicate with supporters like you and conduct the business of the California Democratic Party, but if you wish to receive only our most important emails, let us know here to sign up for fewer emails. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/60txJAHUg0OznGGaWVwO_A2]
And if you no longer wish to receive emails from the California Democratic Party, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.cadem.org/p/BZcF64X0Zkie6fv4FEU9PQ2?unsubscribedata=Ih7%2BFFB1itADPwUozt%2FF6CQoLw4P2kdOlNT8FXPhzx6PZ0USC2AphZ3%2B6USW9l6OWmx6De74q6Yi6JMxGdSbxTH7DYHWhRLYnpSMWvFaWHpmF48RAGh9JT6shqYQKjtyPZIb%2Fxzj2MthBpUBKUpFHmkBz9BFDDFrVZPOYPzhb71nENuok7STDo%2FW7pu3LQ5aafkb4M5081oHvHe5pCYgsz4HDRMtaMzwkbUrcL748y7ke6W%2F%2FVl1v6YXIjJ4YhwZHeH1gqp3lkNjuE287Dvr%2BdK4O0opMKJtOOY9bN6gt%2Fe17tG%2BC5sdMctHpBnBP%2BA1kQSnFvQLkclzDJgEr3A1IEwqgDHmnApx2QzV6UlNUysbG6vT9qAjGjep4DwRRNlh2bPwAaDBj8jxrUXL41RXFDAvSN8U0BefoLAtJB8bTBM%3D .

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: BIG: Jim Jordan just endorsed our campaign
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
body:
I’ve got to say – this one really means a lot.

[](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)I've got some exciting news to share:
Congressman Jim Jordan just officially endorsed my campaign for Governor of Ohio._" Vivek Ramaswamy is as smart and hard-working as they come. He is a successful entrepreneur with a clear vision for Ohio's future that includes lower taxes, more choice in education, better jobs and stronger families. **I 'm confident he'll make our state proud and I am happy to endorse him for governor.**" _
\- Congressman Jim Jordan (OH-4)I've got to say - this one hit home for me. Congressman Jordan is one of the fiercest, most principled conservatives in Congress. He's a relentless warrior who takes on the radical Left without flinching, defends our Constitution with everything he's got, and puts Ohio first - always.
I'm honored to have his support - and now I'm hoping you'll stand with me too:
[](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.-ANUrwVXCUYw)[](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)[](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)[](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)[Will you add your name as an official endorser of our campaign?](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.) It may seem small, but it's one of the most powerful ways we show the strength of this grassroots movement.[ADD YOUR ENDORSEMENT
](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)When we win together, I will be a partner working alongside him and President Trump to usher in the Golden Age for America!
Thanks for having my back. Means the world.
\- Vivek| | |
---
| | PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO

350 E 1st Ave
Ste 100
Columbus, OH 43201

hotline for voters in all states to report suspicions of election and
voter fraud. Judicial Watch has cleaned up voter rolls across the
country. In February 2022, it settled a voter roll clean-up lawsuit
against North Carolina after the state removed over 430,000 inactive
registrations from its voter rolls.
