clean_body: The 60,000 contested ballots in the North Carolina state Supreme Court race should be recounted and verified, according to a ruling Friday from a panel of the state appeals court. [NEWSLINK] BREAKING NEWS... [image] [] RIGHTS AND FREEDOMS IN PERIL "When it comes to fighting for the American people’s ‘right to know,’ no one holds a candle to Tom Fitton and his team at Judicial Watch" - SEAN HANNITY Tom Fitton returns with an exhaustive investigation into the progressive movement’s efforts to dismantle the venerable institutions of American rights and freedoms. Order Tom Fitton's Must-Read Today! [] [600x300] [] State appeals court rules contested North Carolina ballots must be verified [] Source: The Hill [] The 60,000 contested ballots in the North Carolina state Supreme Court race should be recounted and verified, according to a ruling Friday from a panel of the state appeals court. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] Background Notes from Judicial Watch [180x150x1] [] November 19, 2024 Judicial Watch Files Supreme Court Petition on Post-Election Day Ballot Counting [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Judicial Watch a petitioni to the US Supreme Court challenging the decision by a U.S. Court of Appeals in the case filed to prevent Illinois election officials from extending Election Day for 14 days beyond the date established by federal law [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x2] [] April 03, 2025 Over Five Million Names Cleaned from Voter Rolls Nationwide [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Judicial Watch analysis and use of voter registration lists has led to legal actions under the National Voter Registration Act that have resulted in the removal of five million names from voter rolls in nearly a dozen states and localities over the last several years. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x3] [] October 22, 2024 Judicial Watch Stands Up National Election Fraud Report Line For Voters to Report Voting Issues [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Judicial Watch announced today that it will run an Internet hotline for voters in all states to report suspicions of election and voter fraud. Judicial Watch has cleaned up voter rolls across the country. In February 2022, it settled a voter roll clean-up lawsuit against North Carolina after the state removed over 430,000 inactive registrations from its voter rolls. name: Adam Schiff
subject: What I know about Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi, Adam Schiff here. It's my honor to serve as California's newest Senator, and now, one of your DSCC Vice Chairs fighting to flip the Senate blue.

**[In a moment, I'm going to tell you why we _must_ take back the Senate majority and hold Trump accountable. But first, I need to ask: Will you donate $5 to the DSCC to make it happen?](https://go.dscc.org/go/21369?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250408-AdamSchiff-VCSchiffTrumpFR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250408-AdamSchiff-VCSchiffTrumpFR-Pros-sl1&akid=19964%2E9716520%2En__ozN)**

Let me make this as plain as possible: **Donald Trump isn't fit to lead.**

As an impeachment manager during Trump's first term, **_I warned the Senate_** about who Donald Trump was -- and what he would do if Republicans refused to hold him to account.

**And how did most Republicans react? With shrugs and -- more importantly -- votes to let Donald Trump walk away scot-free.**

Now, we're living the consequences of that decision. Many of those same Republicans are still here, nodding approvingly as Donald Trump pardons violent insurrectionists, dismantles vital government programs like USAID, and threatens birthright citizenship.

**And that is exactly why we _must_ take back the Senate: Republicans will _never_ punish Trump for his actions, so if _anyone_ is going to stop this madness and hold Donald Trump accountable, the responsibility falls to us.**

**[DSCC leadership, myself included, is counting on this team to raise $50,000 by midnight to keep our plan to flip the Senate on track._Nothing_ could be more important in these early days. So let me personally ask you -- will you rush $5 or more immediately to help fight for a Democratic majority? >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/21369?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250408-AdamSchiff-VCSchiffTrumpFR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250408-AdamSchiff-VCSchiffTrumpFR-Pros-sl1&akid=19964%2E9716520%2En__ozN)**

We need your help to fight for the Senate. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

clean_body: | | | Hi, Adam Schiff here. It's my honor to serve as California's newest Senator, and now, one of your DSCC Vice Chairs fighting to flip the Senate blue. Let me make this as plain as possible: Donald Trump isn't fit to lead. As an impeachment manager during Trump's first term, I warned the Senate about who Donald Trump was -- and what he would do if Republicans refused to hold him to account. And how did most Republicans react? With shrugs and -- more importantly -- votes to let Donald Trump walk away scot-free. Now, we're living the consequences of that decision. Many of those same Republicans are still here, nodding approvingly as Donald Trump pardons violent insurrectionists, dismantles vital government programs like USAID, and threatens birthright citizenship. And that is exactly why we must take back the Senate: Republicans will never punish Trump for his actions, so if anyone is going to stop this madness and hold Donald Trump accountable, the responsibility falls to us. We need your help to fight for the Senate. subject: Let's be clear: These funding cuts would devastate St. Louis families.

body:
**“Billions at stake in Missouri and Kansas if proposed Medicaid, SNAP cuts move forward”** **_-The Beacon_**

_“The[se] cuts could lead to nearly 30,000 jobs lost across Missouri and Kansas health care systems and food suppliers, a new study found.”_

[**Rush a donation of $5, or anything you can, to help Wesley fight back against these reckless cuts in Congress >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105431091/538314165/552493051?refcode=em25_250407_medfr_fndd_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250407_medfr_fndd_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=e1a88d6d-9014-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzODkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTFhODhkNmQtOTAxNC1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=AFNaM1Rdv9h7poen7q5j5He0Pb3h-hEH4jeMqgJpqsI=) Congress is pushing dangerous cuts to Medicaid and SNAP that would devastate Missouri families. If passed, these cuts could take away $2 billion in federal funding over the next decade — **hitting our state’s economy with a $2.4 billion loss in 2026 alone.**

Cutting funding from programs like Medicaid and SNAP will not only devastate families across Missouri, it'll put hard-working people out of a job.

Hospitals in St. Louis and across our state will lose critical resources, and rural hospitals — _which are already struggling to keep their doors open_ — will be pushed even closer to shutting down due to being underfunded and understaffed.

Medicaid and SNAP aren’t luxuries, _**they’re lifelines.**_ These programs help working families, seniors, and children access basic healthcare and affordable food.

But out-of-touch politicians are willing to rip them away just to score political points. Let’s be clear: If our leaders won’t stand up for us, it’s time to elect new ones. Wesley ran for Congress to fight for Missouri families — not corporate interests or partisan games. [**St. Louisans deserve leaders who will stand up for them (not against them) in Congress. Chip in now to help Wesley fight for a future where no one is left behind.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105431092/538314166/552493051?refcode=em25_250407_medfr_fndd_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250407_medfr_fndd_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=e1a88d6d-9014-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzODkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTFhODhkNmQtOTAxNC1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=AFNaM1Rdv9h7poen7q5j5He0Pb3h-hEH4jeMqgJpqsI=) name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: Script Flipped on Fame
body:
Thom Nickels | B+L Featured Columnist | | | |
---
| | |
---
| **__Thom Nickels_ : Andy Warhol — the contrarian artist who redefined fame_**
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=02dca95884&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
* * *
---
| ''It’s been almost 40 years since Andy Warhol died in Manhattan’s New York Hospital on February 22, 1987. Since his death, Warhol’s star has not faded. His works still sell for unprecedented prices: In 2002, 'Green Car Crash' sold for 71 million; last year '200 One Dollar Bills' was sold at Sotheby’s for a cool 43.7 million, and the artist’s 1963 work, 'Eight Elvises,' netted 100 million.

Ask anyone on the street today what they think of when they hear the name Andy Warhol, and you’re likely to get different responses..."
---
| [Read More](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=a9e6477ee2&e=b7b3eddce2 "Read More")
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=6f02fe04de&e=b7b3eddce2)

|

## About Thom Nickels:
---
| | [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=53ec0d7c7a&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
Thom Nickels is a Philadelphia-based journalist/columnist and the 2005 recipient of the AIA Lewis Mumford Award for Architectural Journalism. He writes for City Journal, New York, and Frontpage Magazine. Thom Nickels is the author of fifteen books, including “[Literary Philadelphia](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=97bdce172a&e=b7b3eddce2)” and ”[From Mother Divine to the Corner Swami: Religious Cults in Philadelphia](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=c1f3ec2a08&e=b7b3eddce2).” His latest is “[Death in Philadelphia: The Murder of Kimberly Ernest](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=695c03f193&e=b7b3eddce2).” He is currently at work on “The Last Romanian Princess and Her World Legacy,” about the life of Princess Ileana of Romania.

Thom Nickels is the author of fifteen books, including “” and ”.” His latest is “.” He is currently at work on “The Last Romanian Princess and Her World Legacy,” about the life of Princess Ileana of Romania. | | | We at are proud to provide readers across our region, state and beyond, with insightful, original investigative reports, and thought-leadership, on education, crime, business and government. Read more columns on — updated daily and as news breaks. | "Support Broad + Liberty" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | www.broadandliberty.com | | Copyright © 2025 Broad + Liberty, All rights reserved._ You're getting Broad + Liberty updates due to your interest in our site – and local stories for free thinkers in the Philly region and beyond. body:

Dear Reader,

The use of AI is rocketing higher.

As Elon Musk points out, the amount of AI coming online is increasing by a factor of 10 every six months.

That's enormous.

It's sent stocks like Nvidia soaring... up over 4,000% in the last five years.

And 500,000 people have become AI millionaires.

But Musk is warning President Trump that there AI has a fatal flaw. (https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xuehkbIteknop5I0ITm98xdh6g&s=KEFFKHLIDMOGJHPE

name: Lacy Lunsford
subject: My husband is being railroaded by woke, anti-cop activists
body:
My husband saved the life of his fellow officer and now a Soros-prosecutor is making him a political victim.

| | |
---
| |
---
Dear Friend,My husband saved the life of his fellow officer and now a Soros-prosecutor is making him a political victim.That's my husband, Officer Brad Lunsford, with our boys in this photo.
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgmt4jq8ngm80d2eb89vugidge8plksihu78phso_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chgm4ob4chh2bs)
---
Right now the New Mexico anti-cop Attorney General and a BLM activist are doing everything they can to put him behind bars. And since I'm told you're a patriotic American who respects our men and women in blue, **[**I'm swallowing my pride and asking you for help to save my husband.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zu22t2fr3hqpq57vt5u7d699ktg66s3q78ac4p6o_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chgm4ob4chh2bs)** Our nightmare started the day my husband responded to a shoplifting call. When Brad and his partner, Officer Arbogast, identified the armed suspect they moved to detain him.But the suspect became violent and tried to disarm his partner, eventually grabbing a taser and pointing it at the prone officer.Brad's training immediately kicked in. He drew his pistol and fired, killing the suspect, and saving his partner's life. Maybe even his own. My husband did nothing wrong. After the episode, his department's internal investigation cleared him.AND the local district attorney was finishing the investigation to do so as well, but the Attorney General of New Mexico -- a woke, anti-cop politician funded by George Soros -- took matters into his own hands and charged Brad with Voluntary Manslaughter. Friend, I was so scared and didn't know who to turn to......the fight for my husband's freedom was going to be costly and I knew we didn't have the necessary funds.But as an answer to our prayers, we got a call from Jason Johnson, President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). Not only did LELDF decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, but when he was WRONGFULLY CONVICTED by a jury and sent to prison, they committed to doing whatever it takes to clear Brad's good name.But they can't do it alone. **[**That's why I'm humbly asking you to help LELDF fight for Brad by making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, or any amount.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmhu10uoaalkn0hhvbamcgl8ob4s6gav6qpeplqo_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chgm4ob4chh2bs)** And thanks to LELDF and Brad's attorney we've discovered the outrageous jury misconduct that occurred behind the scenes.The court not only made a mistake by dismissing and replacing two jurors without reason...But a Black Lives Matter activist neglected to disclose her anti-police bias to get on the jury. Worse, she became the jury foreperson, leading the deliberations and steering the case against Brad. My husband was denied a fair trial and spent 5 weeks in jail before the judge even heard his motion for a new trial!And we're still waiting to learn if there will be a new trial or if we'll have to file an appeal.I'd be lying if I said this entire situation wasn't overwhelming and terrifying. But I know it could be a whole lot worse. I've been to a few police officer funerals. My husband is alive. We can fight this and win.But the battle isn't finished and with six years in prison and no paycheck still hanging over Brad's head...I pray we raise the funds necessary to fight this to the end. **[**Will you please help LELDF fight for my husband -- for my family -- by donating $35, $50, $100 or more today?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztqod44ha75v6e140egsrt0ne33i15ff2hf7bnq0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chgm4ob4chh2bs)** Your generous gift will be put to immediate use helping Brad and other wrongly accused officers win in court and move on with their lives as free men.If you're able to make a larger contribution, that would be an incredible blessing to our family and so many others.No matter what, please pray for Brad and our family. Our boys are little, and they need their dad. I need my husband.Thank you in advance for your support.
---
Gratefully,
---
Lacy Lunsford
---
P.S. After Brad left the Army and became a cop, he made me one promise -- he would always come home to me. To think he may spend the next six years in prison because he followed his training so that his partner could make it home to his newborn baby. **[**Please help the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund fight for my husband and other wrongly accused officers by making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100 or more today.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmgria6hbdj2s5f20hsbg977n4a65un8uav0ltf0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chgm4ob4chh2bs)** Thank you!
---
|
---
_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. And remember –Blue Lives Matter!_ © Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zkdt9hdt307lji5dov09o8pl5qr29g7b7gspg6o8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chgm4ob4chh2bs)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303
---
---

Pop Acta Media | ICYMI News
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgpmeto3stiir10cvgf8f0n3g9utd95f47l0aeeg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkir39tdkmeqjetjjkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8ob2cdi68oj246h22sh2s8i6eob1chgm4ob4chh2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zf080ck0jgind0o91l9e87qph1u1vpdngfh7jmp0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chgm4ob4chh2bs)_

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zm846o24j4kuch3tdebe95lvn389b2nakjvrqal0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chgm4ob4chh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

subject: Liberal SHADOW CABINET?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
The Democrats just showed their cards – and what they have in store just sent shivers down our spine...

| |
---
| | |
**LIBERAL SHADOW CABINET: Never before in history has an opposition force tried to undermine a sitting President like this.**

The Democrats just showed their cards - and what they have in store just sent shivers down our spine...

First, a top House Democrat went on CNN to pitch a "Shadow Cabinet." Then, failed VP candidate Tim Walz called for a Democrat propaganda arm to attack President Trump. Now, the Chair of the Democrat Party is launching a "People's Cabinet" to peddle Fake News stories undermining the Trump Administration.

**[This is a full-blown political ambush against President Trump, our Conservative Congress, and the 73+ MILLION Americans who voted for Republicans. And it's being cooked up behind closed doors by the same people who failed to win over the American People.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z0l9u5bad7j3ea2a6ubridcanhnq4mu7eopt6mdo_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chgm4ob0cjh2bs "This is a full-blown political ambush against President Trump, our Conservative Congress, and the 73+ MILLION Americans who voted for Republicans. And it’s being cooked up behind closed doors by the same people who failed to win over the American People. ")**
---
| | | [DEFEAT THE DEMOCRAT MACHINE >>](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zmf8ucrg59vtnvcvmrm8d5p6ufghmfp5imojqrgg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chgm4ob0cjh2bs "DEFEAT THE DEMOCRAT MACHINE")
---
**Democrats are desperate for revenge after they were HUMILIATED at the ballot box.**

So now? They are determined to drag our movement through the mud, discredit our victories, and install their failed ideology by force.

**[We have a plan to stop them- but it requires 100% participation from everybody receiving this email.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zin03unc0ugsgidmo2i6h7m1hoak96pbsqea663g_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chgm4ob0cjh2bs "We have a plan to TAKE DOWN this New Liberal Scheme – but it requires 100% participation from everybody receiving this email.")** We can't do it alone. We NEED to fortify our war chest NOW. Because if we wait until the Midterms, it'll be too late. Democrats could take the House and bring President Trump's agenda to a SCREECHING HALT.

The consequences would be catastrophic... You've had our backs from the beginning. You never gave up when the going got tough.

**So we 're calling on you once again to step up when it matters most.**

If we can band together _ONE MILLION Loyal Patriots_ before the end of the week, we'll have the manpower to defeat the Democrat Machine and make them regret ever forming this sham Shadow Cabinet.
---
| | | [DEFEAT THE DEMOCRAT MACHINE >>](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zcfu7sv23d3i9dsru5iaagvv3ukd02b51mnb89ng_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chgm4ob0cjh2bs "DEFEAT THE DEMOCRAT MACHINE")

Thanks for all you do.

- House GOP

_A personal note from Majority Leader Steve Scalise:_

I'm humbled to announce that I am your new House Majority Leader. My first order of business is checking in with our best supporters, so I just launched my new** MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY** for that specific reason.

Steve Scalise
_House Majority Leader_

body:
We’re committed to putting in the work to win every last election. Majorities are built one seat at a time, and coming together to win races like this one is key to breaking Republicans’ tight grip on the states. | | |
---
| |
---|---
This fall, the Virginia House and governorship are up for grabs. **If Democrats win** , Virginians will have a slate of strong Democratic voices in the legislature – working hard to expand economic opportunity for working families, invest in public education, and protect our democracy. **If Democrats lose** , Republicans will gain ground and have the power to pass legislation that harms LGBTQ+ youth, pushes Trump’s MAGA agenda, and threatens our fundamental freedoms. Virginia’s elections are a bellwether. Defending our majority in the Virginia House this fall is vital to countering the MAGA movement, but we can’t win without early investments from this grassroots team. clean_body: We’re committed to putting in the work to win every last election. Majorities are built one seat at a time, and coming together to win races like this one is key to breaking Republicans’ tight grip on the states. | | | | | ---|--- This fall, the Virginia House and governorship are up for grabs. If Democrats win , Virginians will have a slate of strong Democratic voices in the legislature – working hard to expand economic opportunity for working families, invest in public education, and protect our democracy. If Democrats lose , Republicans will gain ground and have the power to pass legislation that harms LGBTQ+ youth, pushes Trump’s MAGA agenda, and threatens our fundamental freedoms. Virginia’s elections are a bellwether. Republicans are busy crashing the economy, undermining our national security and ripping away healthcare.

name: Travis Tazelaar, VoteVets
subject: Trump’s Military Parade is Back
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
He wants to throw it as a 79th birthday present to himself, as if the four day weekends golfing while the economy burns down weren’t enough.
#
Hey Peter, it’s Travis from VoteVets.
You probably remember back in 2018 when Trump wanted to throw a massive Military parade in DC. You probably also remember that he ended up pulling it down — and VoteVets was a big reason why. We gave him and his administration hell for it, we got enough people speaking out, and we got him to cancel.
Well, bad news: The parade is back. He wants to throw it as a 79th birthday present to himself, as if the four day weekends golfing while the economy burns down weren’t enough.
A parade like this would degrade Military readiness at a time when we’ve alienated our allies and pissed off our adversaries. It would cost a ton of money, probably over $100 million, and is a logistical nightmare. Beyond all that — we’re a democracy. These parades are what dictators do to project strength and distract the public.
And that’s exactly what Trump’s doing here. The stock market is crashing, his administration is forcing through trillions in tax breaks for billionaires, and they’re gutting services millions of Veterans depend on. No better time for a massive, expensive, ridiculous parade.
**Not on our watch.** The odds are against us this time — Trump’s fired everybody who disagrees with him. He’s firing principled Military leaders, too. And his Department of Defense is full of “Yes Men.” But what we do still matters. If enough people come together and speak out against this, we might just stop it (again).
[**I’m asking you to join VoteVets today and speak with one voice: SAY NO TO TRUMP’S PARADE. It might seem like a small action, but when thousands of people join you it sends a big message.**](https://act.votevets.org/signup/250408_vv_em_no_parade?refcode=em250408-1-120&akid=34325%2E3013755%2EZltNmr)
| [NO PARADE](https://act.votevets.org/signup/250408_vv_em_no_parade?source=em250408-1-120&akid=34325%2E3013755%2EZltNmr)
---
Thanks a lot,
Travis Tazelaar
Political Director, VoteVets
USMC Veteran

Top White House officials utilized _disappearing messages on the Signal_ _app_ for classified national security discussions—an alarming violation of federal law that jeopardizes our safety. One of the participants was in Moscow, where Russian intelligence has been known to infiltrate Signal.
* The incompetent National Security Advisor Mike Waltz added an unauthorized reporter with no security clearance to the chat.

* Reckless Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth disclosed highly secretive military plans a few hours before they occurred, endangering our military.

* CIA Director John Ratcliffe and Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard LIED under oath to the House Intelligence Committee.

* Envoy to the Middle East, Steve Witkoff was meeting with Vladimir Putin in Russia during the chat.

This is a blatant betrayal that demands immediate investigation by Congress. We cannot allow such reckless actions to go unchecked! **Former intelligence officials are sounding the alarm - For the good of the country, these reckless participants must resign! clean_body: | | | The nation’s shame intensifies. Top White House officials utilized disappearing messages on the Signal app for classified national security discussions—an alarming violation of federal law that jeopardizes our safety. One of the participants was in Moscow, where Russian intelligence has been known to infiltrate Signal. The incompetent National Security Advisor Mike Waltz added an unauthorized reporter with no security clearance to the chat. Reckless Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth disclosed highly secretive military plans a few hours before they occurred, endangering our military. CIA Director John Ratcliffe and Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard LIED under oath to the House Intelligence Committee. Envoy to the Middle East, Steve Witkoff was meeting with Vladimir Putin in Russia during the chat. This is a blatant betrayal that demands immediate investigation by Congress. We cannot allow such reckless actions to go unchecked! Former intelligence officials are sounding the alarm - For the good of the country, these reckless participants must resign! Our service members and the American people deserve better. The Signalgate security breach profoundly impacts our democracy, undermining governance, public trust, and national security. name: Vice President JD Vance
subject: God led me to share my story with the world –warts and all
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it start to finish:

| |
---
| | | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z96s85nd3ja4b77pjcvq36gahioa8rtpv423ee2g_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chgmcpj1c1h2bs "Vice President JD Vance")
---

My fellow Americans - it is Vice President JD Vance.

_**[This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zj48e2i4nf5f4ori2cpikum816hhene2pdsn00vg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chgmcpj1c1h2bs "This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.")**_

It wasn't easy telling the world I grew up poor, raised by my Mamaw while my mother struggled with addiction.

It wasn't exactly the prep school/trust fund/summer-in-the-Hamptons upbringing that is commonplace in DC.

**But I felt called to tell my story. Warts and all.** I felt led to speak out because I think millions of Americans share stories like mine. Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11.

_As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC. _

I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you.

I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great.

_**[Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zr0faunekd97gcbai2bjikidis1q4d7j7eprm8d0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chgmcpj1c1h2bs "Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.")**_

We're coming out of the most expensive election in American history. I mean that. Kamala Harris spent over a billion dollars against us. It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win.

So now we're forced to rebuild.

The Democrat Machine is **ALREADY** crushing us in fundraising, **ALREADY** outspending us in key races, and **ALREADY** building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections.

At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable.

So here's my final pitch to you:

_**[I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise - for the FIRST TIME since the election - to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zs2hl2jsvn8ib59o5174iir9h1ai3a7dvt12hifo_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chgmcpj1c1h2bs "I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise – for the FIRST TIME since the election – to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.")**_ I understand that's ambitious. But if that's what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican House for his entire second term, it's a no-brainer I'll do what it takes to win.

Do you think you can help us get there?

_Whether it 's $5 or $500 - the amount you give isn't nearly as important as how many folks step up:_
---
| | | [PLEASE JOIN US](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zupnhadalc34dmi32lhtgnvuakn640a3qpvov0f8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chgmcpj1c1h2bs "PLEASE JOIN US")
---
Look, you've probably heard bits and pieces of my story at this point.

If my humble beginnings taught me anything, it's to never give up, never surrender, and never go down without a fight. That's why I'm partnering with Steve Scalise to help lay the critical groundwork we need to win.

_**[I don't ever want you to donate more than you can afford - but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4d2jjcct3ia2vu9aom7ak15o92mi74vqktf20gg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chgmcpj1c1h2bs "I don’t ever want you to donate more than you can afford – but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated.")**_

Regardless, it's an honor to fight alongside you.

God bless America,
Vice President JD Vance
---
| | | [PLEASE JOIN US](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zejm7mcfdna0uval0c69177ukbjtrsl55vc3huig_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chgmcpj1c1h2bs "PLEASE JOIN US")
---

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgdqa19ir0bksuqsrmu0h3kd5cg5qgtao0tvgtk0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chgmcpj1c1h2bs "First 100 Day Survey")
---

_It 's Majority Leader Scalise._

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my _**[First 100 Days Survey](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4r30uicmlhv64sgaef6222fnqtggsv1cmn34s6g_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chgmcpj1c1h2bs "First 100 Days Survey")**_ so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first.
---
| | | [CLICK TO BEGIN](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2ou65vi43snmcmiq5b0d7mtg8e762edl78q7abg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chgmcpj1c1h2bs "CLICK TO BEGIN")
---
- STEVE SCALISE
---
| | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC.
---

Team Scalise is committed to restoring a Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement. This message was sent to you because you are a member of the Team Scalise Conservative grassroots network.

Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without "green cards," and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer of each individual who contributes over $200 in a calendar year.

body:

Peter, we’ve just received breaking news out of Florida:
Governor Ron DeSantis has officially called on the Secretary of State to schedule TWO special elections on a RAPIDLY accelerated timeline.
To put it simply: Democrats now have a limited time to prepare to win TWO MORE HOUSE SEATS being vacated by Trump cabinet appointments
These special elections will determine the future of FL-01 , vacated by Matt Gaetz (reportedly stepping up as Trump’s pick for Attorney General), and FL-06 , soon to be left by Mike Waltz (rumored to become Trump’s National Security Advisor).
Flipping these suits blue IS possible - but only if we start preparing NOW. Will you help us build up a warchest of funding to rush to the Democrats who run for these seats? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]

Flipping these suits blue IS possible - but only if we start preparing NOW. Will you help us build up a warchest of funding to rush to the Democrats who run for these seats? [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [] DONATE $10 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] DONATE $250 [] Other Amount [] Make no mistake: DeSantis and his allies are trying to fast-track these elections to catch Democrats off guard. They know they need to secure these seats quickly to maintain their MAGA control of Congress. We CANNOT let them get away with it! Chip in NOW so we can have a stash of funds ready to go when Democrats put up a candidate for these seats >>> [] Thanks for taking action, Team RTP [] The Real Texas PAC 1150 N Loop 1604 W Ste 108-230 San Antonio, TX 78248 United States Contributions or gifts to The Real Texas PAC are not tax deductible. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, treasury funds, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. subject: CBS News moves one step closer to caving to Trump
body:
With a massive corporate merger on the line, Paramount looks ready to cave. And the fact that a major media company is preparing to settle a baseless lawsuit to appease the president should send a chill down the spine of anyone who believes in a free press.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105435151/538327846/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjJiNTRiZWQtOTUxNC1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=bwSJzPpBch2yiEz2dTHbtEX_f8GGvYNi2nxR6IQa7VA=&emci=e4b54bed-9514-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=f2b54bed-9514-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=14016711)

Peter,
Yesterday, the New York Times reported that Paramount and Donald Trump agreed on a mediator in his $20 billion lawsuit against CBS News—**an alarming sign that a settlement may be coming.**
Trump’s claim? That 60 Minutes deceptively edited an interview with Kamala Harris to hurt his 2024 campaign.
Of course, it’s nonsense.
CBS released the full footage, which showed a routine time edit—exactly what every news outlet does. No deception. No damage. Just a manufactured controversy Trump turned into a political weapon.
**Now, with a massive corporate merger on the line, Paramount looks ready to cave. And the fact that a major media company is preparing to settle a baseless lawsuit to appease the president should send a chill down the spine of anyone who believes in a free press.**
[**We’ll explain how Trump’s authoritarian threats are spreading into every corner of American life in a moment. But first—can you chip in to support fearless, independent journalism before more institutions fold?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105435152/538327847/2081197767?refcode=20250408_CBS_Update&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjJiNTRiZWQtOTUxNC1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=bwSJzPpBch2yiEz2dTHbtEX_f8GGvYNi2nxR6IQa7VA=)
**[Chip in now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105435153/538327848/-1581427288?refcode=20250408_CBS_Update&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjJiNTRiZWQtOTUxNC1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=bwSJzPpBch2yiEz2dTHbtEX_f8GGvYNi2nxR6IQa7VA=)**
This isn’t just about CBS. It’s a warning.
Like Putin in Russia or Orbán in Hungary, Trump is testing how far he can go to weaponize the legal system to punish dissent—across media, law, and higher education.
Top law firms like Paul Weiss and Skadden have already bent to the pressure, agreeing to provide hundreds of millions in free legal services aligned with the Trump administration.
Columbia University has had $400 million in federal funding stripped. International students have been detained. Presidents have resigned. Dozens more schools are under threat.
**This is what authoritarian consolidation looks like: isolate, intimidate, and dismantle the institutions that push back.**
That’s why COURIER exists.
We’re building a progressive, independent media network that doesn’t answer to billionaires or buckle under political pressure. Our local newsrooms report from battleground states. Our national team brings those stories directly to voters on TikTok, YouTube, and across the digital platforms where the fight for truth is happening.
**We’re not backing down. But we can’t do it without you.**
[**If you believe in a press that won’t fold—one that tells the truth, no matter who’s in power—chip in now to help COURIER keep going strong.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105435154/538327849/2081197767?refcode=20250408_CBS_Update&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjJiNTRiZWQtOTUxNC1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=bwSJzPpBch2yiEz2dTHbtEX_f8GGvYNi2nxR6IQa7VA=)

Yes, that's right - I'm a proud, conservative Republican - and frankly, I could care less about what others think about me! I am 100% comfortable in my own skin.This is who I am. Are you also a proud conservative, Friend? Thank you, and you'll be hearing from me soon! Winsome Earle-Sears | The liberals can't stand it, Friend! They simply cannot fathom that I, Winsome Earle-Sears, am a proud conservative Republican - that I dare to think differently! And they may just completely lose it when this black, female conservative becomes the next Governor of Virginia! But we need your help to get there, Friend! body:
The coolest shirt to wear in the sun!

|

_A new Golden Age of America is upon us, and it all starts with a place we hold dear:_ **the Gulf of America.** This region is more than just a geographical landmark - it is the birthplace of a new chapter in our nation's history. It is where our pride, resilience, and unwavering commitment to the America First agenda are truly coming to life.

**To honor this pivotal moment, we are offering a limited-edition "Gulf of America" Shirt, a powerful symbol of the Golden Age of America.**

name: Dan Goldman
subject: We made a promise to seniors. Republicans are trying to break it.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
|
#
---
Peter, This country made a promise to seniors: As long as you work hard and play by the rules, you can retire with dignity thanks to the Medicare and Social Security benefits that you’ve _earned_ from a lifetime of work. **Donald Trump and Elon Musk are now breaking that promise.** Since Trump returned to office, his administration has been very clear about who they care about: Billionaires and large corporations. So it’s no surprise that Trump and Musk are coming after Social Security and Medicare to pay for their billionaire tax cuts. Right now, they are trying to make it impossible for the Social Security Administration to function in order to serve our seniors and those with disabilities. They’re eliminating offices across the country, firing staff, mandating in-person appointments, and more — all to line their pockets with your money. MAGA has proven over and over again that they don’t care about seniors — **but Democrats do, Peter.** Trump’s cuts to Medicare and Social Security would have devastating consequences for seniors across my district, which is why I’m fighting every day against the Trump administration’s efforts to take away your hard-earned benefits. **[I will _always_ fight to protect what folks like you have earned, so if you support this work, please stand with me by signing on today >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105435936/538330698/390097564?refcode=AU_DSG_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250408_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjZkNGQ4Ni05NzE0LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ncN3zQUHpboZuHttejIQuI-yioku974E5qe0Pl-AQsA=&emci=09aa74cd-d110-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=c66d4d86-9714-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=13556823)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105435937/538330699/390097564?refcode=AU_DSG_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250408_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjZkNGQ4Ni05NzE0LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ncN3zQUHpboZuHttejIQuI-yioku974E5qe0Pl-AQsA=&emci=09aa74cd-d110-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=c66d4d86-9714-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=13556823)

Social Security is a lifeline for over 70 million Americans — especially seniors.

On Day One of the Trump administration, Elon Musk made Social Security a #1 target for his massive budget cuts.

He ordered DOGE to access sensitive Social Security payment systems, set plans to cut 10% of the Social Security Administration’s workforce and initiated the closure of 47 field offices across the country.

**_He even called Social Security “the biggest Ponzi scheme of all time.”_**

This is nothing more than an attempt to offer gigantic tax breaks to billionaires — at the expense of hardworking Americans.

That’s why Democrats are fighting to protect it:

clean_body: This is a crucial moment in our fight to protect the American people and our democracy. Please add your name before midnight tonight. | | | 🔴 Alert from The Hill: DOGE cuts could soon trigger Social Security system ‘collapse’ Donald Trump and Elon Musk are attempting to slash Social Security benefits to offer massive tax breaks to their billionaire buddies. We cannot allow them to get away with this. | | Social Security is a lifeline for over 70 million Americans — especially seniors. On Day One of the Trump administration, Elon Musk made Social Security a #1 target for his massive budget cuts. He ordered DOGE to access sensitive Social Security payment systems, set plans to cut 10% of the Social Security Administration’s workforce and initiated the closure of 47 field offices across the country. He even called Social Security “the biggest Ponzi scheme of all time.” This is nothing more than an attempt to offer gigantic tax breaks to billionaires — at the expense of hardworking Americans. That’s why Democrats are fighting to protect it: | Thank you, Team Gillibrand * = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I am truly honored to have won reelection, and I promise to continue the critical work toward bipartisan solutions for New Yorkers as we enter this new term. While we had many victories in New York this election season, our fight to retake control of the Senate is far from over. = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: Chris Brooks, LCV
subject: URGENT: Trump wants to hand over even more of our lands to industry
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTIzNDU1MTIS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjIwMDEyMTc0OQS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
Peter — Just weeks before Earth Day, the Trump administration is moving
to throw open our public lands to destructive strip mining. A recently signed
executive order declares mining “the primary land use” across millions of acres
of federal public land. Our nation’s public lands belong to all of us. But the Trump administration wants to hand them over to corporate polluters, obliterating protections for national monuments. Trump’s plan is facing bipartisan opposition from people across the country— and that means we have a real opportunity to build grassroots support
nationwide to reject the order. We need your helpto reach 400 new LCV members before Earth Day so we can effectively raise our
collective voices and protect our public lands. Please, renew your LCV membership to support our work to defend these shared lands from corporate polluters >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/k_ Right now, if you start an annual membership with a gift of $20 to help us reach
our Earth Day goal, we’ll even send you a “Climate Action Now” t-shirt — on us! PROTECT PUBLIC LANDS FROM CORPORATE POLLUTERS

Goal: 400 new annual LCV members
Deadline: Earth Day, April 22, 2025

Renew your membership to defend our nation’s public lands from destructive fossil fuel and mineral mining >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/VXb6sXK9d_ By renewing your membership today, you’ll help: Organize protests like the Hands Off! protest this past weekend that brought millions of people to the streets across the country, including in red and blue states, where constituents are standing up against Trump’s plan to hand public lands over to corporate polluters.Train grassroots activists across the country to advocate for their communities and protect them from drilling, mining, and other energy exploitation in nearby public lands.Push Congress to defend public lands instead of allowing the Trump administration to poison the soil, air, and water that local communities and wildlife rely on. Let’s join forces with communities and advocates across the country to protect
our nation’s public lands and demand that Congress prioritize clean energy over
fossil fuels. If we do so, I’m certain we can win. Will you renew your LCV membership today? Please don’t wait — every response helps brings us closer to our Earth Day goal >> https://links.messages.lcv. Thanks for standing with us, Peter.Together, we can stop our nation’s public lands from being sold off to the
highest bidder. Onward, Chris Brooks
Vice President of Membership
League of Conservation Voters This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=12345512&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjIwMDEyMTc0OQS2&spReportId=MjIwMDEyMTc0OQS2.Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=12345512&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjIwMDEyMTc0OQS2&spReportId=MjIwMDEyMTc0OQS2 from our supporter list.Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, Suite 700
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 DONATE https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/3Z0ec-

➤➤ NEW: Democrats sue to stop Trump’s unconstitutional election order

Friend,

Donald Trump’s latest executive order is an unprecedented attempt to seize control of how elections are run in this country — and Democrats just filed a lawsuit to stop it.

Here’s why: Trump’s order is a direct violation of the Constitution. Election administration is a power that belongs to Congress and the states — _not_ the White House.

This is a dangerous escalation. Trump and his MAGA allies want to strip states of their authority, undermine trust in our elections, and concentrate power where they can manipulate the outcome.

We cannot allow this assault on our democracy to go unchecked.

At DASS, we’re standing shoulder to shoulder with the leaders fighting back. But legal challenges, organizing, and protecting our elections in every state takes serious resources — and we need your help.

name: Senate Republicans
subject: We want to hear from you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:

Hi, it's your governor, Wes. Maryland law requires public officials like me to stop fundraising while the legislature is in session. For months, my team and I focused on delivering results for Maryland — while putting any efforts to fundraise for our campaign on pause. **Today, we’re pressing play.** Now that session is over, we can build the resources to continue fighting for our administration’s priorities again. That’s why I’m asking you to make an online contribution to our campaign right now. With a three-month pause, we have a lot of ground to make up. So, we’re setting a $10,000 goal to meet this moment. **[If you are able, please make a contribution of $10 or any amount today to help us make up the fundraising gap.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105436719/538333280/809564572?refcode=em20250408-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTcxOWNjNi05OTE0LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OeCY73BsxcqVidz1KDtmC_z4k09oeTpLaJXNUg6Yj2c=)** To run an operation like ours, we need a strong base of grassroots supporters. The team that we’ve built is powerful. It’s why we kept you updated on each and every step of the work we’ve been doing throughout the fundraising freeze. A surge of early support is how we set the tone for the summer. It’s how we prove the strength of our movement. name: Douglas Carswell
subject: Announcing the 2025 Mississippi Freedom Awards – Celebrating Lawmakers Who Champion Liberty!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/msfreedomawards?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend, **Each year, the Mississippi Center for Public Policy takes pride in recognizing lawmakers who have helped advance the cause of liberty during the legislative session. **

Back in January, we laid out an ambitious agenda for the year: eliminating the income tax through triggers, expanding school choice, passing anti-DEI legislation, and cutting the red tape that stifles healthcare innovation. I’m delighted to report that we achieved two significant victories—income tax elimination and anti-DEI legislation are now law!
---
|
---
| While progress on school choice and healthcare deregulation was stalled in the Senate, the momentum for our pro-growth vision continues to build.

These wins for liberty didn’t happen by accident. They were made possible by the dedication of lawmakers who stood firm in their commitment to freedom. **At MCPP, we’re never shy about calling out those who obstruct progress—but we’re equally eager to celebrate the champions who drive it forward.**

Over the next two weeks, we’ll be unveiling the recipients of the 2025 Mississippi Freedom Awards. These individuals have earned our gratitude for their bold leadership, and we can’t wait to shine a spotlight on their efforts.

**The forces for pro growth reform in Mississippi are winning! The forces of the status quo are in retreat! **

Thank you for standing with us in this mission!

Indiana will host a retreat aimed at enhancing nuclear energy education and engagement, according to a news release from Gov. Mike Braun.
The retreat will be held over the summer, city officials said, and co-sponsored by the National Governors Association and the U.S. Department of Energy (U.S. DOE). Specific dates will be announced in the coming weeks. **“Indiana is uniquely positioned to be a national leader in nuclear energy, and this opportunity will help to inform and accelerate our strategy and focus,”** Braun said.
**“Collaboration is essential to ensuring reliability, affordability, economic growth and sustainability for Hoosiers.”**
The release said goals of this initiative include, "establishing a state-based nuclear working group with stakeholders, assessing community education needs related to nuclear energy along with developing education resources, statewide community engagement strategy and analyzing potential for economic development." Long-term goals include building a "positive and informed" advanced nuclear environment throughout Indiana and supporting the state's economy and workforce, officials said. Other goals include potential legislative and fiscal recommendations that would help Hoosiers. **“Indiana has all the tools necessary to build advanced nuclear,”** Braun said. **“Education and outreach are needed to ensure stakeholders are well-informed about technology, jobs, and the long-term benefits of nuclear energy.” ** Current retreat participants include the U.S. DOE, the National Governors Association, the Indiana Secretary of Energy and Natural Resources, the Indiana Office of Energy Development, the Indiana Utility Regulatory Commission and the Indiana Office of the Utility Consumer Counselor.

body:

| | | As a proud Air Force veteran and Congresswoman, **I've got my sights set on the 2026 elections, and I'm not backing down. Every single one of the 2026 Democrat Targets on our list has three things in common:**
* **They support America Last policies that hurt our great nation and its people.******

* **They support installing Nancy Pelosi's puppet, Hakeem Jeffries, as Speaker.**

* **They're trembling in their boots because they know they could lose BIG in 2026 if patriots like you step up to help us take them down.**

**[Will you join me in the fight to defeat these 26 House Democrats in 2026 and grow our House Majority?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z6qmtgid9th1n5bs7irvkon65kmjnrsfq7oq8f08_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chgm6o34c9h2bs "Will you join me in the fight to defeat these 26 House Democrats in 2026 and grow our House Majority?")** With a Majority this strong, our conservative values will be unstoppable - and the Radical Left won't know what hit them!
But we need to move fast. _I've got intel that the Democrats are pouring millions into these campaigns as we speak._

_**If we don't fuel our war chest ASAP, we risk losing these seats before we even get off the ground.**_

name: Oregon Attorney General Dan Rayfield
subject: RSVP for Portland town hall
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/danrayfield/rsvp-for-portland-town-hall?e=1768325bd4)
---
| |
# Don't forget to RSVP for Portland town hall this Thursday!
---
| |
---
| Dear Friends,

We wanted to remind you that we're hosting a town hall in Portland this Thursday with Arizona Attorney General Kris Mayes as part of our "Safeguarding Oregon: Federal Oversight Forum" series. We'll be hearing from people whose daily lives have been impacted by federal action.

If you plan to attend, [please RSVP here.](https://danrayfield.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f0c603f9d9801c198f6fc68fa&id=c7c6fd0e3f&e=1768325bd4) The event is at the University Place Hotel on the PSU campus at 6pm.

These are challenging times in our state and our country, and we want you to know we are doing everything we can in our office to fight for the rights and values of Oregonians.

Hope to see you on Thursday!

---
|
---

| This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[_why did I get this?_](https://danrayfield.us15.list-manage.com/about?u=f0c603f9d9801c198f6fc68fa&id=764e876b1d&e=1768325bd4&c=140fac9b43) [unsubscribe from this list](https://danrayfield.us15.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=f0c603f9d9801c198f6fc68fa&id=764e876b1d&t=b&e=1768325bd4&c=140fac9b43) [update subscription preferences](https://danrayfield.us15.list-manage.com/profile?u=f0c603f9d9801c198f6fc68fa&id=764e876b1d&e=1768325bd4&c=140fac9b43)

name: Team NGG
subject: how we can unf*ck america
body:
| |
---
This undertaking is bold and ambitious, but we know it will be successful if we attack it with the same energy, optimism, and doggedness that we did for the Florida special elections. | [View in browser](https://rpprrv.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEzMjg2NTcsXCJsXCI6MTUxMTMzODkwMzY1MzYwMDY4LFwiclwiOjE1MTEzMzkxNjkxMTEwOTcxOX0iLCJzIjoiMDc2MWZlYWE2NWI3NmFkNSJ9)
| |
---
| [ ](https://rpprrv.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEzMjg2NTcsXCJsXCI6MTUxMTMzODkwMzczNzQ4NjgwLFwiclwiOjE1MTEzMzkxNjkxMTEwOTcxOX0iLCJzIjoiZjUxYzJlODkxMjAwNjhjOSJ9)
---
| Team,

When we launched National Ground Game PAC in the aftermath of the Harris campaign’s 2024 loss the Democratic base appeared burnt out, defeated, and stuck in a state of paralysis.

But when Trump appointed two Florida members of Congress to his cabinet triggering special elections, we saw an opportunity to reignite our movement and get us back in the fight.

Whereas it took the DNC until a week before the April 1st Florida Special Elections to take notice of the momentum and to begin sending limited resources to help move votes in FL-01 and FL-06, **National Ground Game PAC was on the ground in Florida starting in early January.**

It is no exaggeration to say that the momentum in the FL-01 and FL-06 special elections that resulted in a 22 point and 16 point swing left, respectively, was built by our supporters who believed—before most folks did—that a strong, assertive opposition against Trump’s authoritarian moves would resonate deeply even in traditionally “red” districts.

But now we find ourselves faced with the same fractured media information hellscape as we were in 2024 - one dominated by MAGA propaganda sources, fake news sites, and podcasters devoted to polluting young minds. **If we are to make bigger impacts everywhere this year and in the 2026 Midterms, we absolutely have to take on the right-wing media machine.**

That is why we are launching our new initiative, **_The Unfuck America Tour_** , to get in the space where there is a void of left-leaning and common sense voices and __fight back against the MAGA machine that has been indoctrinating young voters__ for years now without any pushback.

---

---
| National Ground Game is the very first group to confront head-on the super profitable MAGA right wing propaganda machine, and we intend to fight hard to win these conversations and bring young voters back into the fold.**

This undertaking is bold and ambitious, but we know it will be successful if we attack it with the same energy, optimism, and doggedness that we did for the Florida special elections.__**

---
|
---
[**Friend, can we count on you to have our backs as we wage this fight? We need your support to help bring a show of force against Charlie Kirk and the rest of the MAGA indoctrinators. Thank you for standing with us as we launch this ambitious new program:**](https://rpprrv.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEzMjg2NTcsXCJsXCI6MTUxMTMzODkwMzg4NDI4NzU2LFwiclwiOjE1MTEzMzkxNjkxMTEwOTcxOX0iLCJzIjoiZWEwNjkyOTQwMzc1YzA4ZCJ9)

The right wing media landscape has gone uncontested for far too long. Let’s fight back together.

Dear Peter,

As an attorney, I’m outraged by the recent Presidential Memoranda issued by President Trump that Nancy shared below. [**It’s an obvious attempt to intimidate lawyers simply for doing our jobs.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105438389/538339149/2141984067?sourceid=1150589&utm_campaign=25emaus-0401aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=poster&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzcwY2ZlMy05ZDE0LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cWOTCgz0Z2e1vYuhTwSKwTPzAc5yH4118umCCK7nIlU=&emci=18be2680-7f14-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=1c70cfe3-9d14-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=954237)

This isn’t just an attack on the legal profession; it’s an attack on the rule of law. The message is clear: represent someone who dares to stand up to this administration, and you’ll be punished. [**At the Center, we are committed to upholding justice and defending the rights of all individuals. We will not be silenced.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105438393/538339150/2141984067?sourceid=1150589&utm_campaign=25emaus-0401aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=poster&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzcwY2ZlMy05ZDE0LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cWOTCgz0Z2e1vYuhTwSKwTPzAc5yH4118umCCK7nIlU=&emci=18be2680-7f14-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=1c70cfe3-9d14-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=954237)

That’s not just authoritarian—it’s un-American. I became a lawyer to protect people’s rights, not to be bullied into silence. And I’m not backing down. None of us should.

Thanks for standing with us,

Molly Duane
Senior Staff Attorney

| Peter,

The Trump administration just launched its latest attack on our legal system.

This weekend, President Trump issued [**a Presidential Memoranda designed to intimidate and silence lawyers simply for doing their jobs.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105438397/538339157/2141984067?sourceid=1150589&utm_campaign=25emaus-0401aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=poster&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzcwY2ZlMy05ZDE0LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cWOTCgz0Z2e1vYuhTwSKwTPzAc5yH4118umCCK7nIlU=&emci=18be2680-7f14-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=1c70cfe3-9d14-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=954237) The goal is to bully lawyers out of taking on any case that challenges the administration, leaving everyday Americans with no recourse to fight back when fundamental freedoms—including their reproductive rights—are violated. [**We won’t let that happen.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105438399/538339158/2141984067?sourceid=1150589&utm_campaign=25emaus-0401aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=poster&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzcwY2ZlMy05ZDE0LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cWOTCgz0Z2e1vYuhTwSKwTPzAc5yH4118umCCK7nIlU=&emci=18be2680-7f14-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=1c70cfe3-9d14-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=954237) | [**FIGHT BACK**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105438400/538339159/2141984067?sourceid=1150589&utm_campaign=25emaus-0401aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=poster&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzcwY2ZlMy05ZDE0LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cWOTCgz0Z2e1vYuhTwSKwTPzAc5yH4118umCCK7nIlU=&emci=18be2680-7f14-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=1c70cfe3-9d14-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=954237 "SAY NO")

[**Thanks to supporters like you, we’ve stood strong against attacks on reproductive freedom for more than 30 years. We have litigated scores of cases in federal courts, including against the U.S. government, regardless of the political party in power.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105438401/538339161/2141984067?sourceid=1150589&utm_campaign=25emaus-0401aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=poster&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzcwY2ZlMy05ZDE0LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cWOTCgz0Z2e1vYuhTwSKwTPzAc5yH4118umCCK7nIlU=&emci=18be2680-7f14-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=1c70cfe3-9d14-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=954237)

The courts are our last safeguard against the full-scale theft of our civil and legal protections. This isn’t just an attack on lawyers—it’s an attack on EVERY American’s right to hold the government accountable.
[**DONATE NOW**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105438402/538339163/2141984067?sourceid=1150589&utm_campaign=25emaus-0401aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=poster&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzcwY2ZlMy05ZDE0LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cWOTCgz0Z2e1vYuhTwSKwTPzAc5yH4118umCCK7nIlU=&emci=18be2680-7f14-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=1c70cfe3-9d14-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=954237 "SAY NO")

[**We will not back down in the face of the President’s intimidation campaign**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105438404/538339164/2141984067?sourceid=1150589&utm_campaign=25emaus-0401aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=poster&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzcwY2ZlMy05ZDE0LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cWOTCgz0Z2e1vYuhTwSKwTPzAc5yH4118umCCK7nIlU=&emci=18be2680-7f14-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=1c70cfe3-9d14-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=954237)—not while his administration refuses to defend women who are denied emergency abortion care; not while it condones violence at abortion clinics; and not while doctors are under threat of criminal prosecution for providing essential care. Not now and not ever.

[**Fight with us.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105438405/538339165/2141984067?sourceid=1150589&utm_campaign=25emaus-0401aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=poster&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzcwY2ZlMy05ZDE0LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cWOTCgz0Z2e1vYuhTwSKwTPzAc5yH4118umCCK7nIlU=&emci=18be2680-7f14-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=1c70cfe3-9d14-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=954237) Defend the courts. Nancy Northup

clean_body: We will not be silenced. | | | ---|--- Dear Peter, As an attorney, I’m outraged by the recent Presidential Memoranda issued by President Trump that Nancy shared below. This isn’t just an attack on the legal profession; it’s an attack on the rule of law. The message is clear: represent someone who dares to stand up to this administration, and you’ll be punished. That’s not just authoritarian—it’s un-American. I became a lawyer to protect people’s rights, not to be bullied into silence. And I’m not backing down. None of us should. Thanks for standing with us, Molly Duane Senior Staff Attorney * From:Center for Reproductive Rights <info@reprorights.org> Sent: Monday, March 24, 2024 3:15 PM To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com> Subject: President Trump’s new order threatens YOUR rights | | | ---|--- | Peter, The Trump administration just launched its latest attack on our legal system. This weekend, President Trump issued The goal is to bully lawyers out of taking on any case that challenges the administration, leaving everyday Americans with no recourse to fight back when fundamental freedoms—including their reproductive rights—are violated. | "SAY NO" The courts are our last safeguard against the full-scale theft of our civil and legal protections. This isn’t just an attack on lawyers—it’s an attack on EVERY American’s right to hold the government accountable. "SAY NO" —not while his administration refuses to defend women who are denied emergency abortion care; not while it condones violence at abortion clinics; and not while doctors are under threat of criminal prosecution for providing essential care. Not now and not ever. Defend the courts. Protect our fundamental freedoms. Nancy Northup President & CEO "DONATE NOW" | | | | ---|---|--- The Center for Reproductive Rights uses the power of law to advance reproductive rights as fundamental human rights around the world. (C) Center for Reproductive Rights Center for Reproductive Rights 199 Water St. New York, NY 10038 United States

name: Derrick Evans, Ex-J6 Prisoner
subject: I barely got to say goodbye to my wife and kids.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Evans for WV 50 MOUNTAINEER DRPRICHARD, WV 25555
body:
| | | [](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/JGzqNJ12n0tRZpQ71VxcvZ0wGtvpoR8tMtmGRGp5_VpAOdMUWInLb-_TPMPlZGrQYtemaUBvQeX-LKydMtDfe8wE_e_YbJCntbJBl61TK2V7kZB4BgS0f0TXbXfnoYSL9zcmMnSAXs9jrkpA5auPy3o25qFKxPh8_mZNB8BODLxsgBBT2xpbjHgLivUlpFyOtjxl0BekOrmeR2mLqXxPWU5mUnihVJjC3WCoCdZDPgazExLxkO_aClj5lw0HLDXd-GMm-Mon2oswwu3wZm1nUbQsJSDwOxGDK35t4Mej-kwrIA6xnOA3B2VM-lhIuG4c5ayehLIrYaDwaIfnAft698osAiTlBLbwmKf11xaK4i0C5dsNpnrkeJ8flZDxqtjRKj5njD6XX7CciGAfO2C7rMEI664naxZcbfbDhsDyeLNQm1no7fIKn_ZHX8OvmwvwDBT4WRKTjhpeZlW6Z24r_XnO0FDm5Y6E8u56TMxF6SJG6cyq7SunEXsmRP79/aDJcQXS5t7PSFAdby9O-WQMHiXWwr88o/7)
---
When the Biden Regime **THREW ME IN PRISON** for peacefully protesting**** on January 6th, I must’ve apologized to my wife and kids 1,000 times. I barely got to say goodbye before being **HANDCUFFED & SHIPPED OFF.** But this isn’t a sob story. **PRESIDENT TRUMP PARDONED ME.**

**And now that I’m running for Senate, I want to** **APOLOGIZE TO YOU:** I’m sorry all of these politicians message you asking for _fake 1000X donation matches_. I’m sorry they lie to your face about their “values” so they can _treat you like an ATM machine_. **I understand why you don’t want to give them a minute of your time or an inkling of your support.** You don’t need to be in Congress to see it: Politicians tell you they’ll do anything to _“champion Trump’s agenda”..._ _Then work with Democrats to BLOCK his cabinet nominations_. They’ll text and email about how much they want to put _“America First”._.. _Then turn around and give Ukraine another $500,000,000,000_. They’ll ask you to rush over an urgent contribution to _“Defend President Trump”..._ _Then vote to fund the same FBI and DOJ bureaucrats_ _waging war against him_. Look, I’m not perfect. **But I’ll NEVER betray my constituents like this.** I’m just a normal guy from West Virginia who has a family to support and bills to pay. I don’t have some giant political machine behind me. My plan isn’t to get rich and attend cocktail parties. **I just want to DO RIGHT by the American people, and that means carrying out President Trump’s America First agenda FAR AFTER he’s gone.** **Will you support my Senate campaign today?** **Thank you.**
---
[**SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN >>>**](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/T_KQCdD46_ulRvXdFBn3kLCovIGIVs4FPP3bv8qyaU1XcWtMojs1lKfQwalV6OUrTrwfKdUfQO7G2Zz15EXkoz3gPnkz0ezO5_ER1h4Q7H3n72bJHbzV4VsqsQE5NOmkoZGqMJ-J1qnfRSYdTpGrq9iHouCrmXr-XCoCynYEvXS-roikte-kMFZd9vWAEKvQtUZK-cHhxMpULHKtkIKwGqRzxXw2THCyjCNs_JL9gK-7V1heQu6E9AUHu5oDkl8DY7bI_ZHWY_lRlUDtF6mt-dJZ2nAC-x65eqsNnQNG9FFQWwyDFgy8WKcIhqcm5PPH3m1BtCGEev1k_JswwJNDX2wEBd_eH9kKjMfV0qmjoJdZeZ2hqn-ms8kM8KshnnpbeyECwzBxLMeplKPc_POGaGdVMf47_xAWNCSP7OaOz6V5bKN5fAMVvmzw816dGPuJ5DM0nh9wle5GSVGE3zu7XtbHQVzXiTAX8A2y-k7JUWvdAhl9ifRCWSasYi14/h4ho2TjNLyrFWTr7IEF6UTDerzdDfbO9/7)

name: Rick Larsen
subject: The Republican Rip-Off targets reproductive health care
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
Last week, nine Planned Parenthood affiliates received notice from the Trump administration about plans to withhold Title X funding.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105438525/538339578/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWNmY2Y4OC05ZTE0LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j7D_4LIs08sRUlW1-R7xvQEUJsSQRXGrEYPDqU4R2cw=&emci=fb30db77-c810-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=09cfcf88-9e14-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=9494239)
---

| | **Last week, nine Planned Parenthood affiliates received notice from the Trump administration about plans to withhold Title X funding.** This decision will hurt patients across the country who rely on health centers funded through Title X for critical reproductive health care. **What is Title X?** You might remember discussions about Title X back in 2019, when Trump implemented a harmful "gag rule" that censored the information health care providers could share with their patients. Title X is the nation's only federal program dedicated to providing affordable reproductive health care to lower-income populations. Since the bipartisan bill was enacted in 1970, the program has helped millions of people who couldn't otherwise afford these services to get the care they need, including birth control, cancer screenings, and other sexual and reproductive health care. **In Washington, 14 organizations with 95 clinic sites rely on a combination of state and Title X funding. Many Title X patients live below the federal poverty line, and now the health care of more than 1.5 million patients who visit Title X-funded health centers are in jeopardy.** **Alexis McGill Johnson, president and CEO of Planned Parenthood Action Fund, released the following statement in response to President Trump's indiscriminate cuts:** _"President Trump and Elon Musk are pushing their dangerous political agenda, stripping health care access from people nationwide, and not giving a second thought to the devastation they will cause. We know what happens when health care providers cannot use Title X funding: People across the country suffer, cancers go undetected, access to birth control is severely reduced, and the nation's STI crisis worsens. Planned Parenthood Action Fund will fight to get this funding restored and to keep politicians out of health care. People need affordable health care options. This cannot stand."_ I was and am outraged by the Supreme Court's decision to overturn _Roe v. Wade_. This backwards ruling strikes a blow to our basic constitutional rights of liberty, privacy, and equality – which is why the American people overwhelmingly oppose the decision. **Last week was another backwards decision caused by Trump and his agenda to cut spending to fund a massive tax refund for the wealthiest corporations and richest Americans.** More soon, _Rick_ |
---|---|---

| | Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen.
---

Fellow Conservative - I've been in some tough situations before, but this could be the hardest mountain I'll have to climb...

While I was barred from accepting any campaign donations during Virginia's legislative session, my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was **RAKING IN** hundreds of thousands of dollars! Fellow American,

Last week, Republicans were able to scrape by with special election victories in two Trump-won congressional districts.

**Here's why I am worried...**
1. **Last week, Democrats outraised our Republican candidates 3 to 1 and nearly 10 to 1 in red districts.**
2. And this week, Georgia Democrat Jon Ossoff announced that he raised more in the first three months of 2025 than any incumbent Senate candidate **__EVER__** in an "off-year."

Fellow American, this is just a preview of what's to come. _Democrats are ready to spend whatever they can to win next year._

**This could be a warning sign for America First Republicans in 2026.**

**[Can I count on your support before the week is over?](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=478b51b5b04d451bae78c966f3b8001e&_e=NkUNf4r0SWJ1MuQiQNrfIIp4TBHd3ERq247hxjVIc10rTnQDV7ywAt9AtuVo5CVrywuHju3e_YuNCWWOxcPKHFo5kLg6dpziOr1rupIBvITtGv2BDzlLGN1Jt9h5ynDp5dqAR-36sI3T-sHTBtDR0gIYAVqu9qhs8qxq9zZkiDvhm0LyQTIme_r_AEyyUjxprmgx_7r1n4QwVALgrHg_6pSBXgqWEB_b5zpLreH9gKInSjjL0uwn9s9FR7j2CsNjXHb3w6FQR3tfrKkMC1y6JSxcwZ-KhS8DBEhtrCzpk6Hx_F2pP_3HFeIGuJ4d-6fd4YY8-DSTdg8kOKC0lzVokPJYl6N2PXqANai8OI5gYHdNrcovS76W1sUOFdiOrmx_69q4VvDFklC0Tz1MF9J2ZAq8MIy9EdyrXTPB2soAXX0%3D)**
