clean_body: The special elections in Florida and election in Wisconsin have made one thing clear: Democrats and their liberal donors are not sitting on the sidelines. | Fellow American, Last week, Republicans were able to scrape by with special election victories in two Trump-won congressional districts. Here's why I am worried... 1. Last week, Democrats outraised our Republican candidates 3 to 1 and nearly 10 to 1 in red districts. 2. And this week, Georgia Democrat Jon Ossoff announced that he raised more in the first three months of 2025 than any incumbent Senate candidate EVER in an "off-year." Fellow American, this is just a preview of what's to come. Democrats are ready to spend whatever they can to win next year. This could be a warning sign for America First Republicans in 2026. We cannot wait to start building our grassroots team. That work must start now. That's why I am sharing this brutal truth with you. We cannot afford to be outraised by this much if we want to keep our Senate majority. Thanks for standing with me, Steve Daines Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. Senator Steve Daines | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

name: JanePAC
subject: They're coming for your weather alerts.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
Trump and Musk are threatening the system that keeps you safe.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105439425/538342750/1328794144?refcode=ea.ea147fc0-a014-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ms=ea.ea147fc0-a014-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVhMTQ3ZmMwLWEwMTQtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2gGQ_phAgKhqK9Czj1Vn3-_h8cJkSa4ubhM-TT-oYiA=&emci=9d8470ee-9214-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=ea147fc0-a014-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=4823105)
---
When severe weather is on the horizon — a hurricane shifting course in the middle of the night, a fast-moving wildfire racing toward your town — how do you know it’s time to act? It’s the emergency alert on your phone. It’s the breaking news segment on TV. It’s the weather forecast that warns you days in advance. But here’s what most people don’t realize: that life-saving information comes from NOAA — the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration. Behind every weather alert is a vast network of satellites, airplanes, radar systems, and expert analysts working around the clock to track storms and predict disasters. **And right now, Donald Trump and Elon Musk are actively working to gut this federal agency.[Will you chip in to help us elect leaders who will fight tooth and nail to stop them?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105439428/538342753/2105508926?refcode=ea.ea147fc0-a014-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ms=ea.ea147fc0-a014-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVhMTQ3ZmMwLWEwMTQtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2gGQ_phAgKhqK9Czj1Vn3-_h8cJkSa4ubhM-TT-oYiA=)** Trump’s administration is working hand-in-glove with Musk, whose private satellite empire stands to profit from dismantling public weather services. Musk’s unelected team of operatives are inside NOAA headquarters — accessing sensitive data, suspending key personnel, and laying the groundwork to privatize national weather forecasting. They’re even pushing to slash NOAA’s 12,000-employee workforce by thousands. If they succeed, it won’t just be scientists who suffer. It’ll be all of us. Imagine a world where you and your family’s safety depend on profit-driven corporations — where emergency weather alerts are delayed or even sold to the highest bidder because profits matter more than people. We are fighting back — organizing and working to elect leaders who will defend the critical institutions that protect our lives. But we can’t do it without you. **[Rush a donation now to help us fight back. Every dollar powers our work to stop this assault on science, protect NOAA, and build firewalls at the state and local level against the chaos unfolding in Washington.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105439431/538342756/2105508926?refcode=ea.ea147fc0-a014-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ms=ea.ea147fc0-a014-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVhMTQ3ZmMwLWEwMTQtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2gGQ_phAgKhqK9Czj1Vn3-_h8cJkSa4ubhM-TT-oYiA=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [**DONATE $5**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105439434/538342760/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=ea.ea147fc0-a014-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ms=ea.ea147fc0-a014-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVhMTQ3ZmMwLWEwMTQtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2gGQ_phAgKhqK9Czj1Vn3-_h8cJkSa4ubhM-TT-oYiA=) | [**DONATE $25**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105439438/538342763/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=ea.ea147fc0-a014-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ms=ea.ea147fc0-a014-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVhMTQ3ZmMwLWEwMTQtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2gGQ_phAgKhqK9Czj1Vn3-_h8cJkSa4ubhM-TT-oYiA=)

clean_body: Trump and Musk are threatening the system that keeps you safe. | When severe weather is on the horizon — a hurricane shifting course in the middle of the night, a fast-moving wildfire racing toward your town — how do you know it’s time to act? It’s the emergency alert on your phone. It’s the breaking news segment on TV. It’s the weather forecast that warns you days in advance. But here’s what most people don’t realize: that life-saving information comes from NOAA — the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration. Behind every weather alert is a vast network of satellites, airplanes, radar systems, and expert analysts working around the clock to track storms and predict disasters. And right now, Donald Trump and Elon Musk are actively working to gut this federal agency.= Trump’s administration is working hand-in-glove with Musk, whose private satellite empire stands to profit from dismantling public weather services. Musk’s unelected team of operatives are inside NOAA headquarters — accessing sensitive data, suspending key personnel, and laying the groundwork to privatize national weather forecasting. They’re even pushing to slash NOAA’s 12,000-employee workforce by thousands. If they succeed, it won’t just be scientists who suffer. It’ll be all of us. Imagine a world where you and your family’s safety depend on profit-driven corporations — where emergency weather alerts are delayed or even sold to the highest bidder because profits matter more than people. We are fighting back — organizing and working to elect leaders who will defend the critical institutions that protect our lives. But we can’t do it without you. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Let’s do this. Now, it's time to hear from you: ****************************************************************************************************** **************************************************************************************************** **************************************************************************************************** EVERY vote will be crucial in the midterms and beyond, that's why we need to know if we can count on you in the fight against the radical Left Friend, THOUSANDS of patriots have already taken the poll, but we still need . Do not let us down. **************************************************************************************************** Thank you, Senate Republicans ****************************************************************************************************** | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Pop Acta Media | Conservatives Give PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

body:
These are must-win races – help us hold the line >>>

| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9DcnV6LVRvcC1Db25zZXJ2YXRpdmVzLTEtMm5kXzIwMjUwNDA4JnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q3J1ei1Ub3AtQ29uc2VydmF0aXZlcy0xLTJuZCZ1dG1fYWdlbmN5PVBHJmFtb3VudD03NSZyZWN1cnJpbmc9dHJ1ZSJ9/xI7la4uqwYhtxzeDJkR8DA)

| | Fellow Conservative, Our Senate majority is hard at work to make the Trump-Republican America First agenda a reality and _we 're getting big things done. I'm proud to be leading the charge, and I can assure you we will not let up in the fight to save our great nation_ from leftist lunacy.

The Democrats are LOSING THEIR MINDS - and their base is flooding their coffers.

_They 're desperate to win back power and we need to _[](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9DcnV6LVRvcC1Db25zZXJ2YXRpdmVzLTFfMjAyNTA0MDMmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1DcnV6LVRvcC1Db25zZXJ2YXRpdmVzLTEmdXRtX2FnZW5jeT1QRyZhbW91bnQ9NTQifQ/EbEN3RrovSbMkaaZuB22-w)[](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9DcnV6LVRvcC1Db25zZXJ2YXRpdmVzLTEtMm5kXzIwMjUwNDA4JnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q3J1ei1Ub3AtQ29uc2VydmF0aXZlcy0xLTJuZCZ1dG1fYWdlbmN5PVBHJmFtb3VudD03NSZyZWN1cnJpbmc9dHJ1ZSJ9/_c7Nq2nPVlkRs7lLQHUQYw)[**__STAND UNITED TO STOP THEM__** _!_](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9DcnV6LVRvcC1Db25zZXJ2YXRpdmVzLTEtMm5kXzIwMjUwNDA4JnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q3J1ei1Ub3AtQ29uc2VydmF0aXZlcy0xLTJuZCZ1dG1fYWdlbmN5PVBHJmFtb3VudD03NSZyZWN1cnJpbmc9dHJ1ZSJ9/ImgaZ-p2Jp6t072ePVgLOw)

Here are five key races that we must win on November 3, 2026: _Alaska_ - Republican Senator Dan Sullivan is running for a third term and the Democrats are aggressively targeting him.

_Georgia_ - Democrat Senator Jon Ossoff, far-left radical, is making his first bid for re-election. It's all hands to take back this seat in the Peach State.

_Michigan_ - Democrat Senator Gary Peters has declined to run for re-election, making this a "Toss Up" open seat contest.

_Montana_ - Republican Senator Steve Daines is also completing his second term and the Democrats want payback after we sent Democrat Jon Tester packing last fall.
_New Hampshire_ - Democrat Jeanne Shaheen just announced she won't run for re-election after nearly two decades in this seat. This is another big pickup opportunity. **Will you make a special contribution today that will be split between these races?** **[](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9DcnV6LVRvcC1Db25zZXJ2YXRpdmVzLTFfMjAyNTA0MDMmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1DcnV6LVRvcC1Db25zZXJ2YXRpdmVzLTEmdXRtX2FnZW5jeT1QRyZhbW91bnQ9NTQifQ/or9RRY0spVzasb0A85qnFA)[RUSH A $10, $25, $50, or $100 DONATION, OR MORE IF YOU CAN>>>](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9DcnV6LVRvcC1Db25zZXJ2YXRpdmVzLTEtMm5kXzIwMjUwNDA4JnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q3J1ei1Ub3AtQ29uc2VydmF0aXZlcy0xLTJuZCZ1dG1fYWdlbmN5PVBHJmFtb3VudD03NSZyZWN1cnJpbmc9dHJ1ZSJ9/koQE8TFC1lmE1otKdQPjUA)**

[ **HELP PROTECT OUR MAJORITY**](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9DcnV6LVRvcC1Db25zZXJ2YXRpdmVzLTEtMm5kXzIwMjUwNDA4JnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q3J1ei1Ub3AtQ29uc2VydmF0aXZlcy0xLTJuZCZ1dG1fYWdlbmN5PVBHJmFtb3VudD03NSZyZWN1cnJpbmc9dHJ1ZSJ9/U9uIGDWBKnTN-kqYyfYwFg)

I'm proud to be leading the charge, and I can assure you we will not let up in the fight to save our great nation from leftist lunacy. The Democrats are LOSING THEIR MINDS - and their base is flooding their coffers. They 're desperate to win back power and we need to Here are five key races that we must win on November 3, 2026: Alaska - Republican Senator Dan Sullivan is running for a third term and the Democrats are aggressively targeting him. Georgia - Democrat Senator Jon Ossoff, far-left radical, is making his first bid for re-election. It's all hands to take back this seat in the Peach State. Michigan - Democrat Senator Gary Peters has declined to run for re-election, making this a "Toss Up" open seat contest. Montana - Republican Senator Steve Daines is also completing his second term and the Democrats want payback after we sent Democrat Jon Tester packing last fall. New Hampshire - Democrat Jeanne Shaheen just announced she won't run for re-election after nearly two decades in this seat. This is another big pickup opportunity. Will you make a special contribution today that will be split between these races? We're aggressively ramping up our efforts to hold the line. It's all hands on deck. THANK YOU for any contribution you can send today to fuel our fight at Team Cruz! For Liberty, Ted Cruz | | | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate | | 815 A Brazos, PMB 550, Austin, TX 78701 | | | To stop receiving emails from Ted Cruz for Senate, to unsubscribe. |

name: My name is Lisa McClain.
subject: I rewrote this at least 10 times, so I ask that you please just take a moment to read what I have to say.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa McClain for Congress
body:
See, I grew up shoveling horseshit for hours on end cleaning stalls as a teenager, so I understand the value of a hard day's work.| | | See, I grew up shoveling horseshit for hours on end cleaning stalls as a teenager, so I understand the value of a hard day's work. | | | | I hate this message.

I'm serious. I rewrote it at least 10 times. I just couldn't get it right...

Asking you something like this doesn't come easy to me. See, I grew up shoveling horseshit for hours on end cleaning stalls as a teenager, so I understand the value of a hard day's work.

That's why I absolutely hate asking you for a single penny, **[but things are so dire that I'm having to suck it up and ask for help.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=d9710f3f58e340e7979138dd7d6c0937&_e=HyiPb7Hts3M9hOTWSrMB7EnYTXHaFrWetB91aaQKAkA-fdKkKirz7qc-3GAYOkBBKkyATAYONe2BtK4gS5HiJvnn4Kot_2hascvpuviftB4N0lJqd0ybWjIhTlIS7z_SAtGCW0kpBFk5MdzXy9Jqd_q8HWPMX48jcjWiaRMQ2GOAq9F3_HQSke2j1KRes-E_uzoKiAAaBx_aubABzLimt_58fxJBv3gtF67j57wroShyl0FluRnoZOy1hvRrzFjPkvnEZPx4Mbf4_D3Kb5d9Z5alsZ1xXNh-pEc_6MxVYsXCxwbQhSJLzflhqA-e2ST7VPua6IDZoXytZQEKo56bs-F5QzbmXcvAqvEc1gTWJxCTWWeoUQV3AkzQHswQz6NFN1FfxDx2g_W7104wiGo-A5BgldhzipWjLhJS5ITA5Rk%3D)**

Hi, my name is Lisa McClain.

I'm an America First Conservative woman, and unlike the career politicians in DC, I'm not afraid to say it. **I'm also not afraid to say that I'm a pro-life and pro-Trump Catholic in the battleground state of Michigan - the state that decided the 2024 Presidential election.**

That's why the Democrat Machine is already flooding my state with phony protesters, lying ads, and millions in dark money to flip it blue.

And as of this morning, all signs indicate our new MAGA Majority could be in real trouble.

So as much as I hate it, that's why I'm having to send this. **[**If we see a huge response from grassroots Patriots, we can counter this surge from these Left lunatics and protect President Trump and his America First agenda.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=d9710f3f58e340e7979138dd7d6c0937&_e=HyiPb7Hts3M9hOTWSrMB7EnYTXHaFrWetB91aaQKAkA-fdKkKirz7qc-3GAYOkBBKkyATAYONe2BtK4gS5HiJvnn4Kot_2hascvpuviftB4N0lJqd0ybWjIhTlIS7z_SAtGCW0kpBFk5MdzXy9Jqd_q8HWPMX48jcjWiaRMQ2GOAq9F3_HQSke2j1KRes-E_uzoKiAAaBx_aubABzLimt_58fxJBv3gtF67j57wroShyl0FluRnoZOy1hvRrzFjPkvnEZPx4Mbf4_D3Kb5d9Z94fHe5xAT1gH2iFqSyMSkHvq6vMM1OOlBC3qsbdU1qsqlqBVqpfd6zo1MjiCzGxukP-1_fT_9cmLOSyv-045z2C9p1co-DgOKMlUWz-WB6Tu2jKg4yoYJZ1wrNuHM4wvryTOgD0DfJmwoAnxoDjnTQ%3D)**

Look - as a Conservative, I hate asking others for help. And I wouldn't be doing this if it wasn't absolutely critical to saving America. But as someone who shoveled manure as a teenager, there is nothing I won't do when it comes to fighting for the forgotten men and women of America.

clean_body: See, I grew up shoveling horseshit for hours on end cleaning stalls as a teenager, so I understand the value of a hard day's work.| | | See, I grew up shoveling horseshit for hours on end cleaning stalls as a teenager, so I understand the value of a hard day's work. | | | | I hate this message. I'm serious. I rewrote it at least 10 times. I just couldn't get it right... Asking you something like this doesn't come easy to me. See, I grew up shoveling horseshit for hours on end cleaning stalls as a teenager, so I understand the value of a hard day's work. That's why I absolutely hate asking you for a single penny, Hi, my name is Lisa McClain. I'm an America First Conservative woman, and unlike the career politicians in DC, I'm not afraid to say it. I'm also not afraid to say that I'm a pro-life and pro-Trump Catholic in the battleground state of Michigan - the state that decided the 2024 Presidential election. That's why the Democrat Machine is already flooding my state with phony protesters, lying ads, and millions in dark money to flip it blue. And as of this morning, all signs indicate our new MAGA Majority could be in real trouble. So as much as I hate it, that's why I'm having to send this. Look - as a Conservative, I hate asking others for help. And I wouldn't be doing this if it wasn't absolutely critical to saving America. But as someone who shoveled manure as a teenager, there is nothing I won't do when it comes to fighting for the forgotten men and women of America. | | Sorry to bother you with this, but I'm praying for a strong response, Lisa McClain | | | | | | | Paid for by Lisa McClain for Congress PO Box 380890 Clinton Twp, MI 48030 |

name: Spanberger for Governor HQ
subject: 🚨Abigail’s opponent this November
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8640a2a4-a9ef-400c-aa01-f1fe825b9b83/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Peter, It’s official: Lt. Gov. Winsome Earle-Sears is the Republican nominee for Governor of Virginia and Abigail’s official opponent in the November 2025 race. [We’ll explain more below, but first, will you contribute to Abigail’s campaign for Governor right now?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0b697511-d7a0-4f4e-a22b-03ca33c60aaf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf621f3c7-8363-42d7-8340-72cff27cf315/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| The stakes couldn’t be higher this November. Sears has spent her entire political career pushing extreme right-wing policies and backing Donald Trump at every turn. She’s repeatedly voiced her support for anti-choice measures to restrict women’s reproductive rights — including a near-total abortion ban — and just last week spoke at an anti-abortion rally in Richmond. She’s not looking out for the people of Virginia. While Virginia's federal workers are facing instability and chaos from the Trump-Musk administration and DOGE’s cuts, Abigail’s opponent is standing behind Trump 100% and “doesn’t understand why” it’s a big deal that Virginians are being fired from their jobs. She literally told Virginians “don’t fret.” Sears is just another rubber stamp for the MAGA agenda, and frankly, Virginians deserve better. Abigail will always put the people of Virginia first – she’ll work to lower costs, protect our fundamental rights, stand up for Virginia jobs, strengthen our public schools, and so much more. But this race is set to be the most competitive in the country this November — Cook Political Report is calling it a total TOSS UP. Right now, Abigail Spanberger and Winsome Sears are neck and neck — and with Trump’s MAGA machine ready to flood Virginia with dark money, we can’t afford to fall behind. [**We need your help. Will you contribute today between Abigail's campaign and Blue Amp Action to help us flip the Governor's office blue and elect Abigail Spanberger?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7b3c9a0c-b64b-4ffc-8213-93afeedd9f57/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [CONTRIBUTE $10](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1a21cd6f-7c27-4d67-a773-d17a43929b4f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [CONTRIBUTE $20](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te213dbcb-b6d0-431a-aee4-9b51dc1d7e79/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [CONTRIBUTE MORE](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5869f3c4-2aaf-49f4-b397-97e02a3eed82/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | Thank you, Spanberger for Governor HQ

PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/loc_em_fr_20250408_spanberger_b3_f1_s1_c1_92op_n-t1?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc8cdb24a-b439-447c-bf6b-31a8bcc97a53/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

subject: Oregon Democrats Want to BLOCK Voter Security
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE OREGON REPUBLICAN PARTY (COMMITTEE ID 379) 187 HIGH ST
body:
Do you agree?

| | | | [ ](https://secure.winred.com/oregon-republican-party/or-election-security-poll?utm_source=ac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20250407_ORGOP_ElectionSecurityPoll&utm_id=pc)
---
| | Friend, **Oregon Democrats are** _**DESPERATELY**_ _****_**trying to block efforts to secure our elections.** After President Trump signed an executive order requiring proof of citizenship to vote, Oregon Democrats called it a _**“threat to democracy.”**_ They claimed this would _**“undermine the integrity”**_ of Oregon’s elections and ___**“threaten the right to vote”**_ – all because we believe in secure, accountable elections. In their world, demanding election integrity isn’t reform – it’s a threat.

clean_body: Do you agree? | | | | | | Friend, Oregon Democrats are DESPERATELY **trying to block efforts to secure our elections. After President Trump signed an executive order requiring proof of citizenship to vote, Oregon Democrats called it a “threat to democracy.” They claimed this would “undermine the integrity” of Oregon’s elections and _“threaten the right to vote” – all because we believe in secure, accountable elections. In their world, demanding election integrity isn’t reform – it’s a threat. | | | | | Americans across the country support voter ID laws and stronger election safeguards. Why shouldn’t Oregon voters have the same protections? | | | | | Your input will help us push back against the radical Left and fight for secure, honest, and transparent elections right here in Oregon. name: Cory Booker
subject: I spoke for over 25 hours straight on the Senate floor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
This is a moment where we must all speak up.

|
---
Peter, it’s Cory. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105443229/538356317/1819535657?refcode=250408booker&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTFmYWQ3ZS1hOTE0LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=09j3eanA4jhhaLrtKJ_0-R-pe4ietuxluoF3jplXVKo=) Last week, I stepped off the Senate floor after speaking for over 25 hours straight — because I cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people. I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I said again and again in the Senate: this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must speak up. What’s clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard. I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment. It will show that we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered. It will show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together. We need to elect Democrats up and down the ballot to counter the Trump-Musk agenda and the millions GOP groups are preparing to spend. **[If you’re willing and able, support our movement for justice, body:
https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/april-doge-tracking-poll-/?utm_campaign=20250407&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A

Peter,

President Trump has made it clear that the work of DOGE will continue and that his cabinet secretaries will work to root out waste, fraud, and abuse throughout his term.

And with more than an estimated $140 billion in savings already cut from the federal bureaucracy, there is still much work to be done.

But through acts of domestic terrorism, radicals on the Left are trying to intimidate President Trump and DOGE leaders into stopping this important work.

This work is vitally necessary, and we cannot allow violence from the Left to silence us.

That is why I asked my staff to put together a short DOGE Tracking Poll. I want to know where you stand on DOGE and make sure that the Left doesn’t drown out your voice.

[So please take my official April DOGE Tracking Poll to make sure that my colleagues in Congress and I know exactly how you feel about the work President Trump is doing with DOGE.](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/april-doge-tracking-poll-/?utm_campaign=20250407&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A)

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: The People’s Town Halls
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
There’s something else happening across the country that’s giving me hope

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2518%2E4032634%2Ehl0Ysh)
---
This past weekend I spoke at the People’s Town Hall in Nashville to build opposition against Trump’s agenda that’s putting billionaires over working people. Tennesseans showed up to make their voices heard. Since their Republican representatives are too scared to hold town halls, I showed up to hear their stories and their concerns. I listened to their worries about Medicaid being cut in a state where half of all the babies get their healthcare through Medicaid. I heard stories about people’s Social Security benefits being threatened after years of paying into the system. I heard from parents about the Department of Education getting dismantled. I know things are scary right now — we’re in the middle of the dumbest trade war in American history. But there’s something else happening that’s giving me hope: People from all corners of the country are getting into this fight. Millions of people protested the actions of Trump and Musk this past weekend, in blue states, in red states, in purple states you name it. **That’s why these People’s Town Halls hosted by the Democratic National Committee are so powerful right now. Democrats are showing up and organizing everywhere, including in deep-red districts where Republicans think no one’s paying attention. This is how we can keep building a strong movement that will stop this billionaire takeover of our government.** [**If, and only if, you’re able to: I’m asking for your support right now to keep up our momentum. Will you split a donation between our campaign, the Democratic National Committee, and Tennessee Democrats so we can keep reaching voters and build the infrastructure we need to organize everywhere?**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2976?t=8&akid=2518%2E4032634%2Ehl0Ysh)

---
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_ |
---
| [DONATE NOW: $3](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2976?t=22&express_lane=true&amount=3&akid=2518%2E4032634%2Ehl0Ysh)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $15](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2976?t=24&express_lane=true&amount=15&akid=2518%2E4032634%2Ehl0Ysh)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $28](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2976?t=26&express_lane=true&amount=28&akid=2518%2E4032634%2Ehl0Ysh)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $50](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2976?t=28&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=2518%2E4032634%2Ehl0Ysh)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $100](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2976?t=18&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=2518%2E4032634%2Ehl0Ysh)
---
| [OTHER AMOUNT](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2976?t=20&express_lane=true&akid=2518%2E4032634%2Ehl0Ysh)
---

---
Where was Trump this past weekend as millions of Americans were protesting and the economy was in a free-fall following his dumb tariff policy? The golf course. Meanwhile, Republicans in Congress hid from their constituents to avoid simple questions about whether or not they’re going to let billionaires and giant corporations get away with larger tax breaks. Look, it doesn’t have to be this way. Congress has the power right now to reel this back in and stop this madness. With every Democrat on board, all we need are a handful of Republicans. So we’re mobilizing voters to keep up the pressure and demand their representatives show up for their constituents instead of bending the knee to Trump. Democrats may not be in the majority right now, but not having as much power as you want is not the same as having no power. We have power right now, and we need to use it. **We have the power right now to keep exposing Trump and Musk’s intentions to dismantle our government to set up a massive tax break for billionaires. We have the power to connect with voters across the country about how Trump and Musk’s actions are harming working people. And we have the power to build a massive grassroots movement fighting for an economy that works for everybody.** [**If you’re with me in this fight, and you’re in the place to make a donation right now please split a donation between our campaign, the Democratic National Committee, and Tennessee Democrats so we can keep telling our stories, keep organizing, keep fighting — and win.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2976?t=14&akid=2518%2E4032634%2Ehl0Ysh) At the end of my town hall, two little girls named Sydney and Sky stood up and asked how kids like them can help things get better. I told them: You have power. You know how to stand up for what is right. And you have a chance to stand up now. If all of us follow Sydney and Sky’s lead and ask how we can help make things better — I know our movement can make transformative change. Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth
| | | |
---
| [DONATE](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2976?t=12&akid=2518%2E4032634%2Ehl0Ysh)
---

name: Trump Showdown
subject: Donald Trump dropped this bombshell about Barron Trump running for office in the future

It's go time, team.
The Safeguard American Voter Eligibility (SAVE) Act is heading to the House floor THIS WEEK. Our representatives could be voting on this anti-voter bill as early as _tomorrow._
If you need a reminder, the SAVE Act is MAGA's latest attempt to curb our voting rights. The bill would require voters nationwide to provide either a passport or a birth certificate to vote. **The problem with that is millions of Americans either don't have access to those documents, can't afford them, or have changed their names since birth.**
The SAVE Act could be on the House floor in less than 24 hours. We have to let Congress know we won’t tolerate any threats to our voting rights.
[Someone you know WILL be negatively impacted by the SAVE Act. Add your name RIGHT NOW and demand that Congress vote NO on the SAVE Act.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105444201/538359684/-1042002750?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDc0NzJhOC1hYjE0LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iW8J_3vPnUKU0MJ8dm27MbPWs5MVUxE4EMI2X6cI1Lg=&emci=88323697-a114-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=207472a8-ab14-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=6787172)

clean_body: | It's go time, team. The Safeguard American Voter Eligibility (SAVE) Act is heading to the House floor THIS WEEK. Our representatives could be voting on this anti-voter bill as early as tomorrow. If you need a reminder, the SAVE Act is MAGA's latest attempt to curb our voting rights. The bill would require voters nationwide to provide either a passport or a birth certificate to vote. The problem with that is millions of Americans either don't have access to those documents, can't afford them, or have changed their names since birth. The SAVE Act could be on the House floor in less than 24 hours. We have to let Congress know we won’t tolerate any threats to our voting rights. | Let's do this, NextGen America | | = |

name: A.G. Holder Alert
subject: BREAKING: N.C. court sides with GOP attempt to overthrow an election.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
Here’s Attorney General Eric H. Holder, Jr.’s response:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105445402/538363122/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVlY2QxY2U4LWFjMTQtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=o3SXeh0Q1MFj9WttPLiXxABwIgEAZTR3MP8zw7sqWNU=&emci=488092f8-a214-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=eecd1ce8-ac14-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter — In a bombshell decision, a GOP majority-panel on the North Carolina Court of Appeals just sided with Republican Jefferson Griffin in his bid to overturn the results of the 2024 North Carolina Supreme Court election. As Attorney General Eric Holder said: **_“This shameful decision is simply wrong on the law, and a prelude to potential massive disenfranchisement. It silences the will of the voters, and ignores the results of multiple recounts, evaluations by the State Board of Elections, and the trial court — all seemingly to achieve partisan goals. The North Carolina Supreme Court must quickly reverse this abhorrent decision and protect the rights of the people.”_** Multiple recounts have confirmed that Democrat Justice Allison Riggs won fair and square. But Republicans have _refused_ to accept the results — and have spent nearly the last 5 months challenging more than 65,000 legitimate ballots in a desperate attempt to seize unearned power. **It’s an all-out assault on democracy — not only undermining the future of free and fair elections, but also the will of the voters in the state.** [**With democracy on the line in North Carolina, we need you with us. Rush a $30 donation now to protect our democracy and help elect fair maps champions nationwide like Justice Allison Riggs.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105445403/538363123/1925646595?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_AGNCRR_email_20250408-NDRC-Tier1-AGNCRR-NOR_56&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250408-NDRC-Tier1-AGNCRR-NOR_56&utm_campaign=AGNCRR&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVlY2QxY2U4LWFjMTQtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=o3SXeh0Q1MFj9WttPLiXxABwIgEAZTR3MP8zw7sqWNU=) Thanks so much — we’ll keep you updated on this one. clean_body: Here’s Attorney General Eric H. Holder, Jr.’s response: | Peter — In a bombshell decision, a GOP majority-panel on the North Carolina Court of Appeals just sided with Republican Jefferson Griffin in his bid to overturn the results of the 2024 North Carolina Supreme Court election. As Attorney General Eric Holder said: “This shameful decision is simply wrong on the law, and a prelude to potential massive disenfranchisement. It silences the will of the voters, and ignores the results of multiple recounts, evaluations by the State Board of Elections, and the trial court — all seemingly to achieve partisan goals. The North Carolina Supreme Court must quickly reverse this abhorrent decision and protect the rights of the people.” Multiple recounts have confirmed that Democrat Justice Allison Riggs won fair and square. But Republicans have refused to accept the results — and have spent nearly the last 5 months challenging more than 65,000 legitimate ballots in a desperate attempt to seize unearned power. It’s an all-out assault on democracy — not only undermining the future of free and fair elections, but also the will of the voters in the state. = Thanks so much — we’ll keep you updated on this one. **Before diving into the show, a critical call to action:** Demand Congress protect Medicaid. 72M Americans depend on Medicaid for their healthcare. Gutting Medicaid will devastate our nation. Take 5 seconds and email Congress now:
[Demand Congress Protect Medicaid](https://substack.com/redirect/9a31a91d-2cb3-4263-90f3-18160e90a987?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**On this week 's episode of The Qasim Rashid Show:**
* A tribute to my beloved father, Abdur Rashid Yahya, who passed on March 28
* An interview with Rep Mark Pocan (WI-2) on how Democrats must learn to fight
* A discussion with renowned human rights lawyer [Steven Donziger](https://open.substack.com/users/7445653-steven-donziger?utm_source=mentions) on climate justice, Palestinian rights, and protecting our democracy

body:
I'm an America First Conservative woman, and unlike the career politicians in DC, I'm not afraid to say it.| | | I'm an America First Conservative woman, and unlike the career politicians in DC, I'm not afraid to say it. | | | | I hate this message.

I'm serious. I rewrote it at least 10 times. I just couldn't get it right...

Asking you something like this doesn't come easy to me. See, I grew up shoveling horseshit for hours on end cleaning stalls as a teenager, so I understand the value of a hard day's work.

That's why I absolutely hate asking you for a single penny, **[but things are so dire that I'm having to suck it up and ask for help.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=f96c08b4f7a8441fbc7c39d63a1daac1&_e=tPeoaPSEF9KeDB9mJyFEhBns1-rLRNkjOzr6QoSA39JyH7RMDlI8f06IvrptrqGi7n6o-XP0bISaaScCOyztwXUuMVTBxackq5iRT7JqY1AIzZlRVqt57Xxkp57RdBACUnZCI2s2UzMcrIl2aAVtSV3cA3TAHE051sXYH1A1OttvuDu4VZG8hZh_nr3CrAjge5kBJ1f0Dy7CFC1ej5FhOOPRw7WCdyXQRnsUTHijFULB0H3zMrq2Ize1R4Xk3-XRoy8FSa8blAuEN-RyPz4ALh8pdn6_4vLjn4Pwlo6hrQA_LP-7VF_Z_fFXsgJtzrBJCqosVyhORKiD4LoeCnP1pSZpG3ZdC1H4PU8x18DSFnJzn2LgKCIxsqmxucW_Mu315pHmIQN7CPqtPtTmgUFP0VIjGjdsx-mMlV8CJFOw9XE%3D)**

Hi, my name is Lisa McClain.

I'm an America First Conservative woman, and unlike the career politicians in DC, I'm not afraid to say it. **I'm also not afraid to say that I'm a pro-life and pro-Trump Catholic in the battleground state of Michigan - the state that decided the 2024 Presidential election.**

That's why the Democrat Machine is already flooding my state with phony protesters, lying ads, and millions in dark money to flip it blue.

And as of this morning, all signs indicate our new MAGA Majority could be in real trouble.

So as much as I hate it, that's why I'm having to send this. **[**If we see a huge response from grassroots Patriots, we can counter this surge from these Left lunatics and protect President Trump and his America First agenda.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=f96c08b4f7a8441fbc7c39d63a1daac1&_e=tPeoaPSEF9KeDB9mJyFEhBns1-rLRNkjOzr6QoSA39JyH7RMDlI8f06IvrptrqGi7n6o-XP0bISaaScCOyztwXUuMVTBxackq5iRT7JqY1AIzZlRVqt57Xxkp57RdBACUnZCI2s2UzMcrIl2aAVtSV3cA3TAHE051sXYH1A1OttvuDu4VZG8hZh_nr3CrAjge5kBJ1f0Dy7CFC1ej5FhOOPRw7WCdyXQRnsUTHijFULB0H3zMrq2Ize1R4Xk3-XRb8sMPRCMXQJDvvaAsEjWdREKBqO0j2toUJ3h5G2vxl2DwRZchNdF-VrUbyOi8hP-5bpg2TM5B2kTvLBiri0opiT1817rR4i0pLj2X-GO7ulooIqMBMzeEFxu3dSjcZqblqsINf2_RQmh-6gWovyExkACpXo7l1CosU-NEbgRV6c%3D)**

Look - as a Conservative, I hate asking others for help. And I wouldn't be doing this if it wasn't absolutely critical to saving America. But as someone who shoveled manure as a teenager, there is nothing I won't do when it comes to fighting for the forgotten men and women of America.

clean_body: I'm an America First Conservative woman, and unlike the career politicians in DC, I'm not afraid to say it.| | | I'm an America First Conservative woman, and unlike the career politicians in DC, I'm not afraid to say it. | | | | I hate this message. I'm serious. I rewrote it at least 10 times. I just couldn't get it right... Asking you something like this doesn't come easy to me. See, I grew up shoveling horseshit for hours on end cleaning stalls as a teenager, so I understand the value of a hard day's work. That's why I absolutely hate asking you for a single penny, Hi, my name is Lisa McClain. I'm an America First Conservative woman, and unlike the career politicians in DC, I'm not afraid to say it. I'm also not afraid to say that I'm a pro-life and pro-Trump Catholic in the battleground state of Michigan - the state that decided the 2024 Presidential election. That's why the Democrat Machine is already flooding my state with phony protesters, lying ads, and millions in dark money to flip it blue. And as of this morning, all signs indicate our new MAGA Majority could be in real trouble. So as much as I hate it, that's why I'm having to send this. Look - as a Conservative, I hate asking others for help. And I wouldn't be doing this if it wasn't absolutely critical to saving America. But as someone who shoveled manure as a teenager, there is nothing I won't do when it comes to fighting for the forgotten men and women of America. | | Sorry to bother you with this, but I'm praying for a strong response, Lisa McClain | | | | | | | Paid for by Lisa McClain for Congress PO Box 380890 Clinton Twp, MI 48030 |

Peter -

I'm sitting down to write to you today with a heart full of gratitude and a spirit that's more fired up than ever. Since announcing my run for Governor of Virginia, the outpouring of support has been nothing short of incredible.

I've received thousands of messages from folks all across the Commonwealth - It's humbling to have the prayers and support of so many patriots.

As a Marine and a proud conservative, I know that I have the experience and the conviction to lead our great Commonwealth forward. I'm committed to protecting the promise of Virginia, where every child can get a world-class education, every business can thrive, and every family can live in safety and prosperity.

But I didn't expect the rush of enthusiasm that's swept across our campaign. _**From the bottom of my heart, thank you for being part of this movement.**_ Your encouragement, your volunteer hours, and your generous financial support are the fuel that will propel us ever forward.

Now, I need to ask for your help again. We have a long and challenging road ahead, and it's going to take every ounce of our energy and resources to win. _**[_**Can you make a donation today to help us keep the momentum going? Every gift, no matter how small, brings us one step closer to victory.**_](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=227a3d87ed6d491e9b1e3e698dfcf11a&_e=ydJ4x6LsWsOa-PQOjwqdnGNcAWZTfFs7GX4lvxnUub4ydFpr_KoZFq5uEPMNTypu5MQX7R-vKPdS_laG9rbR572Qd8NwWpVTQvjZEUFrYrdwmd3ETcyYUi5Fjkwmbi4Zl2-T3CH3_O5NhZ2bhL0KBg8J7S8SF9mCNfPmSjCOa4mqm1fRm7tyOeo2KMfEANVkdDCIrkR76BKRevTZ7FOvEUbtF8gBp0ttRKjX7cC5sfngc-K7UuJ7qZOeiHwI6B1dyFUCAPDpytE-MOauz1YzcdYZ8kW4Bod2rBOYnj8KHJQ4ljVl15RlUi_bMinb099GoeM3SmAZvlpptdLnOh3aI9m9P8qoHkLzR2z7E0m7mhSJqFAR8gaGgloPBn9POPjZpJ38EEcMRMTVfbRWN2rCXpqfrSwMcs4SSSSNdrdXNzFr6j2mCNh1KJi2y_ttHiSO)**_

body:
The VA is out of line. And I’m leading the fight back.| | | Friend, When 52 state Attorneys General agree, you know it’s big.

_**[I’m leading a coalition of the AGs of all 50 States (and two territories!) to take on the Department of Veterans Affairs for their denial of full G.I. Bill benefits to our veterans.](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/s/c/UObmbbVhRpVZCuAbin9LYN0w8-hPjgQweYkM6wNkP4xlGzJhKPuX9tMfNjgptcWMvfpxjnpPZNzSEU--gwg22ZutAoRCks_Jr04C5W6yHWVTFh9wHxlxZILBsgV9aE6w0qZ8qc70ngH31SFRXLufFv1wGH-mobVfVzWoWj9nc7mnoc3JsQMVjDnZijL2SdiwjYUTGQPtKf4xnch-x0QnOvibrS0IElgA0s5R863UxnJa5bdbNmF0IJ_THcIjEwZgGn7LQBJD-Xuf7-DYnUEWnlRzDRzVG2MrZMbENZMs2CNIOmvm4cXlyAbBnhCdlYd8CNzLuJ102Q_irjHGh1sKIykc1GP54XykcUliv5-o-r5dkrQAhE9UE8wOLwE/ihICYvTI-mI3A5nxBJZmWPMnMy30OpQA/7)**_

Having deja vu? That’s because I already took them on in 2023 and won for our veterans in the Supreme Court.

But now, the VA has taken an overly strict interpretation of the ruling to deny them once again. The VA is ignoring Supreme Court precedent, defying the law, & dishonoring our veterans’ service.

**I’ve got news for them:** **I’m not giving up.** I’m proud to lead this coalition, because this fight is important.

__Virginia is home to hundreds of thousands of veterans, and I will always stand up to ensure they receive the benefits they earned.__

Our veterans fought for us. I’ll **always** fight for them. 🇺🇸

_**[_**Will you join me, friend?**_](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/s/c/MZYDRKNYpgEb7H4dIkIhoTb2iiTY7h777a8PP7lqE6BHLSnuDQyT6Q4irOzkais3ywT5MHPjprRRhNmx320Mik5CsAc0WwvwnRhNsiH34llqW_lNiQZ8MWP0uVMloA7BB6kElMlqLGzrytcYPAqQiOiuxeYDJ2s9KRwkQy8G0bHD8A5Bknrz7H_AXJmL5OC6CSrQtJJRltJEXw8iaKvAxaMYNhn7nC0w5cWFCvolnO4d0l9d66JROjydbyPaZYowKplCP0iX2egrRK6xnql8u65utK3wA4ZdE5qwBCb3b8dLzJTyliRlo04Cr14SaC_PJ3la53LbIUum_O-EApjODYZ8nZF_C9s7gNf-e76zi_xwIkUSCzoWbrkNCAw/X6Q1wqvyO_iPGpEfLREEqOSHsrUt9c7p/7)**_

body:
This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it start to finish:

| |
---
| | | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/baMPf3s558I3m5OOlasU9t1lLJdJyDnEsY4AF8GhpTCRVemD7Giru1Vr_R0HmgxBaL1aSMrdWXVEPQDHHnFvCH13gv9pEA5GS-okLcSt-Ni5jG7i4qdmlJyOzTc4LWkq_McP4CthIY36mucww9qx6O7NGnluqj63cK4JxvUjJXLREfp48zj4Cd7Ewtbx-_UqfstVqHH_tv2CNuzBZH_ANPhmmFjQLQ8ohg_BZ3UZ-jNkftJJ0YWTFZDLSwtE3Tu6XQoxN8GzO1Htew_QJKJq4BVKVOe0HLaS6pbWrSX0VhbBS8Ksh_NXnxtHeTnuHE3eEaA1f7RcPf2N831NN16ONUvSykugryY6vw7IftP6eVnJvK_SN2uP-klzVCOosE6LtfFY5SkFdI6TqyBmUPUVQdxOwTK41kFY2hLzvBn7ZNMJ7ajRKhLR3Xqj8ePynFzRvd2hhmys9695t9bCYxO5F9EwgFlBHL4y-Omk-3Frag7u8LEXiyNcyD-yhDnuHSpYaSM/UsX67zuHy-qGOp76I1gQzk-u7voCeAlN/7 "Vice President JD Vance")
---

My fellow Americans - it is Vice President JD Vance.

_**[This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/AWqRkl4lSuBcQKITUfJ1MvBM-wGNpLbaFZStS_J15ScsXx7veDcC8AB_NaIXnPqTSmVCIhu-0zGWsjWjXZ6Cq01Ih4J2z0LyvLSkbvz8ntverjr-UWXYbKSoo2LmmcZAKhEeaFzb3OeJOJw3SY80SfPm46_jOBqoiGomXAVjlIfWeO_TAr6SeDpy8oMXQbGHbQyR49e2HysYQWEuS_dpgGJOCsOSf_biPDyPJQxP6FdxznIxP4A3luw1c_YJmzYF2PPCH626ODDdT9NkXRG34qQyvVkTYwa9jTgax6KFVyUq-mBjDBJlVr7Kqyg_C_dcb9dzk_SXsP2RLIttrXofPxitVXFdFOGhTYfVdVgcRKddUV0mT9xn_bTxtOfWy2V-506bwbgPYyiTJzZwWabfLeSQ7MH2gjwaH7PjKtQN8cFwFaAjuLGogmOBwRz5s4UWxfAIj7qLsfh6Rp-B-LnZvosIwLVFFgJDgRw-uljrCJNbcZiaoq45hYSSuFUuiurQSUQ/vTvdpJJthz0Dpm6nVx4nbJ9kcw9En9FH/7 "This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.")**_

It wasn't easy telling the world I grew up poor, raised by my Mamaw while my mother struggled with addiction.

It wasn't exactly the prep school/trust fund/summer-in-the-Hamptons upbringing that is commonplace in DC.

**But I felt called to tell my story. Warts and all.** I felt led to speak out because I think millions of Americans share stories like mine. Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11.

_As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC. _

I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you.

I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great.

_**[Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/s6xTl_Fxtq74NQCI6PrzCT1eEqJn4LZl40_XxeKc1TPx3amQeYGLSCESdU4mxaxO823DTLwLh58vbFW8J9m5DtxJex-YF6SnG8u6uaMWHs8eZ2uFWQoXrfPTD5EimFCktNpSmhM5go4d-gzD_CBAuSTwbtrlA7xQRDZjFF1h-n0j5XwKplsGfgrcfB1VOsNG9-usGAcqP2Wbg166QF8CxyPZ734KSwOcI__n7t-JbmQs2gu7UHrWWqAkwTouAQivTu1V5KMZcOIZv_THU0nsDs5XJF7K1452ayRlaf31YSJbWfrUmLZ-UiMSg93CDfO33NNauSanIdJtOx4wh3YmHdqsjETl4PCysbPQVgtOfR93jT6rL4-DKz00djUoPTBBDRNkz9FaskduNHY-NWjYmIomk803vnTZdRsYTpHprqsNRRSVwysXbcJuDH4nyx8Ig_zAFPhQr_dj3-5eIbFm9kuSbA2OR454CK2yfzUC8gKI1sDZs4jlphSEp6c2dQse4JM/xuO7TdtTUiNigNssXMte0FQ4fR7eGxbi/7 "Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.")**_

We're coming out of the most expensive election in American history. I mean that. Kamala Harris spent over a billion dollars against us. It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win.

So now we're forced to rebuild.

The Democrat Machine is **ALREADY** crushing us in fundraising, **ALREADY** outspending us in key races, and **ALREADY** building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections.

At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable.

So here's my final pitch to you:

_**[I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise - for the FIRST TIME since the election - to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/forwGSwLq_4KK8vBhUNqkAZEU4pl9BEvAJ4dbDheXDfYsGxmk9U6sj8iePzRorEzm_dRWndORnQH7SLlRZXoekbGHYgqz36PJbix2MKN0WtJGHnu1vfz-3QU3rGpyg9S0SmL272NREHJZiSpOR41MblydxvffCv59xIDIFfZujU53Khy8PRA7D0oHHEw_mRrB03WXBw7O6Hr3sU7ajccNMltmM8Cm0SXI0i9yqd5CkFkAQtrC3lbvp2KeF55biHRoz0jJDVSj6ZPAnmTbtQVSy4M2WXJpWJp0R95vK1vdzfXgu7FCBJ5vwEdiuXAbuHG-kQHWmOamzY-XmgHf4y0XxfR5BNyuTHBofgkrjNRGIk898E-VIhs-NwBerjhOHyvUB2NmwiQvIBInjW2EauLKMva-0-O2xdQvCjNkk-pigL0n92H5dzTjvNoF2V88NL4a2XWMPpTC1yiq_D5FdThHdCNiKUQ4v8Oao5Lm9EJyObBHdL_NsNRY3PFH-m28_fHh-M/hRiSvrKQ23ob1ZX-OZ6o2aXVPJgsltPU/7 "I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise – for the FIRST TIME since the election – to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.")**_ I understand that's ambitious. But if that's what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican House for his entire second term, it's a no-brainer I'll do what it takes to win.

Do you think you can help us get there?

_Whether it 's $5 or $500 - the amount you give isn't nearly as important as how many folks step up:_
---
| | | [PLEASE JOIN US](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/OxRgXI2wW87wSWyzWX_Wh3L4MNJ5ZA3pITrDeK-oHbjT3K0v1P44h6ULaFhSBUECkgq_OeJJwl7r6y6fTxKb7bNerJ6jF6ROsRK3Qz4OaN3yDgoBOvz_Aq68LDckwTMvuWPJzc522mZIz20rvC5QpAyBsX08Dah_J5rgZmPP4sngb8OK05nXCSQPaRN1P3kaXIFR5AwwkHAZiAu6LGqvpeJEvcai-BztyRxLJtudtsQfQB15az0J9DCST-E39u_j9pHwwSWpBh_B2b_mLx1vDpPHif1tGjWYghKCUJLxwCNyoQ-zptCFrcHGkClS2DcCKjt4XyuWjJJt1QK9j7esrex_D9annZC80ahr5R5h8DSwW8TQXhqhbYj-70P-ys96M9v0KTb8vClkbVg0JWrK4E2xJT54LAQ4aHCE8bvQfUL5ph1em2K2HfEzBUVgRJ0n1THqgPA4cn3ef8rCp7_mJ6kd3soeSFJEoLcc8vgBH6Ah8ivyvFyY7PAEYmmYutGrmZA/DdMTRhSs402rPCQhLBjwsWc3NtYR4dxo/7 "PLEASE JOIN US")
---
Look, you've probably heard bits and pieces of my story at this point.

If my humble beginnings taught me anything, it's to never give up, never surrender, and never go down without a fight. That's why I'm partnering with Steve Scalise to help lay the critical groundwork we need to win.

_**[I don't ever want you to donate more than you can afford - but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/TM8RhFz0FSNaXIu1QaIQ3BY3AfAoF-3G37CcbitL0AQY6auOln1zQ01Gg2NIwYtkZawRTRX1ddm7sVPuv1lZf_pDXnfM0WX3F2byRFjuI4gIlAUTT_5OJxQa7vsUYhKnKIt-2JKibHHUg5_A4fUcWtaOfF6qCa0y5L8c63w-tHIxCstwqLhBTIxbThaHB_af3_f0uQcic50dqhyYcj7p6cK1Nne8m7HXigg98a6HRDraEkly0uuPJU6WdB89ifWSqXazrABQvkRkQ3DiHpO2LKxlTiAxJ7mMQC70SSvMb9Tz3JOMqe4QqNFxojt9Ju5mPbq_CMk8gBUfHgZgyVl3t52Mit3bFyN1sNq5zWX6W-zMFAysmajv3sIqtRHvoTt_sA26Uy4ZHUBpM9--ueV2Nkrq8JzoD9pCyVAflfGeIPOtX9LRirxzeGkfs3Gz6N1qgwIWpX4j_AWh2WVQhZb4INfeB8Wpv4KskRJ-k7wum0n2lFjoOoBPGcOmTs8iF0Hk-2k/gonDLOvveGxE6yZLAiRyZnpIbuG4_oWs/7 "I don’t ever want you to donate more than you can afford – but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated.")**_

Regardless, it's an honor to fight alongside you.

God bless America,
Vice President JD Vance

clean_body: This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it start to finish: | | | | | | "Vice President JD Vance" My fellow Americans - it is Vice President JD Vance. "This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish." It wasn't easy telling the world I grew up poor, raised by my Mamaw while my mother struggled with addiction. It wasn't exactly the prep school/trust fund/summer-in-the-Hamptons upbringing that is commonplace in DC. But I felt called to tell my story. Warts and all. I felt led to speak out because I think millions of Americans share stories like mine. Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11. As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC. I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you. I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great. "Which brings me to the purpose of my email today." We're coming out of the most expensive election in American history. I mean that. Kamala Harris spent over a billion dollars against us. It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win. So now we're forced to rebuild. The Democrat Machine is ALREADY crushing us in fundraising, ALREADY outspending us in key races, and ALREADY building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections. At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable. So here's my final pitch to you: "I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise – for the FIRST TIME since the election – to raise a million dollars by the end of the month." I understand that's ambitious. But if that's what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican House for his entire second term, it's a no-brainer I'll do what it takes to win. Do you think you can help us get there? Whether it 's $5 or $500 - the amount you give isn't nearly as important as how many folks step up: | | | "PLEASE JOIN US" Look, you've probably heard bits and pieces of my story at this point. If my humble beginnings taught me anything, it's to never give up, never surrender, and never go down without a fight. That's why I'm partnering with Steve Scalise to help lay the critical groundwork we need to win. "I don’t ever want you to donate more than you can afford – but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated." Regardless, it's an honor to fight alongside you. God bless America, Vice President JD Vance | | | "PLEASE JOIN US" | | | "First 100 Day Survey" It 's Majority Leader Scalise. We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my "First 100 Days Survey"** so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first. | | | "CLICK TO BEGIN" - STEVE SCALISE | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. name: Voter Verification Notice
subject: Verification Needed for 2025
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj1lmufwtmup27g75rm7eamevzsrkay44896rjs6sqnahaua6ny5ner9yhnjwg5ie9qesb39gxl4cn6im8313&__stmp=suf0yj&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suf0yj&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6dkud83lwmiamssd7yd923aofio7i1bvbjwxlv7z6mjfcm0v3229taidlob9jt4cj9zj3otqqnsrirzaakddebh3aasmwyucham56gd0dp415igxwlm00alhjyn8nhpv4mo1z7uqdby2lg06l6256&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suf0yj&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suf0yj&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suf0yj&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suf0yj&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6dkud83lwmiamssd7yd923ap6m8481oeumlqiyza77yixbmozlpe6xqco8ceq1zo3ui611sv2tx4kcrzuix06ul486xursxputemnvqnsgbkjsz7i71igc98hi28wcnj01ehndhkoowolftadjbbk&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suf0yj&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suf0yj&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

[Supreme Court, in a win for Trump, lets admin cancel $65M in teaching grants](https://substack.com/redirect/1c155f2c-d7c0-4b70-a0a7-4592bc690813?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) \- via Politico
[EXCLUSIVE: Trump Admin Freezes Hundreds Of Millions Of Dollars To Another Ivy League School](https://substack.com/redirect/e94a9078-e8bb-4111-b5ea-1c37cc608430?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) \- via Daily Caller
[Senate unveils new blueprint for mega-MAGA package](https://substack.com/redirect/6dfe56f3-7a28-46be-a885-94ec39c4f559?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) \- via Axios
## This week on The Sean Spicer Show...
Tonight we've got a whole show on the conversation around having soda on SNAP benefits, tomorrow an update from Kevin Hassett the Director of the National Economic Council at the White House, our Thursday panel, and a conversation on Friday about the coverup of Biden's decline.
[Turn on your notifications now](https://substack.com/redirect/d2154e5a-31e7-421b-9082-cffe6d479d10?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
## Help me raise money to end cancer...
I'm walking in this year's Purple Stride 5k in memory of my dad, it would be a lot to me if you would join my team.
[Support here](https://substack.com/redirect/31ed8cea-d44c-4b61-b534-3d376a0a9c16?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
## Join me TOMORROW - April 9th at 8pm ET for a Zoom call...
**Im hosting a zoom call at 8pm ET on Wednesday April 9th and you are invited!**
In the past year I have made wellness a priority. I have also made it priority to support companies that aren't opposed to my values (like Walmart & Target). **There is an alternative to where you buy your personal care, household, cleaners, and all of your essentials.**
**I found a better way. An American manufacturer that 's been around for 39 years with conservative values that the MAHA movement can get behind.**
**The products are more natural, more effective and more affordable.**
**It supports American jobs and families with nontoxic products for every area of your home and life. Join me and over 2 million Americans and make a difference when you shop for things you 're going to shop for anyway.**
**Space is limited RSVP now by texting "RSVP" to (276) 500-1185 to claim your spot.**
## Tariffs: The good, the bad and the hypocrites
If you've tuned in to any mainstream or social media in recent days, you've probably gotten the impression that America is going through an unprecedented economic apocalypse.
And to be honest, watching the markets can be a bit unsettling right now.
What's going on?
A couple weeks ago I talked about the rationale behind Trump's tariffs: returning manufacturing to America and leveling the global economic playing field.
On April 2, "Liberation Day," these reciprocal tariffs went into effect, putting other countries on notice that the U.S. is no longer going to be walked over.
In the wake of these tariffs the stock market took a dive -- a predictable result and something that Trump warned would happen short term.
Here's the thing.
While the talk of restoring American greatness is easy to swallow, the process of getting there is not going to be easy. After years of dependency on foreign countries and outsourcing manufacturing, the return to an America-first economy is going to come with some growing pains.
That hardly means it's not worth it, or that these policies aren't working.
It just means that when it comes to the economy, we aren't going to get the kind of instant gratification fix that we want.
The short term pain that people are feeling in the stock market is real, and it's certainly unfortunate.
But does it warrant the kind of reaction we've seen on the Left?
Democrats and the mainstream media have both univocally condemned Trump's use of tariffs, as well as raised wild alarms that recent stock market trends are a precursor to a new Great Depression.
(For an interesting bit of context, check out [this 1996 clip](https://substack.com/redirect/68e367db-3e23-4491-b232-812051404585?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of Nancy Pelosi discussing tariffs and the trade deficit with China)
What's their angle?...

## Follow Clarence Thomas’ Lead – RedState
I cannot say enough good things about Justice Clarence Thomas, so let me state my bias up front. I believe Justice Thomas is one of the greatest Americans to ever serve this country. I have a signed copy of "My Grandfather's Son" with a personal message from him inscribed. ## Trump Executive Order Aims to Reinvigorate Coal Industry
President Donald Trump is set to sign an executive order Tuesday to “reinvigorate affordable, reliable, and clean coal,” press secretary Karoline Leavitt confirmed on X. “Coal is critical to achieving American energy and [artificial intelligence] dominance,” Leavitt said. The order directs the chair of the National Energy Dominance Council to designate coal as a “mineral” [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/53iwRr7jVxfI16K00_DNkHDjsPYVAVuDE2tkPcvxeuWncjaq5U4ZW0irl6iACjV2GCwyx9Vn_fDFUtrFNeG3lLsWlUXGKDsQBjEp7fffCPzrmm9Ic5LmWYDSgITycmFUIQh9S-xqCzmgeepOcUCioY2MxpycO1RkC29E4hC4EYDKa3DLvAzRxK3Lwijkm6kgmWjSwfWXLC56_Mi49ZhHGI-daq-8L0vLjA-4DApD7tMJGkpn7rzxN-GueLphRom3DFOq2cwouplPsz-ngtEMHMEAc9JeQZBJcM3_C89RY1tQXJrMC8nozO9-qdrNv23EfrKqAiWxRSq6tPpds3GbFPk/SX36f3-hfmk0YCLM47mhEnqNPbBtaPww/7)

## Illegal Tries Kicking at Kristi Noem, But She’s Unphased – ‘Yeah, You’re Scaring Me With Your Crocs’ – RedState
Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem took part in early-morning deportation raids in Arizona Tuesday, almost getting kicked by an illegal alien as he was detained in the back of a police vehicle. Noem, who takes part in the raids to remind criminal aliens that there's a new sheriff in [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/9ipwaIBjhXfzUY8nMwPPySXhHvxjim0ucAhQWd5T2NDenZRwSreKb9Fn-eCMNvorJ0CXCl9zUcHdIyk3I0zPHp9XYaQCeDPfQHOWRfmxNpE8ja5Fmylzucb90WWpt6mbZ06shDQw_Icdp4n_Jf3GXvv7XN7pbul4TDkx8yd-Ud4OERSWpl46rhcH_ryepYe-I6wgYk_fHXG7jWB3tyJGSpxxVB4VRtl1UjSybODKLYMHXISGb7UJTnCZ5Nk74JW8yVSvR3s-gml95rfhZ-dNiJhCBl9ggHGUjhewHIF-jacygQVBKxUCzhlvbhCW6FlYQrkxhU7AuUj_X4ydgtxtiDzGolX0jSm2cyMSp3YdBQwc3xPvW1j09Y03cAW14gqMgM_BLUjv3BmsRprQ1Zw/tUy6Mrs_UX91ZhdrW5VMdtiJRTJ2SgWz/7)

## Johnson Aims to Win Over GOP Rebels on Senate Budget Plan
Republican leadership in the House has its hands full this week. House Speaker Mike Johnson is trying to get about a dozen fiscally conservative Republicans to sign off on the Senate’s budget plan by the end of the week. President Donald Trump has urged the House to “quickly” pass the plan that the Senate approved on [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/-7RY_78G-Jo2gf2hWcSOWH_G4r_9MO3kZIvCVg8f6A5q74h52PX9h8KHBBKvh_RgRg37jqjyy4O4tAE1K4Xdhh8pZ0oN4UHIrHAKY_w93FzhrahVfkiLm38G3Japy49D0umk9l3hP-_Z6uQJOTuWdE1ydMdXBpQPt7p7jJPG-6-xnzmz6US2L3xehBYPeSKIl_hlqTCGgKFAuLwvSIj8vq8qCn9E9PNveZB6xCOxQMfYyKGl8uUoPJRU8bzcDWM-sHJIvbiaG09jnkUIc_BK2JpjnHYRMpoctMSU3Y-IPqwohnENOrUCO3OW0JrRqvi8Oy1USrsRp69v-BxHp9s9J3T0/mfDyk1MSUbb3xJdVmVuzcA3V704vl2bm/7)

name: Vice President JD Vance
subject: God led me to share my story with the world – warts and all
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it start to finish:

| |
---
| | | | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/AKO6Vhd6-JFSqpAAMyLmfw~~/AARclBA~/jyVkNeSvf74sc68zqiaM34nfOWG5iKZnfsyaZIbUvE_39voErz708vyxf4myj94apJwhH4cG0bay9Oa90pCiF1hWMuHheIOwmPh5TK4H9cTjbIq2LZPm4cp0BrpLUMQ4vYp_W-AXkAfOUHNnjL9PfcOvuqCpNtti8tRPYMyupyUaX4qAFojms4haq82jPwEJHxdn2JJMov26ipWCfsucxudFoW4uC_JSp0dNR_YQ_xyCju05idSQPrDhF7tNnJ2BeBDDZbnKuOSWhbYHQp_yc1DG8LClVFaLHJnfaPHuDZn-zXXK-B82MG3J4TrVvALxtQ8yFz8aELIFxc5bAIrOv974KwmnOaFsSV3LJih0PRU~ "Vice President JD Vance")
---

My fellow Americans - it is Vice President JD Vance.

_**[This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/AKO6Vhd6-JFSqpAAMyLmfw~~/AARclBA~/jyVkNeSvf74sc68zqiaM34nfOWG5iKZnfsyaZIbUvE_39voErz708vyxf4myj94apJwhH4cG0bay9Oa90pCiF1hWMuHheIOwmPh5TK4H9cTjbIq2LZPm4cp0BrpLUMQ4vYp_W-AXkAfOUHNnjL9PfcOvuqCpNtti8tRPYMyupyUaX4qAFojms4haq82jPwEJHxdn2JJMov26ipWCfsucxudFoW4uC_JSp0dNR_YQ_xyCju05idSQPrDhF7tNnJ2BeBDDZbnKuOSWhbYHQp_yc1DG8LClVFaLHJnfaPHuDZn-zXXK-B82MG3J4TrVvALxtQ8yFz8aELIFxc5bAIrOv974KwmnOaFsSV3LJih0PRU~ "This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.")**_

It wasn't easy telling the world I grew up poor, raised by my Mamaw while my mother struggled with addiction.

It wasn't exactly the prep school/trust fund/summer-in-the-Hamptons upbringing that is commonplace in DC.

**But I felt called to tell my story. Warts and all.** I felt led to speak out because I think millions of Americans share stories like mine. Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11.

_As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC. _

I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you.

I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great.

_**[Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/AKO6Vhd6-JFSqpAAMyLmfw~~/AARclBA~/jyVkNeSvf74sc68zqiaM34nfOWG5iKZnfsyaZIbUvE_39voErz708vyxf4myj94apJwhH4cG0bay9Oa90pCiF1hWMuHheIOwmPh5TK4H9cTjbIq2LZPm4cp0BrpLUMQ4vYp_W-AXkAfOUHNnjL9PfcOvuqCpNtti8tRPYMyupyUaX4qAFojms4haq82jPwEJHxdn2JJMov26ipWCfsucxudFoW4uC_JSp0dNR_YQ_xyCju05idSQPrDhF7tNnJ2BeBDDZbnKuOSWhbYHQp_yc1DG8LClVFaLHJnfaPHuDZn-zXXK-B82MG3J4TrVvALxtQ8yFz8aELIFxc5bAIrOv974KwmnOaFsSV3LJih0PRU~ "Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.")**_

We're coming out of the most expensive election in American history. I mean that. Kamala Harris spent over a billion dollars against us. It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win.

So now we're forced to rebuild.

The Democrat Machine is **ALREADY** crushing us in fundraising, **ALREADY** outspending us in key races, and **ALREADY** building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections.

At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable.

So here's my final pitch to you:

_**[I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise - for the FIRST TIME since the election - to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/AKO6Vhd6-JFSqpAAMyLmfw~~/AARclBA~/jyVkNeSvf74sc68zqiaM34nfOWG5iKZnfsyaZIbUvE_39voErz708vyxf4myj94apJwhH4cG0bay9Oa90pCiF1hWMuHheIOwmPh5TK4H9cTjbIq2LZPm4cp0BrpLUMQ4vYp_W-AXkAfOUHNnjL9PfcOvuqCpNtti8tRPYMyupyUaX4qAFojms4haq82jPwEJHxdn2JJMov26ipWCfsucxudFoW4uC_JSp0dNR_YQ_xyCju05idSQPrDhF7tNnJ2BeBDDZbnKuOSWhbYHQp_yc1DG8LClVFaLHJnfaPHuDZn-zXXK-B82MG3J4TrVvALxtQ8yFz8aELIFxc5bAIrOv974KwmnOaFsSV3LJih0PRU~ "I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise – for the FIRST TIME since the election – to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.")**_ I understand that's ambitious. But if that's what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican House for his entire second term, it's a no-brainer I'll do what it takes to win.

Do you think you can help us get there?

_Whether it 's $5 or $500 - the amount you give isn't nearly as important as how many folks step up:_
---
| | | [PLEASE JOIN US](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/AKO6Vhd6-JFSqpAAMyLmfw~~/AARclBA~/jyVkNeSvf74sc68zqiaM34nfOWG5iKZnfsyaZIbUvE_39voErz708vyxf4myj94apJwhH4cG0bay9Oa90pCiF1hWMuHheIOwmPh5TK4H9cTjbIq2LZPm4cp0BrpLUMQ4vYp_W-AXkAfOUHNnjL9PfcOvuqCpNtti8tRPYMyupyUaX4qAFojms4haq82jPwEJHxdn2JJMov26ipWCfsucxudFoW4uC_JSp0dNR_YQ_xyCju05idSQPrDhF7tNnJ2BeBDDZbnKuOSWhbYHQp_yc1DG8LClVFaLHJnfaPHuDZn-zXXK-B82MG3J4TrVvALxtQ8yFz8aELIFxc5bAIrOv974KwmnOaFsSV3LJih0PRU~ "PLEASE JOIN US")
---
Look, you've probably heard bits and pieces of my story at this point.

If my humble beginnings taught me anything, it's to never give up, never surrender, and never go down without a fight. That's why I'm partnering with Steve Scalise to help lay the critical groundwork we need to win.

_**[I don't ever want you to donate more than you can afford - but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/AKO6Vhd6-JFSqpAAMyLmfw~~/AARclBA~/jyVkNeSvf74sc68zqiaM34nfOWG5iKZnfsyaZIbUvE_39voErz708vyxf4myj94apJwhH4cG0bay9Oa90pCiF1hWMuHheIOwmPh5TK4H9cTjbIq2LZPm4cp0BrpLUMQ4vYp_W-AXkAfOUHNnjL9PfcOvuqCpNtti8tRPYMyupyUaX4qAFojms4haq82jPwEJHxdn2JJMov26ipWCfsucxudFoW4uC_JSp0dNR_YQ_xyCju05idSQPrDhF7tNnJ2BeBDDZbnKuOSWhbYHQp_yc1DG8LClVFaLHJnfaPHuDZn-zXXK-B82MG3J4TrVvALxtQ8yFz8aELIFxc5bAIrOv974KwmnOaFsSV3LJih0PRU~ "I don’t ever want you to donate more than you can afford – but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated.")**_

Regardless, it's an honor to fight alongside you.

God bless America,
