clean_body: This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it start to finish: | | | | | | ~ "Vice President JD Vance" My fellow Americans - it is Vice President JD Vance. ~ "This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish." It wasn't easy telling the world I grew up poor, raised by my Mamaw while my mother struggled with addiction. It wasn't exactly the prep school/trust fund/summer-in-the-Hamptons upbringing that is commonplace in DC. But I felt called to tell my story. Warts and all. I felt led to speak out because I think millions of Americans share stories like mine. Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11. As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC. I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you. I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great. ~ "Which brings me to the purpose of my email today." We're coming out of the most expensive election in American history. I mean that. Kamala Harris spent over a billion dollars against us. It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win. So now we're forced to rebuild. The Democrat Machine is ALREADY crushing us in fundraising, ALREADY outspending us in key races, and ALREADY building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections. At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable. So here's my final pitch to you: ~ "I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise – for the FIRST TIME since the election – to raise a million dollars by the end of the month." I understand that's ambitious. But if that's what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican House for his entire second term, it's a no-brainer I'll do what it takes to win. Do you think you can help us get there? Whether it 's $5 or $500 - the amount you give isn't nearly as important as how many folks step up: | | | ~ "PLEASE JOIN US" Look, you've probably heard bits and pieces of my story at this point. If my humble beginnings taught me anything, it's to never give up, never surrender, and never go down without a fight. That's why I'm partnering with Steve Scalise to help lay the critical groundwork we need to win. ~ "I don’t ever want you to donate more than you can afford – but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated." Regardless, it's an honor to fight alongside you. God bless America, Vice President JD Vance | | | ~ "PLEASE JOIN US" | | | "First 100 Day Survey" It 's Majority Leader Scalise. We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my "First 100 Days Survey"** so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first. | | | "CLICK TO BEGIN" - STEVE SCALISE | | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. name: State Representative Ryan Chamberlin
subject: Breaking News: REP. RYAN CHAMBERLIN’S BILL TO REFORM FLORIDA’S MINIMUM WAGE HEADS TO HOUSE FLOOR
body:
Breaking News! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/repryanchamberlin/newsletter-from-rep-ryan-chamberlin-12927387?e=d1c1b9864f)
---
| |
---
| My friends, when you elected me in 2023, you spoke loud and clear in endorsing my pro-small business and pro-taxpayer agenda to keep Florida as the freest and most prosperous state in the country.

Like many of you, I have become deeply concerned about the Californication of Florida. Liberal special interests have pushed for higher taxes, extreme regulations like a draconian minimum wage, drug legalization, pro-amnesty policies for illegal immigrants, and limitations on our gun rights.

This past year, I’ve had the opportunity to take the lead on permanently phasing out property taxes in the state of Florida, and just this week, another big initiative has just passed its last committee in the House. We are going to stop the insanity of blocking our young people from getting much-needed work experience by allowing them to voluntarily opt out of the liberal minimum wage provisions codified in our state constitution by a George Soros-funded coalition.

This will give our small businesses the flexibility to hire high school and post-high school adults who would like to get valuable workforce experience and training and contribute to Florida’s vibrant economy.

Please encourage your legislators to vote in favor of this bill and also send messages of support to Governor DeSantis. Together, this is one small step to keep us the Free State of Florida forever!

Full body of press release is below:

**REP. RYAN CHAMBERLIN’S BILL TO REFORM FLORIDA’S MINIMUM WAGE HEADS TO HOUSE FLOOR**
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
April 8, 2025

**Contact:** Katie Connell
**Phone:** (850) 222-8156
**Email: **katie@thefrontlineagency.com

**Tallahassee, Fla.** — Yesterday, [HB 541](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=5436cb5b10&e=d1c1b9864f), a bill sponsored by Rep. Ryan Chamberlin to reform Florida’s minimum wage with provisions for alternate means of compensation, passed its final committee stop in the Commerce Committee and now heads to the House Floor.

“First, I want to thank everyone who worked with me on this bill and helped me get it one step closer to the finish line,” said Rep. Ryan Chamberlin. “Florida’s minimum wage embedded in our constitution has created an unnecessary barrier in our workforce. HB 541 will help give employers and their employees more freedom, create more jobs, reduce our cost of living, and support small businesses across Florida. To my fellow lawmakers, this is an incredible opportunity for us to pass policy that will keep Florida’s economy thriving and keep our state leading the nation. I look forward to HB 541’s success and encourage my colleagues to vote in support of this much-needed reform on the House Floor.”

Senator Jonathan Martin is carrying the companion legislation in the State Senate.
###
---
| |
---
| | _Copyright © 2024 Ryan Chamberlin for State Representative, All rights reserved._

Paid by Ryan Chamberlin, Republican, for State Representative

**Our mailing address is:**
Ryan Chamberlin for State Representative
526 E Park Ave
Tallahassee, FL 32301-2568

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/profile?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=929c76fdea&e=d1c1b9864f&c=3ed3eb8ca8) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=929c76fdea&t=b&e=d1c1b9864f&c=3ed3eb8ca8).

---

name: Eliza Walton
subject: Peter, want to see how you can make polluters pay?
body:
Take action to support SB 1187 - Oregon’s Polluter Pays bill - to require large fossil fuel firms to pay compensation for past climate change damages! | | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105448354/538373115/-611160184?contactdata=/FQiW7l3vao5ZBMz7lm12xC4c1wUvTYLYKr4T9SnaHbDjmFCDdX7kXJbn4gkmG8G53MNeHLXShAGwKvocoh0XaTDUg9Sf+aJBFv4XIHWj/BDFBstqJnb8KLKYFK/eMc2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI0ODVmYjNlLWI3MTQtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4YDQvOKg8njWSc4TxuAtdFuufcrNQDdc9jPvgWlmKcc=&emci=2dca9678-af14-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=2485fb3e-b714-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2107230)
---
Dear Peter, As everyday Oregonians, we’ve been the ones to face the consequences of an ever-worsening climate, although we are not responsible for creating the pollution problem. It’s time for large fossil fuel firms to pay for the damages they’ve done to our climate and environment — it’s only fair. That’s why we need [**SB 1187**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105448355/538373116/1482100982?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI0ODVmYjNlLWI3MTQtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4YDQvOKg8njWSc4TxuAtdFuufcrNQDdc9jPvgWlmKcc=&emci=2dca9678-af14-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=2485fb3e-b714-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2107230), Oregon’s Polluter Pays bill, so that the largest polluters will pay to clean up their mess. [**Will you help support the passing of this bill?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105448359/538373118/-611160184?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI0ODVmYjNlLWI3MTQtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4YDQvOKg8njWSc4TxuAtdFuufcrNQDdc9jPvgWlmKcc=&emci=2dca9678-af14-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=2485fb3e-b714-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2107230)
---
[**Make polluters pay**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105448366/538373125/-611160184?contactdata=/FQiW7l3vao5ZBMz7lm12xC4c1wUvTYLYKr4T9SnaHbDjmFCDdX7kXJbn4gkmG8G53MNeHLXShAGwKvocoh0XaTDUg9Sf+aJBFv4XIHWj/BDFBstqJnb8KLKYFK/eMc2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI0ODVmYjNlLWI3MTQtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4YDQvOKg8njWSc4TxuAtdFuufcrNQDdc9jPvgWlmKcc=&emci=2dca9678-af14-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=2485fb3e-b714-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2107230)
---
The concept of making polluters pay is simple: if you make a mess, you should have to help pay to clean it up. Fossil fuel corporations warmed our climate, and should pay their fair share of the costs! Currently, Oregonians are paying for polluter’s damage, while fossil fuel companies continue to make hundreds of billions in profits from the last 30 years of emissions. And we know that climate change has already cost Oregon billions, and it’s only going to get worse. Fossil fuel corporations warmed our climate, and should pay their fair share of the costs! Make Polluters Pay makes the largest oil, gas and coal companies liable for the costs of their pollution to our state. "Polluter pays" is a core principle of environmental law, as with SB 1187, only the largest polluters will be paying. The funds would be used for climate disaster adaptation and resilience efforts, as a “climate superfund”. If we pass SB 1187, Oregon will be more resilient for wildfires and other climate damage adaptation, including flood protection, upgrades to transportation and electric power grids, water supply and waste-water treatment systems, agriculture and fisheries, building retrofits, health of forests and other ecosystems, and other salient issues. [**It’s time to tell polluters: you make a mess, you clean it up. Take action now to make polluters pay to clean up the mess they created!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105448368/538373131/-611160184?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI0ODVmYjNlLWI3MTQtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4YDQvOKg8njWSc4TxuAtdFuufcrNQDdc9jPvgWlmKcc=&emci=2dca9678-af14-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=2485fb3e-b714-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2107230)
---
[**Take action**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105448369/538373132/-611160184?contactdata=/FQiW7l3vao5ZBMz7lm12xC4c1wUvTYLYKr4T9SnaHbDjmFCDdX7kXJbn4gkmG8G53MNeHLXShAGwKvocoh0XaTDUg9Sf+aJBFv4XIHWj/BDFBstqJnb8KLKYFK/eMc2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI0ODVmYjNlLWI3MTQtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4YDQvOKg8njWSc4TxuAtdFuufcrNQDdc9jPvgWlmKcc=&emci=2dca9678-af14-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=2485fb3e-b714-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2107230)

body:
The Democrats just showed their cards - and what they have in store just sent shivers down our spine...

**LIBERAL SHADOW CABINET: Never before in history has an opposition force tried to undermine a sitting President like this.**

The Democrats just showed their cards - and what they have in store just sent shivers down our spine...

First, a top House Democrat went on CNN to pitch a "Shadow Cabinet." Then, failed VP candidate Tim Walz called for a Democrat propaganda arm to attack President Trump. Now, the Chair of the Democrat Party is launching a "People's Cabinet" to peddle Fake News stories undermining the Trump Administration.

**[This is a full-blown political ambush against President Trump, our Conservative Congress, and the 73+ MILLION Americans who voted for Republicans. And it's being cooked up behind closed doors by the same people who failed to win over the American People.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4872ef229fb74f33bb8929bb1d2dedbc&_e=9ZKOybrJUkNQF1FA7CzNATYKNRU9kpkszd-la7g-6Ro0K1oePRBxWlG4eVusvyxQRtaoLzE8p_e5RYNdePJsCWw5Q_JsoFb7NakMvj0fO008m1luUAgnvLtSqyNs-9VnbNc5o3SZZdjX30KIxAP2clhvQLQJG61uih8QOEC-0GMZpr8h4-h9X_n0jfctGZ1le7cbJ1kZocfvHZN1TAqfWiELGew3JmrzG7hWhQu-C64OwdEFMOPagFAe6cIx607l2bwl5q9TqmZZeeCUp_INsqEUT9M2xT00ojFw-ME7ortVAg7eEOOHe9Fc3JPVTPxs5E_ZlZ6e6HTkISXiN8vh8k3xcbN2FFOrJqdgMngkN-LGgHpAgaUPb7bneX2spedB1puusF2OkaFZ4nlm31EFL36O_TaWQeAACe_z3bQWviNTUE4L22X9zA85H-iSqa6LjueONZPa2YSTbDjZ5t3Tlw%3D%3D "This is a full-blown political ambush against President Trump, our Conservative Congress, and the 73+ MILLION Americans who voted for Republicans. And it’s being cooked up behind closed doors by the same people who failed to win over the American People. ")**

**Democrats are desperate for revenge after they were HUMILIATED at the ballot box.**

So now? They are determined to drag our movement through the mud, discredit our victories, and install their failed ideology by force.

**[We have a plan to stop them- but it requires 100% participation from everybody receiving this email.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4872ef229fb74f33bb8929bb1d2dedbc&_e=9ZKOybrJUkNQF1FA7CzNATYKNRU9kpkszd-la7g-6Ro0K1oePRBxWlG4eVusvyxQRtaoLzE8p_e5RYNdePJsCWw5Q_JsoFb7NakMvj0fO008m1luUAgnvLtSqyNs-9VnbNc5o3SZZdjX30KIxAP2clhvQLQJG61uih8QOEC-0GMZpr8h4-h9X_n0jfctGZ1le7cbJ1kZocfvHZN1TAqfWiELGew3JmrzG7hWhQu-C64OwdEFMOPagFAe6cIx607l2bwl5q9TqmZZeeCUp_INsqEUT9M2xT00ojFw-ME7ortVAg7eEOOHe9Fc3JPVTPxsMtXzniSb4UfQeVEeXqvTh83H_kktCiLeqE2v5qD0qlgexvzugUpgFpksuWyf0hw-HWZHqjmJUrZKHQoMYCiDSu4ZsQCkHNfsCSgFS6-MlnbySmP3_S91CtioCbwazklfS4RT6VR15Zl_H34R9jSEFw%3D%3D "We have a plan to TAKE DOWN this New Liberal Scheme – but it requires 100% participation from everybody receiving this email.")** We can't do it alone. We NEED to fortify our war chest NOW. Because if we wait until the Midterms, it'll be too late. Democrats could take the House and bring President Trump's agenda to a SCREECHING HALT.

The consequences would be catastrophic... You've had our backs from the beginning. You never gave up when the going got tough.

**So we 're calling on you once again to step up when it matters most.**

If we can band together _ONE MILLION Loyal Patriots_ before the end of the week, we'll have the manpower to defeat the Democrat Machine and make them regret ever forming this sham Shadow Cabinet.

#### **Frozen Odds -**
**Alaska — vast, untamed, and unpredictable. Beneath its snow-covered peaks and icy rivers lies a political battlefield unlike any other. This is the story they didn’t want you to know.****Powerful names — Lisa Murkowski, Hansjörg Wyss, Arabella Advisors, and George Soros — echo through the corridors of influence, shaping the future of the Last Frontier. From the manipulation of Ranked Choice Voting to the backdoor funding of initiatives like the Minimum Wage Increase, Alaska has become a testing ground — a proving ground — for tactics designed to tilt democracy itself.****Groups like Salmon State, Outdoor Alliance, and the Alaska Venture Fund, Alaskans For Better Elections, No on 2, etc. have operated quietly, weaving a web of influence across the state's political landscape. What seemed like grassroots efforts were anything but — and the connections go far deeper than anyone imagined.****This isn't just about Alaska. It’s a warning to the rest of America.****Help bring this story to life, flying experts to Alaska, traveling the state for interviews. body:
Elon Musk may have faced a recent defeat, but don’t be fooled — he’s not backing down.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105449129/538376035/-735451259?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-04-08_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDljMzc5NTUtYmExNC1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=m6rT5eZ_BOhxLfYfDty_z8h2rYS8ObhjXm4WlhJBbxc=)

| Elon Musk may have faced a recent defeat, but don’t be fooled — he’s not backing down. He spent over $21 million to boost a Trump-backed conservative in the Wisconsin Supreme Court race, and there’s no telling what he’ll spend in Virginia.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105449130/538376036/-735451259?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-04-08_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDljMzc5NTUtYmExNC1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=m6rT5eZ_BOhxLfYfDty_z8h2rYS8ObhjXm4WlhJBbxc=)
Regardless, we know Musk and DOGE will be on the ballot this November. Virginia is home to 300,000+ federal workers who are facing the possibility of losing their jobs, all because of Musk and DOGE’s reckless firings. It’s just cruel.

While Abigail’s opponent and Virginia’s current Republican leadership stand by — and support — these measures, saying they “don’t understand why” it’s a big deal (yep, Abigail’s opponent actually said that), Abigail is speaking out and standing up for hardworking Virginians who have devoted their lives to a career in public service and just want to make their communities, Commonwealth, and country better places to live.

This is about more than just a policy — it’s about the livelihoods of hundreds of thousands of Virginians and our economy. Virginia deserves a Governor who understands the importance of this and knows how to stand up to unelected, bully billionaires like Elon Musk.

[_**But she can’t do it without you. Will you help us build on the momentum of last week’s victory in Wisconsin and deliver a strong rebuke of the Trump-Musk agenda in Virginia this November?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105449131/538376037/-735451259?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-04-08_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDljMzc5NTUtYmExNC1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=m6rT5eZ_BOhxLfYfDty_z8h2rYS8ObhjXm4WlhJBbxc=)

clean_body: Elon Musk may have faced a recent defeat, but don’t be fooled — he’s not backing down. | = | Elon Musk may have faced a recent defeat, but don’t be fooled — he’s not backing down. He spent over $21 million to boost a Trump-backed conservative in the Wisconsin Supreme Court race, and there’s no telling what he’ll spend in Virginia. = Regardless, we know Musk and DOGE will be on the ballot this November. Virginia is home to 300,000+ federal workers who are facing the possibility of losing their jobs, all because of Musk and DOGE’s reckless firings. It’s just cruel. While Abigail’s opponent and Virginia’s current Republican leadership stand by — and support — these measures, saying they “don’t understand why” it’s a big deal (yep, Abigail’s opponent actually said that), Abigail is speaking out and standing up for hardworking Virginians who have devoted their lives to a career in public service and just want to make their communities, Commonwealth, and country better places to live. This is about more than just a policy — it’s about the livelihoods of hundreds of thousands of Virginians and our economy. Virginia deserves a Governor who understands the importance of this and knows how to stand up to unelected, bully billionaires like Elon Musk. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Team Spanberger * | | Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States | = =

**Anti-abortion politicians like Justices Alito and Coney Barrett position adoption as a moral alternative to abortion, but abortion has nothing to do with morality — it’s healthcare.**

That’s why our co-founder, Dr. Annie Andrews, spoke with author and qualitative sociologist Gretchen Sisson about her book, _Relinquished_. She found that mothers who are denied abortions choose to parent their child 90% of the time, with adoption often a last resort — **_meaning adoption is not a replacement for abortion care._**

It’s time for lawmakers to prioritize children’s health and safety instead of playing political games. Families should have safe and reliable access to it.

**_[If you’re tired of seeing children’s futures caught in the crossfire of political agendas, please sign this petition today to support real change for kids and families.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_1wJsy0AKwKOf9xsS3ARX7r7h1fhd2enrXFu97LLAuYePUIkho-nzvdFBX4GKtv98B5kJGEM17Zrppy16j_X1kG8kcDbb1kpo5SYyRHiRrs6k-PZsbDVRr-v3KW5xiXkrRTKS-6n_70alecBq9-xnU0L1AArBIip-4oO_73AOeSyCR6opEURKZ_O_G-l_Hp3KYlmAwnxtc8PP_LrrnFQ5Wb4eQUBE9GhEm-VtK12nfjlODkZqZSpyqCjTGH7b-e26jorwz8aq6nCmhY8nSPFT5_nDswuFIUKNpgbmCmpBVJvgC1Gexj8Kqn3U9Z3g8k9OaM8Y5vnpSsNZEg2lGcFVVnMkd2i0_SnTKasc5_rvmzw/4fh/BnM4uLusS56AfgDsIH3Lfw/h1/h001.qFFMVuVqrU-aPDOlwFdOw3KbFz8UP7l2ja5R3vo1sj4)_**

Instead of factless arguments and political posturing, we need real solutions to help kids and families, like affordable housing, affordable childcare, living wage, and more.

**_[The far-right anti-abortion agenda should not come before the well-being of our kids. Add your name to support families receiving the care that they deserve.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_1wJsy0AKwKOf9xsS3ARX7r7h1fhd2enrXFu97LLAuYePUIkho-nzvdFBX4GKtv98B5kJGEM17Zrppy16j_X1kG8kcDbb1kpo5SYyRHiRrs6k-PZsbDVRr-v3KW5xiXkrRTKS-6n_70alecBq9-xnUt1bAQTA3fJqyTJUensjhF2e44GBmvHG6hN57ohLMDWS2zby0s8_HSu-9wUu0x9QjIybiNK42CyV8eqQe5QItlAGQHGdajQ5_RMaJgN6M9x-MO14VP8PCD1f85eSfft8RqED1fZTkxT8p3EdojI2iAFv-IJZVimICUygoP8ol2FA5N_Tyx8MGs4ZBzoznSxt4RXw7yQ2Su3U_CYvcKRS7pQ/4fh/BnM4uLusS56AfgDsIH3Lfw/h2/h001.2SiG4B_EH7vrbL37QTXatxpFFYkmyuwvSYNHqvME-ek)_**

name: Team Connolly
subject: Country over party
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gerry Connolly for Congress
body:
https://gerryconnolly.com/ [https://gerryconnolly.com/]
Team,

Donald Trump’s reckless economic policies are already hurting American families — and Republicans in Congress are letting it happen.

Trump’s new blanket tariffs are sending the markets into chaos. Experts are warning of rising inflation and higher costs for working families. Meanwhile, Trump conveniently left Russia and North Korea off his tariff list. Why? Because this was never about strengthening America — it’s about rewarding his friends and punishing his enemies.

The worst part? Republicans like Speaker Mike Johnson are too scared to stand up to him.

https://secure.ngpvan.com/2AsrABkxu0aUJT_-d1hYSw2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/2AsrABkxu0aUJT_-d1hYSw2]

TELL JOHNSON TO STAND UP TO TRUMP → [https://secure.ngpvan.com/2AsrABkxu0aUJT_-d1hYSw2]

Gerry Connolly knows we can’t sit back and let Trump dismantle our economy to feed his own ego. And he’s not afraid to say it: country should always come before party.

We’re calling on Speaker Johnson and every Republican in Congress: Grow a spine. Stand up to Trump. Defend the American people.

Add your name if you agree. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/2AsrABkxu0aUJT_-d1hYSw2]

If they won’t put the country first, then it’s up to all of us to hold them accountable.

- Team Connolly
https://www.facebook.com/congressmanconnolly [https://www.facebook.com/congressmanconnolly] https://twitter.com/electconnolly [https://twitter.com/electconnolly] https://www.instagram.com/connollyforcongress/ [https://www.instagram.com/connollyforcongress/]
Gerry Connolly is the Ranking Member of the House Oversight Committee and a Democratic member of Congress representing Virginia’s 11th District, located in Northern Virginia. Gerry and his wife Smitty have lived in Fairfax since 1979 and have one daughter, Caitlin. Gerry previously served as the Chairman of the Fairfax County Board of Supervisors. In Congress, Gerry has worked continuously to grow Northern Virginia’s economy, to ensure a world-class education system, and to preserve Social Security and Medicare. Gerry has our backs in Congress, so let's have his back on the campaign trail. Donate to Connolly for Congress today! [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/GCVA-11-Email-april2025-FR-april?refcode=E12875-20250408-TrumpTariffs-footer-Trump&amount=25]
DONATE [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/GCVA-11-Email-april2025-FR-april?refcode=E12875-20250408-TrumpTariffs-footer-Trump&amount=25]
Gerry Connolly for Congress

Merrifield, VA 22116
United States

name: Team Jayapal
subject: What we told Trump and Musk this weekend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Over 1,100 rallies. One clear message: hands off our communities, our care, and our power.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250408-4928-footer&t=1&akid=4928%2E420207%2EmkcH3C)
Peter, last Saturday, thousands of us showed up across the country to send Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and their entire billionaire-led administration a message that can’t be ignored:
**HANDS OFF OUR DEMOCRACY!**
From Medicare to Social Security, and from the safety of our immigrant neighbors to the rights of trans people everywhere in the country, we came together to say we won’t let Trump, Musk, and fellow billionaires strip away what we’ve fought for.
In Seattle, Pramila joined an incredible crowd and reminded us:
_**"Trans kids didn’t hike your rent. Billionaires did. Immigrants didn’t make your groceries more expensive. Billionaires did. Federal workers didn’t take away your healthcare. Billionaires did."**_
[_****_](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250408?refcode=em20250408-4928&amount=3&refcode2=4928_420207_mkcH3C&akid=4928%2E420207%2EmkcH3C)
We’re organizing to stop their attacks and build a government that puts people first. That’s why Pramila launched the **Resistance Lab** to train thousands in nonviolent resistance — and more than 20,000 people have already signed up.
[**But to keep going, Pramila needs your help. Will you pitch in $3 — or any amount that works for you — to power our grassroots fight and protect our democracy?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250408?refcode=em20250408-4928&amount=3&refcode2=4928_420207_mkcH3C&akid=4928%2E420207%2EmkcH3C)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250408?amount=3&refcode=em20250408-4928&refcode2=4928_420207_mkcH3C&akid=4928%2E420207%2EmkcH3C)**
Let’s show them our movement is louder, stronger, and more united than ever.
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250408-4928-footer&t=2&refcode2=4928_420207_mkcH3C&akid=4928%2E420207%2EmkcH3C)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: EMILYs List
subject: Peter, did you see the latest cuts RFK Jr. is making? 😤
body:
The Trump administration's HHS is attacking reproductive health care. |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105450560/538381149/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE420_20250408_RFKLies_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1055925&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzc5MjcwZi1iZTE0LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F6GS0MweW7IwpWCwL-a3zaHIkIsaxGtgGkktJ1-rmx8=) Peter — Trump's Department of Health and Human Services (HHS), led by Robert F. Kennedy Jr., announced that it will temporarily withhold millions of dollars of grants through Title X, the federal program that supports family planning services for low-income people. _This decision will undercut access to basic reproductive health care for Americans across the country._

**Make no mistake: this is Robert F. Kennedy Jr. carrying out Donald Trump's anti-choice agenda.** During his Senate confirmation hearing, Kennedy said, "I'm going to support President Trump's policies ... he wants to end federal funding of abortions."

[**Before we set the record straight, will you chip in today to help elect Democratic pro-choice women who will be on the frontlines of the fight against the Trump administration and its dangerous policies?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105450561/538381150/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE420_20250408_RFKLies_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1055925&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzc5MjcwZi1iZTE0LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F6GS0MweW7IwpWCwL-a3zaHIkIsaxGtgGkktJ1-rmx8=) | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105450562/538381151/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE420_20250408_RFKLies_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1055925&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzc5MjcwZi1iZTE0LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F6GS0MweW7IwpWCwL-a3zaHIkIsaxGtgGkktJ1-rmx8=)
---
Peter, the anti-choice agenda isn't just about abortion bans. Sometimes it looks like **gutting funding for reproductive care** for the communities that need it most.

Here's the real-life impact of RFK Jr.'s funding cuts:
* 870 health facilities across 22 states could lose funding
* 846,000 patients could be left without care
* The hardest-hit states are already some of the poorest and most medically underserved in the country

For Trump and RFK Jr., this isn't about "putting America first." It's about putting reproductive freedom and bodily autonomy last. It's about leaving the poorest, most vulnerable Americans without options. And there's nothing more un-American than that.

clean_body: The Trump administration's HHS is attacking reproductive health care. | = Peter — Trump's Department of Health and Human Services (HHS), led by Robert F. Kennedy Jr., announced that it will temporarily withhold millions of dollars of grants through Title X, the federal program that supports family planning services for low-income people. This decision will undercut access to basic reproductive health care for Americans across the country. Make no mistake: this is Robert F. Kennedy Jr. carrying out Donald Trump's anti-choice agenda. During his Senate confirmation hearing, Kennedy said, "I'm going to support President Trump's policies ... he wants to end federal funding of abortions." = | = Peter, the anti-choice agenda isn't just about abortion bans. Sometimes it looks like gutting funding for reproductive care for the communities that need it most. Here's the real-life impact of RFK Jr.'s funding cuts: 870 health facilities across 22 states could lose funding 846,000 patients could be left without care * The hardest-hit states are already some of the poorest and most medically underserved in the country For Trump and RFK Jr., this isn't about "putting America first." It's about putting reproductive freedom and bodily autonomy last. It's about leaving the poorest, most vulnerable Americans without options. And there's nothing more un-American than that. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks for taking a stand. \- EMILYs List = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. Florida Rep. Byron Donalds **[crashed an anti-Trump and anti-Elon Musk protest](https://substack.com/redirect/a671ff6c-8609-4823-96f6-ecfacc3e634b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in Kissimmee, Florida, getting into several heated face-to-face confrontations with the woke activists.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/a671ff6c-8609-4823-96f6-ecfacc3e634b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/a671ff6c-8609-4823-96f6-ecfacc3e634b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
One woman holding a sign went full karen mode on Donalds. "Hold on!!" she shouted to another protester, stepping in front of her to get right up in Donalds' face. "As a member of congress, because I was just in D.C. on Monday for Trans Day of Visibility and I would like you to rise up and support LGBTQ+ youth and stop this f**king insane attack on our children who know who they are!!"
Donalds didn't react to her hysterical display. "Number one, I'm not gonna do that. Number two..."
"I know you're not because you're a fascists!!" the woman screamed at him, interrupting his answer.
Watch the out-of-control moment here:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/a671ff6c-8609-4823-96f6-ecfacc3e634b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# **American Steel CEO DESTROYS Jake Tapper's anti-tariff BS live on air**
U.S. steel CEO Drew Greenblatt **[called out Jake Tapper on his own CNN clown show](https://substack.com/redirect/8313a3bf-a1bf-4ff2-9303-8feee521eb47?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for stirring up fear about the effects of Trump's tariffs.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/8313a3bf-a1bf-4ff2-9303-8feee521eb47?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/8313a3bf-a1bf-4ff2-9303-8feee521eb47?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Tapper told Greenblatt that Chinese leaders are preparing for a trade war with the U.S., asking him how his company will be affected if China stops buying his steel.
"Tariffs are going to be very good for the American manufacturing worker, we are very excited," he explained. "It is so unfair what is happening to the American worker! They can't compete when you have kind of unleveled playing field."
Greenblatt continued to say that millions of American jobs stand to be created due to the actions of President Trump launching reciprocal tariffs.
"We just want to be fair!" Greenblatt told Tapper. "They are using slave labor to compete against us! They are debasing their currency!"
"Let's just make things fair for the American worker and we're gonna whoop em!" he added.
Tapper tried to press the CEO on his employee's concerns about their 401ks now seeing an abrupt reduction in value. "Have any of them said anything to you about their concerns, particularly ones close to retirement?"
**[Greenblatt gave and honest response,](https://substack.com/redirect/8313a3bf-a1bf-4ff2-9303-8feee521eb47?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** admitting that there were some concerns, but not enough to erase the upside to Trump's tariff commitment.
Watch the full clip here:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/8313a3bf-a1bf-4ff2-9303-8feee521eb47?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: This is the last thing Michiganders need
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Donald Trump’s tariffs will raise prices on the people, not the countries they’re imposed on.
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=204%2E181023%2EWhnvnu)
Team,
Prices are already too high for Michiganders, so the last thing we need is for the president of the United States to hike them up even more.
But that’s exactly what his administration did last week when he irresponsibly imposed reckless tariffs — causing auto workers in Michigan to be laid off and sowing chaos and confusion across the state.
Despite Republican claims, here’s the truth: **Michiganders will foot the bill — raising expenses by thousands a year — for these tariffs.**
Michiganders struggling to keep up with high costs will be forced to pay even more in grocery stores and at the gas pump. And these reckless 25% tariffs on the auto industry will have devastating consequences for Michigan’s consumers and workers.
[**Our leaders should be fighting to _lower_ costs, not raise them. As governor, I’ll work every day to put more money back in the pockets of Michiganders and make life more affordable for families across the state. Will you pitch in to my campaign today to help me bring my people-driven economic agenda to Lansing? **](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/854?c0=jmb-em-q22025.35DAUP&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250408_PM2_V1_S1&t=2&akid=204%2E181023%2EWhnvnu)

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105451337/538383719/-107464461?refcode=BLU_EM_SAN_2025-04-08_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTU4NDhhMC1jMDE0LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F5ppWbrG-yRUlRdspAlvOMLI3rHaBxK-n726GOh1unI=)

| Peter,

I’ve heard from many of you about your concerns with Elon Musk infiltrating our government systems. **I want to be absolutely clear: Your personal data shouldn’t be in the hands of an unelected billionaire.**

I’m working together with fellow Democrats to protect your privacy and hold him accountable >>

▶️ **Stopping Unlawful Access:** We’re exploring every legal option to stop this dangerous and unconstitutional overreach.

**▶️ Drafting Bills:** We’re drafting legislation to stop unauthorized access, improve security, and prevent Trump administration officials from exposing your taxpayer data.

▶️ **Launching Investigations:** We’re demanding congressional hearings and investigations to understand why Elon Musk was given access to the Treasury.

▶️ **Calling for Independent Reviews:** We’re calling on the Treasury Inspector General and GAO to immediately investigate potential violations of taxpayer privacy laws.

**I’m using every lever I can access to put a stop to this. I’m also calling on the few Republicans left who care about the rule of law, democracy, and Congress’s oversight authority to join Democrats and millions of Americans in opposing this constitutional overreach.**
---
| | The Trump administration is wasting no time lining the pockets of the ultra-wealthy like Elon Musk.

And Linda is wasting no time fighting back for the working class.

[_**Help us keep up the pressure with a grassroots contribution today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105451340/538383722/-107464461?refcode=BLU_EM_SAN_2025-04-08_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTU4NDhhMC1jMDE0LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F5ppWbrG-yRUlRdspAlvOMLI3rHaBxK-n726GOh1unI=)

name: Jena Griswold
subject: I’m running for Attorney General—here’s why
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2402-q2-jg-launch?refcode=250408-zombie [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2402-q2-jg-launch?refcode=250408-zombie]
Peter,
I’m writing you to share some exciting news: I’m running to be Colorado’s next Attorney General.
I’ve spent my career fighting for our democracy, standing up to extremists, and protecting the rights of Coloradans. As Secretary of State, I expanded voter access, safeguarded our elections, and took on Donald Trump’s attacks on democracy—despite facing death threats myself.
Now, I’m ready to do even more for the State of Colorado. Will you become a Founding Donor by pitching in $5 and helping me launch this campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2402-q2-jg-launch?refcode=250408-zombie&amount=5]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
CONTRIBUTE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2402-q2-jg-launch?refcode=250408-zombie&amount=10&express_lane=true] CONTRIBUTE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2402-q2-jg-launch?refcode=250408-zombie&amount=25&express_lane=true]
CONTRIBUTE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2402-q2-jg-launch?refcode=250408-zombie&amount=50&express_lane=true] CONTRIBUTE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2402-q2-jg-launch?refcode=250408-zombie&amount=100&express_lane=true]
CONTRIBUTE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2402-q2-jg-launch?refcode=250408-zombie&amount=250&express_lane=true] ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2402-q2-jg-launch?refcode=250408-zombie]
As Attorney General, I will fight to protect reproductive rights, ensuring that women and doctors are never prosecuted for making personal healthcare decisions. I will stand up to Donald Trump and MAGA extremists who threaten our democracy and freedoms, just like I’ve done before. I will protect our land, air, and water and always stand with working people and the middle class.
And that’s just the beginning—we can do so much more to protect the Colorado way of life.
I grew up in a working-class family in Estes Park, where I learned the value of resilience and hard work. I put myself through college, earned a law degree, and dedicated my life to public service. Now, I’m ready to continue fighting for Coloradans as Attorney General.
Our campaign is just getting started, and we need your help to show our strength. Can you contribute $5, $50, or even $100 right now to help us build momentum? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2402-q2-jg-launch?refcode=250408-zombie]
Let’s do this,
Jena Griswold

Here’s the situation. The legislative session is over, and Wes has won some important fights for Marylanders. Now, we have to turn our focus to our fundraising gap. **We’ve been in a fundraising freeze for the past three months. To put it bluntly: We’re only able to fundraise for about 75% of the year. ** That’s a big obstacle for our next fight, since any future opponents might be able to build up their resources while our hands are tied. Right now, it’s really important to get our fundraising back on track. [**That’s why your support today is critical. We hope you can help us reach our $10,000 post-freeze goal by contributing $10, or any amount, to support Wes Moore.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105451452/538383875/-756519369?refcode=em20250408-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2RiYTZlMS1jMDE0LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MrINC_y0pj_uPTO9_tGnU9ntoRSbBoU1yc1--QZnZoM=) We’re so grateful for every contribution — and we don’t take them lightly. It’s only with this team’s support that we have been able to accomplish so much so far. Now, we need to regain our momentum. [**Can we count on you? The legislative session is over, and Wes has won some important fights for Marylanders. Now, we have to turn our focus to our fundraising gap. We’ve been in a fundraising freeze for the past three months. To put it bluntly: We’re only able to fundraise for about 75% of the year. That’s a big obstacle for our next fight, since any future opponents might be able to build up their resources while our hands are tied. Right now, it’s really important to get our fundraising back on track. = We’re so grateful for every contribution — and we don’t take them lightly. name: Sarah McBride
subject: This is deeply personal.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
Not everyone is as lucky as we were.
#
This is a long email, but it’s a deeply personal one. I hope you’ll take a moment to read it because what’s at stake right now couldn’t be more important.
**House Republicans have made it clear that they want to put Medicaid on the chopping block — ripping away care from families who need it most.**
I think about what that could mean for so many people. And I can’t help but think of Andy.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250408-1?refcode=em20250408-1886&amount=5&refcode2=1886_21716_Rg3v70&akid=1886%2E21716%2ERg3v70)
Andy was my husband. Just one year into our relationship, he was diagnosed with cancer. Overnight, we went from planning our future together to fighting for his life. I became his primary caregiver. During his battle with terminal cancer, I held his hand through appointments, treatments, and, ultimately, when he passed away.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250408-1?refcode=em20250408-1886&amount=5&refcode2=1886_21716_Rg3v70&akid=1886%2E21716%2ERg3v70)
But we were lucky. Andy had access to health care. It gave us precious time together. But I also saw firsthand how fragile access can be — and how devastating it is when people don’t have it.
**Not everyone is as lucky as we were.** Too many families are forced to make impossible choices — between seeing a doctor or keeping the lights on, between paying for a life-saving prescription, or putting food on the table for their children.
Health care is a human right. In the wealthiest country on earth, no one should have to make choices like these.
But right now, Republicans are threatening to make things even harder by slashing Medicaid and cutting off care for millions of Americans — including 1 in 4 Delawareans — to give tax breaks to billionaires.
**That’s why I denounce Republicans’ heartless cuts. And it’s why I’m working to rally support to save Medicaid and continue to push for health care for all.**[**Will you pitch in $5 to power our fight?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250408-1?refcode=em20250408-1886&amount=5&refcode2=1886_21716_Rg3v70&akid=1886%2E21716%2ERg3v70)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250408-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250408-1886&refcode2=1886_21716_Rg3v70&akid=1886%2E21716%2ERg3v70)**
Thank you for reading,
Sarah
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20250408-1&t=1&refcode2=1886_21716_Rg3v70&akid=1886%2E21716%2ERg3v70)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=1886%2E21716%2ERg3v70)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=3&akid=1886%2E21716%2ERg3v70)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1886%2E21716%2ERg3v70)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)
Paid for by McBride for Delaware

name: Jared, Marie, Lou, Vicente, and Adam
subject: Real change starts with you
body:
Not politicians, not pundits - but people.

| | **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105452316/538387122/-1136397848?&refcode=E12880-20250408-ThankYou-Image-Other&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM4MWZhYWNlLWM0MTQtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=iM94RGWPc0qg4sRlDeChWme8uG3ACQSE1uE69_cLV58=)** Peter, When we took the reins of the Blue Dogs, we knew one truth: Real change starts with you – not politicians, not pundits – but people. **With every call, every share, every dollar given – you showed up in ways we never imagined.** Now watch what we’re doing with that power:
* We’re standing up for freedom and fiscal responsibility
* We’re taking on extremists who’d rather divide than lead
* We’re fighting for working families who’ve been left behind

**Peter, this is how change happens — not from the top down, but from the kitchen table to the ballot box. So truly, thank you. We couldn’t do this without you.** \- Jared, Marie, Lou, Vicente, and Adam
Leaders of the Blue Dogs [_**P.S. If you can, make a donation today to build on our momentum. The U.S. stock market is bouncing back today after the tariff shock wore out and countries are coming to the table to make deals. Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu is in town and shared his approach to President Trump's tariffs. SCOTUS sided with President Trump and his use of the Alien Enemies Act to deport dangerous criminals and illegal immigrants. With RFK Jr. leading the charge on Making Americans Healthy Again, Congressman Keith Self's FIZZ-NO Act is back in the spotlight. The FIZZ-NO Act would ban the purchase of soda with SNAP benefits. Rep. Self argues that they have no nutritional value and lead to obesity and other significant health issues. Is this a reasonable law to pass or is the government overreaching? Kevin Keane is the President & CEO of the American Beverage Association to discuss his side of the argument. While adult obesity rates are up around 37.4%, beverage calorie consumption is down 42%. Perhaps soda is not the culprit and maybe what SNAP users need is to be incentivized to make healthier choices.
Featuring:
**Rep. Keith Self**
Congressman | Texas, District 3
https://keithself.house.gov/
**Kevin Keane**
President & CEO | American Beverage Association
https://www.balanceus.org/

name: Mark Warner
subject: There is no end in sight to the sloppy, careless policies this administration has to offer. I won’t sit by and let Trump and his acolytes get away with it.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105452407/538387416/581701266?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_sloppy_250408_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzNhZjgwNC1jNTE0LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pV_0IeVwrU45EN47GJuauIqs_J26X-9M9dFxl2QYJPs=) Our federal workforce gutted and traumatized.

Critical services on the chopping block.

Stock markets crashing.

Small businesses reeling.

National security experts fired.

White nationalists advising the President.

**There is no end in sight to the sloppy, careless policies this administration has to offer. But I won’t sit by and let Trump and his acolytes get away with it. I’ll do whatever it takes to fight for a federal government that puts your safety, your security, your freedom and your bank accounts first.**

But quite candidly that makes me a Republican target next year. We need to be prepared for a situation where Trump, Elon, and their Republicans spend tens of millions of dollars in the commonwealth in an attempt to defeat me and hold onto control of Congress.

clean_body: | | | = Our federal workforce gutted and traumatized. Critical services on the chopping block. Stock markets crashing. Small businesses reeling. National security experts fired. White nationalists advising the President. There is no end in sight to the sloppy, careless policies this administration has to offer. But I won’t sit by and let Trump and his acolytes get away with it. I’ll do whatever it takes to fight for a federal government that puts your safety, your security, your freedom and your bank accounts first. But quite candidly that makes me a Republican target next year. name: Nellie Pou HQ
subject: Tell us what matters to you:
body:
Take our priorities survey →

| |
---
Team, We have seen never-ending chaos since Trump was inaugurated. Nellie has been busy fighting back against executive overreach and working to lower costs for New Jersey families every day. [_**As we continue that work, we want to hear directly from supporters like you about what's on your mind. Can you take a few minutes to complete our NJ-09 priorities survey? We'll share what you have to say with Nellie.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105452969/538389349/-662131373?ms=250403_np_ty&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGYwMjlkYzUtYzYxNC1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=siZlVB4x-zfRgxby2mOhU3IG2TKwLBW45iVBrxHGYs0=&emci=922c2b83-dc10-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=0f029dc5-c614-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=17143604) [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105452970/538389350/-662131373?ms=250403_np_ty&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGYwMjlkYzUtYzYxNC1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=siZlVB4x-zfRgxby2mOhU3IG2TKwLBW45iVBrxHGYs0=&emci=922c2b83-dc10-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=0f029dc5-c614-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=17143604) It's going to take a lot of hard work to hold Trump accountable, but the most consequential thing we can do to fight back is win back our House majority so we can finally put a check on Donald Trump and Elon Musk. Thank you for taking the time to share your perspectives and priorities. — Nellie Pou HQ
| | |

### About Nellie Pou
Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. As a mother and grandmother, Nellie knows what New Jersey families are facing and will continue to bring down costs while creating good-paying jobs. clean_body: Take our priorities survey → | | Team, We have seen never-ending chaos since Trump was inaugurated. Nellie has been busy fighting back against executive overreach and working to lower costs for New Jersey families every day. It's going to take a lot of hard work to hold Trump accountable, but the most consequential thing we can do to fight back is win back our House majority so we can finally put a check on Donald Trump and Elon Musk. Thank you for taking the time to share your perspectives and priorities. — Nellie Pou HQ | | | ---|---|--- About Nellie Pou Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. As a mother and grandmother, Nellie knows what New Jersey families are facing and will continue to bring down costs while creating good-paying jobs. Nellie has dedicated her entire life to the community that raised her, and in Congress she will do the same. | = | = ---|--- Follow Nellie | | | ---|---|--- Checks may also be mailed to: Nellie Pou for Congress - PO BOX 2696, Paterson, NJ, 07509 Paid for by Nellie Pou for Congress Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . **$5.**
That's what I'm asking you to contribute to my campaign today, Peter.
$5 – because Elon and the Trump administration are coming for crucial programs and attacking the very safety nets millions of Americans rely on, like Medicare and Social Security.
$5 – because they’re targeting immigrant communities, fueling division, and tearing families apart.
$5 – because attorneys general like me are on the front lines, holding the administration accountable and stopping this destructive agenda in its tracks in court.
**I know $5 might not seem like much, but in a time when this administration is working to undermine our democracy, freedoms, and our future, every dollar counts. And if we stand united with $5 here and $10 there, our collective efforts will allow leaders like me to continue standing up for what's right. **
**[With you by my side, we can defend our Constitution, protect our freedoms, and fight for New Yorkers – and for all Americans. So I’m asking: Will you chip in $5 today to stand with me and show the Trump administration that we won’t back down?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105453091/538389701/-1997846894?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1881-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTJmZGZlMy1jNjE0LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E6WyWapcBjHG_Fsr_n_AVI-JVWqq0gHQB62NX2F6_Mo=)**

clean_body: | | Team, This weekend, Josh joined people from all over our state in Montclair to remind Trump, Musk, and anyone else watching that no one messes with Jersey! Here’s our message to Donald Trump: Keep your Hands Off Jersey. Come for our rights, freedoms, or our families, and we’ll fight back. | That’s Josh’s promise to you as Governor. He will always fight for Jersey Values and the great people who live here. When this Administration comes after our rights and tries to raise taxes and costs, Josh will remind them who they’re dealing with. But he needs your help to get there. | | | | | | Thank you, Team Gottheimer | Josh is running to be the next Governor of New Jersey in 2025 – the “Lower Taxes, Lower Costs Governor.” Since 2016, his campaign lawn signs have always said the same thing: “Lower Taxes. Jersey Values” – and that’s what he’s done, from expanding the Child Tax Credit to fighting to restore SALT to clawing dollars back to Jersey for first responders. If you'd like to support his campaign , or to unsubscribe Thank you for being on Team Gottheimer. | | | Prefer to donate by mail?** Make checks payable to Josh Gottheimer for Governor PO Box 201 Hackensack, NJ 07602 PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR GOVERNOR Josh Gottheimer for Governor PO Box 201 Hackensack, NJ 07602 United States

| For 250 years, one of America’s most elite fighting forces has embodied courage, discipline, and an unwavering commitment to defending our nation’s freedoms. In honor of this historic anniversary and the brave men and women who have answered the call to serve, Henry Repeating Arms is proud to present the **Spirit of the Corps Tribute Edition** rifle—now shipping to Henry dealers nationwide.

In honor of this historic anniversary and the brave men and women who have answered the call to serve, Henry Repeating Arms is proud to present the Spirit of the Corps Tribute Edition rifle—now shipping to Henry dealers nationwide. | | | | | | The right side of the receiver cover showcases the modern force in all its might, featuring a Joint Light Tactical Vehicle, a V-22 Osprey aircraft, a rifleman, and the opening line of their famous hymn, “From the halls of Montezuma.” | | | The left side is a powerful tribute to this legendary branch through history, including scenes from World War I, World War II, the Vietnam War, and the Revolutionary War. The hymn continues with a banner reading, “To the shores of Tripoli.” | | | The genuine American walnut buttstock is engraved with the iconic moment of six servicemen raising the flag at Mount Suribachi over Iwo Jima. The flag is hand-painted in red, white, and blue. | | | As a longtime supporter of America’s veterans, Henry Repeating Arms is donating $25,000 and a portion of the proceeds from every sale of the Spirit of the Corps Tribute Edition rifle to Semper Fi & America’s Fund. This nonprofit organization provides immediate financial assistance and lifetime support to critically wounded, ill, and injured service members, veterans, and their families. | | Any Questions? | Connect With Us On: | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | Copyright © 2025 Henry Repeating Arms, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is 107 W. Coleman Street, Rice Lake, WI 54868

Their ability to alter entire nations is so potent that Soros’ native country of Hungary passed legislation they call the “Stop Soros Law.”The law made it a crime to aid illegal immigration so Soros couldn’t drown Hungary with illegal migrants in defiance of the government and the will of rightful citizens.That’s exactly the kind of common sense we need here. **[It’s why AMAC Action is spearheading this historic STOP SOROS petition drive – and why I need your name on the petition RIGHT AWAY!](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8e5f7546dcd146eabe489c336ef70f5b&_e=Mrvm11UdPFefuJIBTrYMpl3-V-m_qMiFRnLc-cPQ8G9ef_WyOmpRZaHZ81DBwWfIv-SgpoN1Lv92R1nZYn6lhhypKUZ2jd5vFVt7mRCxOmjDGN_YiAzxswIWYPxOb_td2_x30KdaCDiUr3yi5VIL6aAqNOnGTER7-WfxaZigObFmWBMzb6ZInyWHu_mTZ1o76CHmuF4jemW6et-JYsjcLgqRL5a2GRd1VIBOZHVtuS80KXGBtwkz_VeW6nG1_8-DVBpq5gtfknJ4lwXtqPsgFqnh3vsrGJY-grFHQ7KDnwAkqPcD4wVtO9NTYHnLNCxlAkX-2NFPOjMvdLRXAGNsLgXQbHBdXIYmCpQqUuA__tE%3D)**

Your petition demands that House Speaker Mike Johnson take immediate steps to introduce, advance, and support legislation to neutralize George Soros’ globalist goals. If the Hungarians can get it done, so can we!After the “Stop Soros Law” passed in Hungary, Soros pulled his dark money, equity-seeking, non-governmental organization, the Open Society Foundation, out of Hungary because of the pressure! His open border plans were thwarted.And he turned his attention to us. **Why are we allowing George Soros to sit behind the walls of his sprawling compound in Westchester County, New York, exploiting the wealth he accumulated using our capitalist system...****...to turn our young people, media, elections, and justice system against us??** My fellow patriot, right now the Trump FCC is investigating a Soros-backed radio station that broadcast the live locations of undercover ICE agents who were arriving for deportation operations. **Yes, the George Soros-funded radio station tipped off the criminals!** There are no two ways about it. **_George Soros and his son Alex Soros are enemies of our nation, its people, and our rule of law._** We must make a move against them just like Hungary did.**_And we only have 20 months to do it._** On November 3rd, 2026, Americans head back to the polls for the midterm elections. Chances are good that we’ll lose the House or the Senate –- or both. So to pass legislation, we must move now.Great change comes from embracing great opportunities – and if you want to change this situation where a foreign billionaire is destroying the country we love from within... **[...your signature on your STOP SOROS petition is the greatest opportunity you will have before 20 months is up.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8e5f7546dcd146eabe489c336ef70f5b&_e=Mrvm11UdPFefuJIBTrYMpl3-V-m_qMiFRnLc-cPQ8G9ef_WyOmpRZaHZ81DBwWfIv-SgpoN1Lv92R1nZYn6lhhypKUZ2jd5vFVt7mRCxOmjDGN_YiAzxswIWYPxOb_td2_x30KdaCDiUr3yi5VIL6aAqNOnGTER7-WfxaZigObFmWBMzb6ZInyWHu_mTZ1o76CHmuF4jemW6et-JYsjcLgQGSCF03Bl_PCHOJF_7fepEGzEKB3AOZ7aRqFprBlFjtVoypRw5hZtodfgjZ6ed0T-Ij2UDCtxOMOMz8t50kKIoq4OcTEqLH96-KmaW2lIW6NzHwysMo_xUiuOod0q2XbdDH8H7eqM5BBKZ98RWLAA%3D) ****My fellow patriot, my name is Rebecca Weber and I’m the Chairwoman of AMAC Action. ** “AMAC” stands for Association of Mature American Citizens. And when it comes to standing up for the rights of conservative seniors, “action” is what we’re known for.**With its 2 million members, AMAC is the conservative antidote to left-leaning AARP. And our 75 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates makes our advocacy group, AMAC Action, a force to be reckoned with on Capitol Hill.** And unlike the AARP, we’re fighting against George Soros not alongside him.You see, according to public tax filings, over three years, the AARP accepted more than 10 MILLION DOLLARS from the George Soros-funded Tides Foundation.The Tides Foundation says they are on the forefront of “climate justice, racial equity, reproductive freedom” and their mission is “justice and equity.”You know that’s just globalist speak for ‘destroy America and redistribute its power and wealth to radicals.’And listen to this... the AARP once honored George Soros on the cover of their magazine calling him one of “America’s Greatest Innovators” who’s**** “changing the world, $100 million at a time.” It makes my stomach turn to see so many seniors supporting the AARP not knowing it’s under the influence of the radical George Soros-funded Tides Foundation.But today, I’m not writing to those seniors. **[I’m writing to YOU because YOU understand the George Soros threat. And I have faith that you will seize this time-sensitive opportunity to do something about it.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8e5f7546dcd146eabe489c336ef70f5b&_e=Mrvm11UdPFefuJIBTrYMpl3-V-m_qMiFRnLc-cPQ8G9ef_WyOmpRZaHZ81DBwWfIv-SgpoN1Lv92R1nZYn6lhhypKUZ2jd5vFVt7mRCxOmjDGN_YiAzxswIWYPxOb_td2_x30KdaCDiUr3yi5VIL6aAqNOnGTER7-WfxaZigObFmWBMzb6ZInyWHu_mTZ1o76CHmuF4jemW6et-JYsjcLk2mrK10F_ibDyALT5oosbbAQvBnSzxWvCLaj7p8IIw336HCT8M90XmxchwrKsv4kIEWbpaUWwIfPhaXHFdplnUEOfMkaIgewdOECiXSh3V-lh7U2RrsGYIpQjSUJZFCNB3S3zyEtPO9lwM_8325J-8%3D) **If the AARP wants to betray America’s seniors by supporting dangerous leftists like George Soros, they are free to do so. **But AMAC Action is leading the charge to bombard Congress with STOP SOROS petitions demanding they introduce, advance, and support legislation to shut-down this dangerous America hater once and for all.**** ****And we would be honored to have you by our side.** **[Please sign your STOP SOROS petition right away, and make a one-time contribution of $35 to help AMAC Action collect and send the millions of petitions we’ll need in the next 20 months.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8e5f7546dcd146eabe489c336ef70f5b&_e=Mrvm11UdPFefuJIBTrYMpl3-V-m_qMiFRnLc-cPQ8G9ef_WyOmpRZaHZ81DBwWfIv-SgpoN1Lv92R1nZYn6lhhypKUZ2jd5vFVt7mRCxOmjDGN_YiAzxswIWYPxOb_td2_x30KdaCDiUr3yi5VIL6aAqNOnGTER7-WfxaZigObFmWBMzb6ZInyWHu_mTZ1o76CHmuF4jemW6et-JYsjcLt6PPkf7DXMCl-uaHPRxehb2DXk_cnAt50N95R_b-VihtWHqyCck20rAHkbm3m4v0xoEwhU_4tyKx4qqbYhQWR3Pw7wZye3f0IQy70kFGABLubYjqR0TQxSUpGw8Ykc8Jm63aw_bhKOkJGVctx4p6dA%3D) ** AMAC Action doesn’t take a dime of taxpayer funding. And we’re certainly not bought and paid for by George Soros or any of his dark money groups like the Tides Foundation.Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America.We answer to you -- not to George and Alex Soros. With that said, if you’re able to make a larger emergency gift of $50, $75, $100, $150, $250, $500, or even $1,000 -- please do it.**[We have a lot of work to do to STOP SOROS and time is not on our side.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8e5f7546dcd146eabe489c336ef70f5b&_e=Mrvm11UdPFefuJIBTrYMpl3-V-m_qMiFRnLc-cPQ8G9ef_WyOmpRZaHZ81DBwWfIv-SgpoN1Lv92R1nZYn6lhhypKUZ2jd5vFVt7mRCxOmjDGN_YiAzxswIWYPxOb_td2_x30KdaCDiUr3yi5VIL6aAqNOnGTER7-WfxaZigObFmWBMzb6ZInyWHu_mTZ1o76CHmuF4jemW6et-JYsjcLpsZX_ME2NNjLGT92SdIxjH40ZXOAk7rclzNw0fMrq6wVSBFM5UCMMcxyKhxRT-lB0DJuj5yJ8LfTGy22vUwFT4V-MbsMpQLPY2cvE2oGMtgPQHh7DoQpi2GUkjRBSatS2ar5IFbGYcDXbeTlSO14YU%3D) **Thank you for joining us in this fight for America.

**Rebecca Weber,_Chairwoman_****AMAC Action**

And unlike the AARP, we’re fighting against George Soros not alongside him.You see, according to public tax filings, over three years, the AARP accepted more than 10 MILLION DOLLARS from the George Soros-funded Tides Foundation.The Tides Foundation says they are on the forefront of “climate justice, racial equity, reproductive freedom” and their mission is “justice and equity.”You know that’s just globalist speak for ‘destroy America and redistribute its power and wealth to radicals.’And listen to this... the AARP once honored George Soros on the cover of their magazine calling him one of “America’s Greatest Innovators” who’s** “changing the world, $100 million at a time.” It makes my stomach turn to see so many seniors supporting the AARP not knowing it’s under the influence of the radical George Soros-funded Tides Foundation.But today, I’m not writing to those seniors. If the AARP wants to betray America’s seniors by supporting dangerous leftists like George Soros, they are free to do so. But AMAC Action is leading the charge to bombard Congress with STOP SOROS petitions demanding they introduce, advance, and support legislation to shut-down this dangerous America hater once and for all.** And we would be honored to have you by our side. AMAC Action doesn’t take a dime of taxpayer funding. And we’re certainly not bought and paid for by George Soros or any of his dark money groups like the Tides Foundation.Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America.We answer to you -- not to George and Alex Soros. With that said, if you’re able to make a larger emergency gift of $50, $75, $100, $150, $250, $500, or even $1,000 -- please do it. Thank you for joining us in this fight for America. | | For Freedom, Rebecca Weber,ChairwomanAMAC Action | | | P.S. The country of Hungary passed a “Stop Soros Law” and so can we! To do it, . Thank you for taking action when action is needed! | | AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values. | | 2032 Tally Rd, Suite 1,Leesburg FL 34748 |

name: Team Schrier
subject: Hands off our Medicare and Social Security 🚫
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
BREAKING: The GOP is threatening YOUR earned benefits directly. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105453445/538391066/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YWFjMDIwMi1jOTE0LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f11d8a5sEK8GEPsLgL54pEIm5Bf5Wodr2-x-ufbAbew=&emci=9d4eee7d-8814-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=5aac0202-c914-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=15820338)
---

Peter,

Over the weekend, Kim stood shoulder to shoulder with her constituents at the _Hands Off_ rally—a grassroots event where community members came together to defend the benefits they rely on: Medicare, Medicaid, and Social Security.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105453446/538391067/339403568?ms=em25_250408_rally_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&&&&refcode=em25_250408_rally_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&&&&source=em25_250408_rally_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&&&&utm_campaign=em25_250408_rally_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&contactdata=Cc0mT5txH1Wf+3G63y+1iAYuqzl+4E7chy2DDJHp38VY/teChT9D5qg/VosQpFfpHtIJFy9ldkRIZzsSbhpiMOgklQTyRqraIN0wJldz2DrECCws7GS/FU8DFRBXQjXHmovs6+A7lwuXcKpNc/7aOUuF09okl7GCmCO91P1gjt0=&&&&refcode2=5aac0202-c914-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YWFjMDIwMi1jOTE0LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f11d8a5sEK8GEPsLgL54pEIm5Bf5Wodr2-x-ufbAbew=&emci=9d4eee7d-8814-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=5aac0202-c914-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=15820338)
The message was loud and clear: **Hands off our earned benefits.**

But Republicans in Congress are once again threatening reckless cuts. They’re pushing an extreme agenda that would gut the programs _millions_ of Americans depend on to survive—making our seniors, people with disabilities, and low-income families even more vulnerable.

clean_body: BREAKING: The GOP is threatening YOUR earned benefits directly. Peter, Over the weekend, Kim stood shoulder to shoulder with her constituents at the Hands Off rally—a grassroots event where community members came together to defend the benefits they rely on: Medicare, Medicaid, and Social Security. The message was loud and clear: Hands off our earned benefits. But Republicans in Congress are once again threatening reckless cuts. They’re pushing an extreme agenda that would gut the programs millions of Americans depend on to survive—making our seniors, people with disabilities, and low-income families even more vulnerable. Kim is fighting back tooth and nail to protect the benefits that you've earned. But she needs all of us in this fight. Peter, let's be clear: This is about dignity, security, and delivering on a part of the American promise. It’s about standing up for the people who built this country and deserve to retire and live with peace of mind. Every signature sends a message: We’re paying attention—and we won’t let wealthy extremists get away with gutting our hard earned benefits. Let’s keep up the pressure. Team Schrier Rep. I've been fortunate to hear from thousands of you, Democrats and Republicans alike, about the economic impact this is having on working families, and this is the truth: **higher costs and a crashing stock market are not what people voted for.**
