body:
It was a big week at Forward - here's what you missed.

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_58_uup_and_meme_c&n=1)
---
Tuesday, April 08, 2025 | Peter -- Last week, we took a break from our _**Controlling What You Can**_ __ series to bring you some big news! The Young Forwardists committee has partnered with **Mark Cuban** to bring you the _Changemaker Contest_. They're challenging people across the country to flood social media with memes about current events and Forward to raise name recognition and attract new members. People from around the country are submitting their memes between now and 4/21, and the winner will get a special shout out from Mark himself. [](https://home.forwardparty.com/changemaker_ai_contest?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_58_uup_and_meme_c&n=2) You can learn more about the [changemaker contest on our website](https://home.forwardparty.com/changemaker_ai_contest?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_58_uup_and_meme_c&n=3), and we can't wait to see your submissions. But that's not the only big news that happened this week! The Utah Forward Party announced an intended merger with the Utah United Party, a move that will bolster the party immensely! The two groups will be voting on the official merger at the [state convention at the end of the month](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=4h2u19b4cTAhgCD-RT-MfucisWAapKTztiYbrCzE4E0bFfz4HkmrfOm4DxXwqoMtn3WVBitiJfeCEV8ckwF7JQ&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_58_uup_and_meme_c&n=4). This announcement comes hot on the heals of another huge piece of Utah news when just a couple weeks ago, State Senator Dan Thatcher [switched his affiliation to FWD](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=4h2u19b4cTAhgCD-RT-MfucisWAapKTztiYbrCzE4E15n0HljlFusjbu6dzlTH5bdwx5wrcIfThRyeAsP5BY0kooi2ehqWSH5lxIhlsLKcGfEiV77ku9uExRrY6DHfDKa_HTlOf7LFneaDwSqlmG9f0FsD6aXNl2h52qA_LyJzQsP5oxVX--IHqb_Atq9thY1CscT14Bh1FzxqH1EL2kthC_UKYRtWRTPeiLJ6hhoTo&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_58_uup_and_meme_c&n=5). The Forward Party now has a sitting state senator, and he's already showing what it means to be a Forward leader. [](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=4h2u19b4cTAhgCD-RT-MfucisWAapKTztiYbrCzE4E0bFfz4HkmrfOm4DxXwqoMtn3WVBitiJfeCEV8ckwF7JQ&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_58_uup_and_meme_c&n=6) The Utah Forward Party is racking up the wins in the last month. The big question now is...which state will be next?
[United Utah Party, Utah Forward Party Announce Plans To Merge Operations](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=cyQb0j7nDEUAWj8v57K6Dt0Cg4XjvYYDMv3HaZC6e3RhhHKsSw0OmSReBtjvu1RUmpFwAkaMAzWRCo-75wS6j37CNGbvgOGeCSrihCkJiD9AcXoIGHBImk9G3xdalyuKdVLtMzNZdOYP-4vggK8AaQ&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_58_uup_and_meme_c&n=7) | _KSL 5 TV_ Two of Utah's newest political parties announced a merger last week to bolster their reach in the state. This announcement comes just after sitting Republican State Senator Daniel Thatcher announced that he would join the Utah Forward Party. [Andrew Yang Joins The Aaron Harber Show To Discuss Forward And The Future Of American Democracy](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=bivw41scGJ9-aiJAH6cAIJS1plak6-4PfwI4ZZ3Moo-h4pP68pT3mWPsXRrGFx1oBn_QQA1-VzZ1lEgESX2f2w&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_58_uup_and_meme_c&n=8) | _The Aaron Harber Show_ Co-Founder of the Forward Party Andrew Yang joins Aaron Harber to discuss his presidential run, the founding of the Forward Party, and how we can begin to fix our politics.
**April 8 | National Volunteer Call
** Join our director of volunteer engagement on the second Tuesday of every month for all things Forward Party—meet other volunteers, and hear what's happening around the country. [**Register →**](https://home.forwardparty.com/national_volunteer_call_20250408_2?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_58_uup_and_meme_c&n=9) **April 10 | Big Money Out Happy Hour
** Join the Virginia Forward Party and Big Money Out Virginia for a celebratory happy hour. After 11 years, VA passed restrictions on personal use of campaign donations. [**Register →**](https://home.forwardparty.com/big_money_out_happy_hour_20240410?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_58_uup_and_meme_c&n=10) **April 11 | Michigan State Party Meet Up
** Join the Michigan State Party to hear what's happening in the state, and learn how you can help out! [**Register →**](https://home.forwardparty.com/michigan_state_party_meet_up?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_58_uup_and_meme_c&n=11) **April 13 | Young Forwardists Weekly Communications Meeting
** Join the Young Forwardist Committee at their weekly comms meeting. Collaborate, share ideas, and build messaging strategy to reach the next generation of voters. We're sure the Changemaker Contest will be a huge topic! [**Register →**](https://home.forwardparty.com/young_forwardists_weekly_communications_meeting_20250223_20250316?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_58_uup_and_meme_c&n=12) **April 14 | Black Voters Committee Events Meeting
** Join the Black Voters Committee for their bi-weekly planning session. Learn all about what events are coming up and how you can make an impact. [**Register →**](https://home.forwardparty.com/bvc_events_committee?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_58_uup_and_meme_c&n=13) **April 18 | Northern Virginia Forward Social
** Join the Northern Virginia Forward Party for a social gathering at Ireland's Four Courts in Arlington. [**Register →**](https://home.forwardparty.com/nova_fwd_social_20250418?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_58_uup_and_meme_c&n=14) **April 23 | Virginia Forward x Andrew Yang
** The Virginia Forward Party hosts Andrew Yang to discuss the founding of Forward and the progress made in Massachusetts. The interview will be conducted by Sophia Nelson, a former Forward candidate in the state. [**Register →**](https://home.forwardparty.com/young_forwardists_weekly_communications_meeting_20250223_20250316?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_58_uup_and_meme_c&n=15) **April 24-27 | Vote Run Lead National Training
** Join our friends at Vote Run Lead for their Run As You Are National Training. Learn everything you need to know to run for office! clean_body: It was a big week at Forward - here's what you missed. | | Tuesday, April 08, 2025 | Peter -- Last week, we took a break from our Controlling What You Can series to bring you some big news! The Young Forwardists committee has partnered with Mark Cuban to bring you the Changemaker Contest. They're challenging people across the country to flood social media with memes about current events and Forward to raise name recognition and attract new members. People from around the country are submitting their memes between now and 4/21, and the winner will get a special shout out from Mark himself. You can learn more about the , and we can't wait to see your submissions. But that's not the only big news that happened this week! The Utah Forward Party announced an intended merger with the Utah United Party, a move that will bolster the party immensely! The two groups will be voting on the official merger at the . This announcement comes hot on the heals of another huge piece of Utah news when just a couple weeks ago, State Senator Dan Thatcher . The Forward Party now has a sitting state senator, and he's already showing what it means to be a Forward leader. The Utah Forward Party is racking up the wins in the last month. The big question now is...which state will be next? | KSL 5 TV Two of Utah's newest political parties announced a merger last week to bolster their reach in the state. This announcement comes just after sitting Republican State Senator Daniel Thatcher announced that he would join the Utah Forward Party. | The Aaron Harber Show Co-Founder of the Forward Party Andrew Yang joins Aaron Harber to discuss his presidential run, the founding of the Forward Party, and how we can begin to fix our politics. April 8 | National Volunteer Call Join our director of volunteer engagement on the second Tuesday of every month for all things Forward Party—meet other volunteers, and hear what's happening around the country. April 10 | Big Money Out Happy Hour Join the Virginia Forward Party and Big Money Out Virginia for a celebratory happy hour. After 11 years, VA passed restrictions on personal use of campaign donations. April 11 | Michigan State Party Meet Up Join the Michigan State Party to hear what's happening in the state, and learn how you can help out! April 13 | Young Forwardists Weekly Communications Meeting Join the Young Forwardist Committee at their weekly comms meeting. Collaborate, share ideas, and build messaging strategy to reach the next generation of voters. We're sure the Changemaker Contest will be a huge topic! April 14 | Black Voters Committee Events Meeting Join the Black Voters Committee for their bi-weekly planning session. Learn all about what events are coming up and how you can make an impact. April 18 | Northern Virginia Forward Social Join the Northern Virginia Forward Party for a social gathering at Ireland's Four Courts in Arlington. April 23 | Virginia Forward x Andrew Yang The Virginia Forward Party hosts Andrew Yang to discuss the founding of Forward and the progress made in Massachusetts. The interview will be conducted by Sophia Nelson, a former Forward candidate in the state. April 24-27 | Vote Run Lead National Training Join our friends at Vote Run Lead for their Run As You Are National Training. Learn everything you need to know to run for office! ** | KPCW | Utah Policy** Copyright © 2025 Forward Party, all rights reserved. Our mailing address is: 1701 Rhode Island Ave NW, Washington, DC 20036, United States Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ForwardParty.com

name: Katie Porter
subject: I went back to the classroom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39621%2E3422442%2ExyABqQ)
Dear Derek,
When I was wrapping up my time in the House, a lot of people asked what I was going to do next. The answer, if you’ve been following along with my work in Congress, isn’t that surprising: **I went back to the classroom.**
Unlike a lot of elected officials, I didn’t spend most of my adult life in politics. I had a career as a law professor that I loved, conducting research into families that struggled to make ends meet and training the next generation of advocates. Running for office wasn’t part of my lifelong plan.
After I was elected to the House as a first-time candidate, I didn’t do the job the way it’s always been done either. Building on my experience as a professor, **I treated Congress as a learning and teaching job.**
I would learn about my community’s needs by hosting town halls, touring local businesses and non-profits, talking to people in the grocery store, and just reading the news. Then, I would take that information and teach: sharing information back with constituents, engaging witnesses in hearings, and being in conversation with my colleagues.
The job of an elected representative is—literally—to represent. The only way to do that is to be in conversation with the people.
I’ve launched my campaign for governor doing exactly what I’ve always done: learning and teaching. I’m hearing directly from Californians, including families, workers, and businesses. And, I’m sharing information about my record in Congress and how I’m thinking about solving our state’s biggest challenges, such as housing and climate change.
**[But, it does take resources to get into communities and meet people where they are. So I have to ask, will you chip in $5 to my campaign, so I can keep working to represent California the best that I can?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250408_1_ak?refcode=em20250408-39621&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39621_3422442_xyABqQ&akid=39621%2E3422442%2ExyABqQ)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250408_1_ak?refcode=em20250408-39621&refcode2=39621_3422442_xyABqQ&akid=39621%2E3422442%2ExyABqQ)
Thanks for reading,
Katie

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250408-39621&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39621_3422442_xyABqQ&akid=39621%2E3422442%2ExyABqQ)**
---

Katie Porter for Governor 2026

name: Congressman Troy Downing
subject: Show some love to these Veterans!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
My fellow Veterans need your support

| | | Peter,

This is Congressman Troy Downing, Combat Veteran and proud conservative patriot. I’m reaching out with an urgent request – because the fight for America doesn’t end on the battlefield. It continues in the halls of Congress, and that’s where we need YOU.

Right now, six of my fellow warriors, also Freshman GOP Congressmen, are on the front lines of a different kind of battle: defending our Constitution, securing our borders, and standing up for American values against the radical Left.

These leaders don’t just talk the talk – they’ve served, sacrificed, and stood in the gap for this nation. But they can’t do it alone.
---

The Left has deep pockets filled with special interest money. But we have something stronger: patriots like you who believe in faith, freedom, and the future of our country.

name: Ron Wyden
subject: Trump thinks he has unilateral power
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
He's moving to illegally shut down the Department of Education. We need to remind him that we have a say.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105454346/538394066/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOWQyZWQzMS1jZDE0LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zBtFcC4wnY65M_ToP3MntPfIZf5JEnz2V99jKEvOUf4=&emci=1cb2c9a3-c614-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=39d2ed31-cd14-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=9818364)
---

| | Let's make one thing clear: **Presidents cannot dismantle a federal agency without the approval of Congress.** Donald Trump knows that shuttering the Department of Education is unpopular and hard to sell to Congress – even with his party's current majorities. So he's moved to effectively gut the agency by firing half the staff and crippling the department's ability to support public schools, enforce civil rights protections, and provide key guidance for teachers. **Donald Trump thinks your children don't deserve a quality public education, and he's desperate to make his sick dream a reality.** **Everything Donald Trump is doing is an effort to make our country less smart and less safe.** Moments like these are when we need to remind him – and the Republicans in Congress who've silently submitted to Trump's wishes – that there's another branch of government that has a say. Moments like these are when we need to make clear that they don't get to turn education into a luxury for the wealthy elite. name: Ted Corcoran, All On The Line
subject: NBC News: “New court decision in a disputed North Carolina race means 65,000 votes are a step closer to being thrown out”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
Please help power our grassroots efforts to protect democracy everywhere it’s under attack.
|
---

Peter —
Did you see Friday’s big news out of North Carolina? It’s a major development in the ongoing attempt to overturn last November’s state supreme court election:
**“New court decision in a disputed North Carolina race means 65,000 votes are a step closer to being thrown out” — NBC News**
As a native North Carolinian, I’ve seen far-right extremists go to great lengths to manipulate maps and stifle the will of the people here. But what’s happening in the Tar Heel state right now is a new low.
**In the face of attacks like these, All On The Line is mobilizing grassroots activists in North Carolina and across the nation to fight for fair elections and fair maps.**
**[As this case continues to move through the court system, I’m asking if you can rush a](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105454705/538395391/-877614143?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_NCRR_email_20250408-AOTL-Tier1-NCRR-TC_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250408-AOTL-Tier1-NCRR-TC_&utm_campaign=NCRR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ1ZDJlZDMxLWNkMTQtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ubGCmt_OfbwxLhF6lKXsZZycLJT3RIJN9FZOXf03HVg=)**[**$15 donation to help power our grassroots efforts to protect democracy everywhere it’s under attack.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105454706/538395393/-877614143?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_NCRR_email_20250408-AOTL-Tier1-NCRR-TC_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250408-AOTL-Tier1-NCRR-TC_&utm_campaign=NCRR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ1ZDJlZDMxLWNkMTQtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ubGCmt_OfbwxLhF6lKXsZZycLJT3RIJN9FZOXf03HVg=)

Here’s what you need to know: Back in November, Justice Allison Riggs won re-election. That was the result after all the votes were counted... and recounted... and recounted again. But her opponent is trying to convince a court to invalidate over 65,000 (legally valid) ballots — a brazen attempt to overturn a result he doesn’t like.
Why? Well, before last November’s election, Jefferson Griffin said he wants to ensure there’s a conservative majority on the court for the upcoming redistricting cycle, which could mean another decade of manipulated maps.
**It’s mind-blowing that this challenge is even moving forward. And it’s the canary in the coal mine for democracy.**
No one should be able to throw out legal votes after the election is over, and no one should be able to grind our system to a halt and waste taxpayer dollars because they lost a free and fair election.
But make no mistake: if this attempt to steal an election succeeds here in North Carolina, partisan extremists will try to export it nationwide.
**Here at All On The Line, we refuse to stand by while the very foundations of our democracy are threatened. And we’ll keep fighting for free and fair elections across the country.**

It’s mind-blowing that this challenge is even moving forward. And it’s the canary in the coal mine for democracy. No one should be able to throw out legal votes after the election is over, and no one should be able to grind our system to a halt and waste taxpayer dollars because they lost a free and fair election. name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Laura Loomer just went after me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=2269%2E135344%2EO-RNq-)

This morning, I was attacked on Twitter in a long rant by Trump supporter Laura Loomer. Here’s just the start of her tweet.
[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-apr25.NJ6rxh&refcode=em250408-2&t=2&akid=2269%2E135344%2EO-RNq-)
If you don't know who Laura Loomer is, she is a white nationalist whose conspiracy theories include calling school shootings “staged” events and September 11 "an inside job." She gets hundreds of millions of views on Twitter and possibly because of that, she now has walk-in access to the Oval Office.
And just last week, she used that access to significant effect: she gave the president a list of some of the nation's most senior generals to fire. And he did it the next day. Some of the most senior generals in our national security community, after serving honorably and exceptionally for 30 years, were summarily fired.
I gave a speech about it on the floor of the Senate where I expressed extreme frustration that my Republican colleagues, who have always claimed to be pro-defense, pro-patriot, pro-American, and pro-flag, couldn’t muster a word to stand up for an expert who served our country for 30 years.
Why? Because they’re scared. They live in fear that Trump may turn his spotlight on them, and go after them in front of the world.
So many actions happening on the floor of the Senate these days are in response to pure fear.
In truth, there are very few “true believers” in what this administration is doing. They are cowering in the corner, or trying to wait Trump out (as one Republican told me) while real patriots – people who have been trusted with the most sensitive information to keep our country safe – are being fired for no reason.
Quick thought for these Republicans: if fear causes you to vote differently, talk differently, or act differently, this isn’t the right job for you. Resign, go back home, and enjoy a quieter life with less pressure, and fewer people counting on you.
This latest round is indicative of a much bigger story taking place with President Trump. So I will continue to speak out about what he’s doing to our country, no matter what kind of attacks or attention it draws.
Elissa Slotkin
* * *

👋🏻 **Wait, before you click away!** 🇺🇸
United States Senators often keep on fundraising after their election ends, but Elissa doesn't want to keep bombarding your inbox with fundraising requests.
What we will do is send you good, timely content - like this message. Stuff you might open without dread.
But she does hope you may consider making a small, monthly recurring contribution. Even just $5 or $10 - so we don't have to send those mass fundraising emails while Elissa is focused on her work as a Senator.
[**Make a recurring contribution to Elissa Slotkin's campaign here.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/1960?c0=ebs-em-apr25.XPV_iG&refcode=em250408-2&t=3&akid=2269%2E135344%2EO-RNq-)

If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/dAfRehWDrkq5GdVTndjWgA2?unsubscribedata=UR3Mo8j%2BSrjiloHqIokX%2F1eT%2FB0kg%2BcOKJPvNLyhYovWEJdCZK4RGNO8mmyeDYpIZJEIqgtBEBUCJqR73kiZ3yGXICJHEr5ZdVlCU0lmcPK3zikteFrTHvM3SXMZP%2B97DYW%2FuIOnjCPMVMw2qXXjfp4T%2BQJWElNQ9zWhPVDfKpYiNbTuMpUZ39DiTkHB7QxwPhXamy84AQ7WVfKywRTsZZyzyhevjyS%2FgEe4cy7y%2FPvS1yNLKV7a10uPNqKVlYddFBwuSmCCSLjJW9VXZkhAX4uLPCRNuFF%2B8ntj1ygM8NWrij1uZB0Jcrf72%2FYcHj%2F8kS7XjP7H9GzFuKqhoxQzTjCj9BLnwud%2B%2FOdJD%2FNoYrC6n35LBFEMwjid8lvpF8H2xvamdTbpD5SlDkO3gP%2FZ8Wue9a5NbiX40vOh9zb9GUtQBFAk6GhtZGhTQ7nttL5M)

Republicans have been threatening to gut Social Security for years. And with Donald Trump in the White House, Republicans in control of Congress, and Elon Musk wielding a seemingly endless amount of power, they finally have the means to do it. Slashing Social Security would deprive millions of America’s seniors of the benefits they worked their entire lives to earn and depend on to thrive. [We have to stand together in this fight. Will you join us and call on House Republicans to defend Social Security?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105454907/538396137/-392513845?source=SBD_RR_EM_EN_040725_SocialSecurity_30DO30DNTL_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODE0NThiZTItY2QxNC1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tdErTBMIqOD_LqxR6Eh2cxL7kSUZsXvNSt44pRfBgp0=&emci=31d43eb9-c614-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=81458be2-cd14-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=4131986) | | **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105454909/538396141/-392513845?source=SBD_RR_EM_EN_040725_SocialSecurity_30DO30DNTL_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODE0NThiZTItY2QxNC1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tdErTBMIqOD_LqxR6Eh2cxL7kSUZsXvNSt44pRfBgp0=&emci=31d43eb9-c614-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=81458be2-cd14-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=4131986)**

Dr. Ruiz has always been a strong advocate for the protection of Social Security, and he has the voting record to prove it.
But Republicans couldn’t care less about protecting our seniors. They’re willing to make drastic cuts to programs millions of Americans rely on to continue lining the pockets of ultra-wealthy billionaires like Elon Musk and further Donald Trump’s dangerous agenda.
Americans deserve better.
We need 10,000 signatures by the end of this week to send a resounding message that we won't stand by and watch as Republicans gut Social Security, and we need your help to do it.
[Will you take 30 seconds to sign our petition and stand alongside Dr. Ruiz and other House Democrats fighting to preserve Social Security?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105454911/538396143/-392513845?source=SBD_RR_EM_EN_040725_SocialSecurity_30DO30DNTL_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODE0NThiZTItY2QxNC1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tdErTBMIqOD_LqxR6Eh2cxL7kSUZsXvNSt44pRfBgp0=&emci=31d43eb9-c614-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=81458be2-cd14-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=4131986)

The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. **Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.**

clean_body: While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Republicans have been threatening to gut Social Security for years. And with Donald Trump in the White House, Republicans in control of Congress, and Elon Musk wielding a seemingly endless amount of power, they finally have the means to do it. Slashing Social Security would deprive millions of America’s seniors of the benefits they worked their entire lives to earn and depend on to thrive. | | Dr. Ruiz has always been a strong advocate for the protection of Social Security, and he has the voting record to prove it. But Republicans couldn’t care less about protecting our seniors. They’re willing to make drastic cuts to programs millions of Americans rely on to continue lining the pockets of ultra-wealthy billionaires like Elon Musk and further Donald Trump’s dangerous agenda. Americans deserve better. We need 10,000 signatures by the end of this week to send a resounding message that we won't stand by and watch as Republicans gut Social Security, and we need your help to do it. | — Ruiz HQ | | | ---|---|--- = The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.** | = = PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: You can also =. Dr. Raul Ruiz for Congress Committee P.O. Box 1566 Indio, CA 92202 United States

name: Nani w/ ParentsTogether
subject: Tax day!
body:
Here’s a FREE, easy way to file your taxes

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us8.campaign-archive.com/?e=7e921d898f&u=1c4af7e0c2cf6603f994addd7&id=e5786f3bfc)
---
| | | Hi Peter,
If you haven’t filed your taxes yet, check out [**IRS Direct File!**](https://parents-together.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c4af7e0c2cf6603f994addd7&id=ac1d984c92&e=7e921d898f) It’s a groundbreaking new service that will allow taxpayers to file their taxes online QUICKLY, EASILY, and FOR FREE.
Filing taxes is an important responsibility, and also a source of critical help for many of us who get hundreds or even thousands of dollars every spring in our tax refunds. Direct File is an exciting opportunity for you to access free, safe, and easy tax filing services. It also allows you to avoid the mega-corporations that siphon money from hardworking Americans to pad their profits.
---
|
## **What do I do?**
---
|
* Visit [**directfile.irs.gov**](https://parents-together.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c4af7e0c2cf6603f994addd7&id=6a720c6c48&e=7e921d898f)**** on your **computer, tablet, or phone** to check your eligibility.

* If eligible, create an ID.me* login account (check-out this [**step-by-step guide**](https://parents-together.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c4af7e0c2cf6603f994addd7&id=9851e9b70d&e=7e921d898f) in case you need help)

*Direct File uses ID.me to make sure your tax data is absolutely secure

* Use the **simple interview-style** tool to complete your federal taxes — in English or Spanish

* If you live in a state with income taxes: Once you complete your federal taxes, you’ll be taken to a free state filing system on your state’s tax website to seamlessly complete your state return online, too.

---
|
## **How long will this take?**
---
|
* In most cases, Direct File takes **less than an hour** and many people reported filing in as little as 30 minutes.

* If you can’t finish all at once, you can **save your progress** and finish your return later.

---
|
## **What will I need?**
---
|
* When you use Direct File, you will have access to **dedicated live chat support** from IRS staff in **English or Spanish**. If needed, you can switch to a phone call with a representative for additional support.

---
**For more information about Direct File, you can visit: directfile.irs.gov.**
| [Visit Direct File](https://parents-together.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c4af7e0c2cf6603f994addd7&id=ead2483f4b&e=7e921d898f)
---
|
## **Am I eligible?**
---
|
* Taxpayers from 25 states are able participate this filing season: **Alaska, Arizona, California, Connecticut, Florida, Idaho, Illinois, Kansas, Maine, Maryland, Massachusetts, Nevada, New Hampshire, New Jersey, New Mexico, New York, North Carolina, Oregon, Pennsylvania, South Dakota, Tennessee, Texas, Washington, Wisconsin, Wyoming
** You can use Direct File if you **use standard deduction and have a relatively straightforward tax situation**. For example, if you don’t itemize your deductions, your income came primarily from W-2 employment, and you claim common tax credits like the CTC, EITC, or premium tax credit, you're likely eligible. Gig work is not yet covered by Direct File. Direct File has a screener tool that will make sure it's the right tool for you before you start filing.

**Visit**[**directfile.irs.gov**](https://parents-together.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c4af7e0c2cf6603f994addd7&id=454aaca274&e=7e921d898f)** to learn more about eligibility specifics. **

---
|
## What if I don’t have a Social Security Number**?**
---
|
* Tax filers with an Individual Taxpayer Identification Number (ITIN) who have previously filed taxes can use Direct File. Tax filers with a Social Security Number (SSN) can use Direct File regardless of having previously filed taxes.

---
| Go to [**directfile.irs.gov**](https://parents-together.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c4af7e0c2cf6603f994addd7&id=ebd8b29515&e=7e921d898f) by April 15 to file your taxes for free this year!
Hope this is helpful! Nani

clean_body: Here’s a FREE, easy way to file your taxes | | | | | | | | | Hi Peter, If you haven’t filed your taxes yet, check out It’s a groundbreaking new service that will allow taxpayers to file their taxes online QUICKLY, EASILY, and FOR FREE. Filing taxes is an important responsibility, and also a source of critical help for many of us who get hundreds or even thousands of dollars every spring in our tax refunds. Direct File is an exciting opportunity for you to access free, safe, and easy tax filing services. It also allows you to avoid the mega-corporations that siphon money from hardworking Americans to pad their profits. | What do I do? | Visit on your computer, tablet, or phone to check your eligibility. If eligible, create an ID.me login account (check-out this in case you need help) Direct File uses ID.me to make sure your tax data is absolutely secure Use the simple interview-style tool to complete your federal taxes — in English or Spanish If you live in a state with income taxes: Once you complete your federal taxes, you’ll be taken to a free state filing system on your state’s tax website to seamlessly complete your state return online, too. | How long will this take? | In most cases, Direct File takes less than an hour and many people reported filing in as little as 30 minutes. If you can’t finish all at once, you can save your progress and finish your return later. | What will I need? | When you use Direct File, you will have access to dedicated live chat support from IRS staff in English or Spanish. If needed, you can switch to a phone call with a representative for additional support. For more information about Direct File, you can visit: directfile.irs.gov. | | Am I eligible? | Taxpayers from 25 states are able participate this filing season: Alaska, Arizona, California, Connecticut, Florida, Idaho, Illinois, Kansas, Maine, Maryland, Massachusetts, Nevada, New Hampshire, New Jersey, New Mexico, New York, North Carolina, Oregon, Pennsylvania, South Dakota, Tennessee, Texas, Washington, Wisconsin, Wyoming You can use Direct File if you use standard deduction and have a relatively straightforward tax situation. For example, if you don’t itemize your deductions, your income came primarily from W-2 employment, and you claim common tax credits like the CTC, EITC, or premium tax credit, you're likely eligible. Gig work is not yet covered by Direct File. Direct File has a screener tool that will make sure it's the right tool for you before you start filing. Visit to learn more about eligibility specifics. | What if I don’t have a Social Security Number? | Tax filers with an Individual Taxpayer Identification Number (ITIN) who have previously filed taxes can use Direct File. Tax filers with a Social Security Number (SSN) can use Direct File regardless of having previously filed taxes. | Go to by April 15 to file your taxes for free this year! Hope this is helpful! body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

After Senator Bernie Sanders forced a vote on his resolution to stop any
new arms sales to Israel in light of its ongoing genocide and ethnic
cleansing of Palestinians, only 15 out of 100 senators voted for it.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250408?refcode=em20250408-36569&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36569_1203867_PEKVk2&akid=36569%2E1203867%2EPEKVk2 ]Image of a tweet from Rashida Tlaib which reads "15 senators voted to
save lives today. It's disgraceful that some senators flipped their
support & now agree to slaughter children with U.S. bombs. Americans want
to stop arming the Israeli gov't. We will remember who agreed to send
35,000 one-ton bombs to kill Palestinians.

While Netanyahu is joining Trump at the White House, just 15 senators had
the moral courage to stand up to AIPAC and vote against sending more bombs
and weapons to slaughter Palestinian civilians, including thousands of
children.

It’s an utter shame, Peter, and
it must change.

This is exactly why we need to elect more anti-war, pro-human rights
candidates to Congress like Justice Democrats’ Rashida Tlaib, Summer Lee,
and Greg Casar.

name: Spanberger for Governor HQ
subject: 🚨Abigail’s opponent this November
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
It’s official: Lt. Gov. Winsome Earle-Sears is the Republican nominee for Governor of Virginia and Abigail’s official opponent in the November 2025 race.
Peter,
It’s official: Lt. Gov. Winsome Earle-Sears is the Republican nominee for Governor of Virginia and Abigail’s official opponent in the November 2025 race.
**[We’ll explain more below, but first, will you split a donation between Abigail’s campaign for Governor and Heartland Patriots right now?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87735?refcode=em20250408-8873&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8873%2E614464%2EhgxhAO)**
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87735?refcode=em20250408-8873&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=8873%2E614464%2EhgxhAO)**
The stakes couldn’t be higher this November. Sears has spent her entire political career pushing extreme right-wing policies and backing Donald Trump at every turn. She’s repeatedly voiced her support for anti-choice measures to restrict women’s reproductive rights — including a near-total abortion ban — and just last week spoke at an anti-abortion rally in Richmond.
She’s not looking out for the people of Virginia. While Virginia's federal workers are facing instability and chaos from the Trump-Musk administration and DOGE’s cuts, Abigail’s opponent is standing behind Trump 100% and “doesn’t understand why” it’s a big deal that Virginians are being fired from their jobs. She literally told Virginians “don’t fret.”
Sears is just another rubber stamp for the MAGA agenda, and frankly, Virginians deserve better. Abigail will always put the people of Virginia first – she’ll work to lower costs, protect our fundamental rights, stand up for Virginia jobs, strengthen our public schools, and so much more.
But this race is set to be the most competitive in the country this November — Cook Political Report is calling it a total TOSS UP. Right now, Abigail Spanberger and Winsome Sears are neck and neck — and with Trump’s MAGA machine ready to flood Virginia with dark money, we can’t afford to fall behind.
**[We need your help. Will you contribute today between Abigail’s campaign and Heartland Patriots to help us flip the Governor’s office blue and elect Abigail Spanberger?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87735?refcode=em20250408-8873&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=8873%2E614464%2EhgxhAO)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87736?refcode=em20250408-8873&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=4&akid=8873%2E614464%2EhgxhAO) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87736?refcode=em20250408-8873&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=5&akid=8873%2E614464%2EhgxhAO) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87736?refcode=em20250408-8873&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=8873%2E614464%2EhgxhAO) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87736?refcode=em20250408-8873&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=8873%2E614464%2EhgxhAO) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87736?refcode=em20250408-8873&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=8873%2E614464%2EhgxhAO) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87736?refcode=em20250408-8873&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=8873%2E614464%2EhgxhAO) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87735?refcode=em20250408-8873&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=8873%2E614464%2EhgxhAO)

"**Texas measles outbreak tops 500 cases, including multiple at a day care in Lubbock** ," AP's**Jamie Stengle** -- "A day care facility in a Texas county that's part of the [measles outbreak](https://substack.com/redirect/087f83e4-7fcf-4e04-96d8-551ef8bef8ae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) has multiple cases, including children too young to be [fully vaccinated](https://substack.com/redirect/a9e56eec-01f1-4a09-be64-1d081b40bebe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), public health officials say.

West Texas is in the middle of a still-growing [measles outbreak](https://substack.com/redirect/67a688f7-c2b2-4352-b12b-01fd24242e43?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) with 505 cases reported on Tuesday. The state expanded the number of counties in the outbreak area this week to 10. The highly contagious virus began to spread in late January and health officials say it has spread to New Mexico, Oklahoma, Kansas and Mexico.

Three people who were unvaccinated have died from measles-related illnesses this year, including two [elementary school-aged children](https://substack.com/redirect/cae721d7-e0a0-4c33-a994-b2464e52bbc4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in Texas. The second child died Thursday at a Lubbock hospital, and Health Secretary **Robert F. Kennedy Jr**. [attended the funeral](https://substack.com/redirect/1aee3424-dacd-41ca-8df3-342a0caa1f1c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in Seminole, the epicenter of the outbreak.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/67494be8-19fa-42b3-a283-335cd8fbc6e7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
As of Friday, there were seven cases at a day care where one young child who was infectious gave it to two other children before it spread to other classrooms, Lubbock Public Health director **Katherine Wells** said.

"Measles is so contagious I won't be surprised if it enters other facilities," Wells said.

There are more than 200 children at the day care, Wells said, and most have had least one dose of the measles, mumps and rubella vaccine, which is first recommended between 12 and 15 months old and a second shot between 4 and 6 years old.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/67494be8-19fa-42b3-a283-335cd8fbc6e7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"We do have some children that have only received one dose that are now infected," she said.

The public health department is recommending that any child with only one vaccine get their second dose early, and changed its recommendation for kids in Lubbock County to get the first vaccine dose at 6 months old instead of 1. A child who is unvaccinated and attends the day care must stay home for 21 days since their last exposure, Wells said.

Case count and hospitalization numbers in Texas have climbed steadily since the outbreak began, and spiked by 81 cases from March 28 to April 4.

On Tuesday, [the state](https://substack.com/redirect/e3365150-97ef-45bc-80d5-f8cfd2427a50?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) added another 24 cases to its count and two additional counties, Borden and Randall. One more person was hospitalized since Friday, with 57 total.

Gaines County, where the virus has been spreading through [a close-knit Mennonite community](https://substack.com/redirect/1f194b90-d9fe-4543-b54c-1519b9c253bc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), has the majority of cases, with 328 on Tuesday. Neighboring Terry County is second with 46, followed by Lubbock County with 36.

The U.S. Centers for Disease Control and Prevention met with Texas officials Monday to determine how many people it would send to West Texas to assist with the outbreak response, spokesman **Jason McDonald** said Monday. He expected a small team to arrive later this week, followed by a bigger group on the ground next week.

The CDC said its first team was in the region from early March to April 1, withdrawing on-the-ground support days before a second child died in the outbreak." [AP](https://substack.com/redirect/5e5f763b-774c-4b71-8fcd-041cff0edf66?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

Case count and hospitalization numbers in Texas have climbed steadily since the outbreak began, and spiked by 81 cases from March 28 to April 4. On Tuesday, added another 24 cases to its count and two additional counties, Borden and Randall. One more person was hospitalized since Friday, with 57 total. Gaines County, where the virus has been spreading through , has the majority of cases, with 328 on Tuesday. Neighboring Terry County is second with 46, followed by Lubbock County with 36. The U.S. Centers for Disease Control and Prevention met with Texas officials Monday to determine how many people it would send to West Texas to assist with the outbreak response, spokesman Jason McDonald said Monday. He expected a small team to arrive later this week, followed by a bigger group on the ground next week. The CDC said its first team was in the region from early March to April 1, withdrawing on-the-ground support days before a second child died in the outbreak." Are you one of the 100,000+ subscribers to [ATX Pulse](https://substack.com/redirect/ebe2b35b-1242-4625-8da9-96224facc023?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), a newsletter that delivers EVERYTHING you NEED TO KNOW about Austin?

> Read the most recent FREE subscriber email [here](https://substack.com/redirect/d9990f9f-3ba9-4356-ae0a-890048eacfb4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
> Become a PAID subscriber for $5/mo or $50/yr [here](https://substack.com/redirect/897828ba-e696-46ac-9c57-e433a75060bd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
* * *
* **TOP NEWS**

"**Texas measles outbreak tops 500 cases, including multiple at a day care in Lubbock** ," AP's**Jamie Stengle** -- "A day care facility in a Texas county that's part of the [measles outbreak](https://substack.com/redirect/a166aecc-4e9c-4002-8130-7d49c51fdc7a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) has multiple cases, including children too young to be [fully vaccinated](https://substack.com/redirect/2cf4644b-25ba-428b-a604-4bab527f1d7e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), public health officials say.

West Texas is in the middle of a still-growing [measles outbreak](https://substack.com/redirect/3cc664ea-f416-4fe2-ac62-9a47d2dd085f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) with 505 cases reported on Tuesday. The state expanded the number of counties in the outbreak area this week to 10. The highly contagious virus began to spread in late January and health officials say it has spread to New Mexico, Oklahoma, Kansas and Mexico.

Three people who were unvaccinated have died from measles-related illnesses this year, including two [elementary school-aged children](https://substack.com/redirect/f9f5f4fe-4020-4c0f-b492-ddd7d4a717e5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in Texas. The second child died Thursday at a Lubbock hospital, and Health Secretary **Robert F. Kennedy Jr**. [attended the funeral](https://substack.com/redirect/5285d485-df4c-47d4-a85a-929ef6c9e7a1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in Seminole, the epicenter of the outbreak.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/df92e0f2-de36-4af2-a4ef-8ae7ec5ade1d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
As of Friday, there were seven cases at a day care where one young child who was infectious gave it to two other children before it spread to other classrooms, Lubbock Public Health director **Katherine Wells** said.

"Measles is so contagious I won't be surprised if it enters other facilities," Wells said.

There are more than 200 children at the day care, Wells said, and most have had least one dose of the measles, mumps and rubella vaccine, which is first recommended between 12 and 15 months old and a second shot between 4 and 6 years old.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/df92e0f2-de36-4af2-a4ef-8ae7ec5ade1d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"We do have some children that have only received one dose that are now infected," she said.

The public health department is recommending that any child with only one vaccine get their second dose early, and changed its recommendation for kids in Lubbock County to get the first vaccine dose at 6 months old instead of 1. A child who is unvaccinated and attends the day care must stay home for 21 days since their last exposure, Wells said.

Case count and hospitalization numbers in Texas have climbed steadily since the outbreak began, and spiked by 81 cases from March 28 to April 4.

On Tuesday, [the state](https://substack.com/redirect/da6f5934-6a8d-4ea2-af33-d9d26b594200?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) added another 24 cases to its count and two additional counties, Borden and Randall. One more person was hospitalized since Friday, with 57 total.

Gaines County, where the virus has been spreading through [a close-knit Mennonite community](https://substack.com/redirect/bff150e5-a5c1-4aa6-97ea-7323a75236f4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), has the majority of cases, with 328 on Tuesday. Neighboring Terry County is second with 46, followed by Lubbock County with 36.

The U.S. Centers for Disease Control and Prevention met with Texas officials Monday to determine how many people it would send to West Texas to assist with the outbreak response, spokesman **Jason McDonald** said Monday. He expected a small team to arrive later this week, followed by a bigger group on the ground next week.

The CDC said its first team was in the region from early March to April 1, withdrawing on-the-ground support days before a second child died in the outbreak." [AP](https://substack.com/redirect/9e43b492-e64a-4391-b571-2444ae645f69?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

TOP NEWS "Texas measles outbreak tops 500 cases, including multiple at a day care in Lubbock ," AP'sJamie Stengle -- "A day care facility in a Texas county that's part of the has multiple cases, including children too young to be , public health officials say. West Texas is in the middle of a still-growing with 505 cases reported on Tuesday. The state expanded the number of counties in the outbreak area this week to 10. The highly contagious virus began to spread in late January and health officials say it has spread to New Mexico, Oklahoma, Kansas and Mexico. Three people who were unvaccinated have died from measles-related illnesses this year, including two in Texas. The second child died Thursday at a Lubbock hospital, and Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. in Seminole, the epicenter of the outbreak. As of Friday, there were seven cases at a day care where one young child who was infectious gave it to two other children before it spread to other classrooms, Lubbock Public Health director Katherine Wells said. "Measles is so contagious I won't be surprised if it enters other facilities," Wells said. There are more than 200 children at the day care, Wells said, and most have had least one dose of the measles, mumps and rubella vaccine, which is first recommended between 12 and 15 months old and a second shot between 4 and 6 years old. "We do have some children that have only received one dose that are now infected," she said. The public health department is recommending that any child with only one vaccine get their second dose early, and changed its recommendation for kids in Lubbock County to get the first vaccine dose at 6 months old instead of 1. A child who is unvaccinated and attends the day care must stay home for 21 days since their last exposure, Wells said. Case count and hospitalization numbers in Texas have climbed steadily since the outbreak began, and spiked by 81 cases from March 28 to April 4. On Tuesday, added another 24 cases to its count and two additional counties, Borden and Randall. One more person was hospitalized since Friday, with 57 total. Gaines County, where the virus has been spreading through , has the majority of cases, with 328 on Tuesday. Neighboring Terry County is second with 46, followed by Lubbock County with 36. The U.S. Centers for Disease Control and Prevention met with Texas officials Monday to determine how many people it would send to West Texas to assist with the outbreak response, spokesman Jason McDonald said Monday. He expected a small team to arrive later this week, followed by a bigger group on the ground next week. The CDC said its first team was in the region from early March to April 1, withdrawing on-the-ground support days before a second child died in the outbreak." “**Texas measles outbreak tops 500 cases, including multiple at a day care in Lubbock** ,” AP's**Jamie Stengle** — “A day care facility in a Texas county that’s part of the [measles outbreak](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.taRaxrEkWqxIZl3CYy7RU-8zPWZErbzsTpoOJuc75r1R4UO-s1Db1m647PGB6t4yolnWoAfBYOvbnJoyrnkSma82KQ4aOoJBADGWjQf6X5n7BvyZ3Obvh3PIsUL1k91vwkGvF8R5PPNJztLS174cI2ePcIHk99-5pF56OPn0fn7bJBAPqDwIHKC-aMzlpFFEcVRXFFu9VStiq1mutKw1BzhTToob7B0DrljHZZ1OE0olXBtYg2yHAN1pp2Q45Izkjc8KtQVCFjRzwl6WF_tASsYo3_v1a6C6A1b7Q_R5oBAfhjs5V6ILMS3zA6tzWxWM2Op2CLT8WKjmMgTfgI2Wr-D4Ma8BbnC2wAcsmgunfbMkB_9Xq6JAPLybO0hA0qmHIHl99fGpWSq2S5u4o8kosl_7NjDo28HYnTSdt9qmjFQXxJksFY5wTjco_vWTS9zqsK78hqeH09KAY9QKh3KLI9HZPrTX8qlqY_2OZFdlpo_lOKJcbaAc404VVH6S3FSRVtGC8y8cFi3vlBaS8KFTKg/4fh/Z6_LIq9CQUKTaVHFJdNfnw/h11/h001.4mkgKlSg2f5rvmB-FkcnnKz2SwNt6Y5VZNx7ExGX3bk) has multiple cases, including children too young to be [fully vaccinated](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.taRaxrEkWqxIZl3CYy7RU-8zPWZErbzsTpoOJuc75r1kBlFGPI12JmW0bwqFnwO6nn26CPIczRwVfqJYijBmAwGpBFzyG05JzToixCI_drqqYKwY4DhdBfSGun6dqoKlN26Y-rJHHQeC_wF1Q9MhFcpRv0XsNAgLRu0w_sOMmt_6kilwlR2S7quLAthZyNDWcNuPsLjQ4O_pHZCYW-ABFdtIkMgCZ7caOi8MqB8QHoulOBsE66ga_CCNLBHaFYJtTTMQT3XJGje9ATy-PQWgbo34MUa_AyFKthvNQOC07JuLUkQDynBVG5UobXov8insf_Nv01pNkNTibD_MOFGPnPPJc6eXpxB-cyFoDci3_LhBiS0Lcjp7VP2T4DGOhCMXcWZBStaOlnZPBVOYDqv6AUMH2nz8Hr4teetutpNP-hcCZSL6JymiCj3TXAZaaGxww9J75Swd-Lzs-XqLw7fmzR-7o9URURrHW4FXF_86v2QXzwSqV4JRKIllVWSzbH7W/4fh/Z6_LIq9CQUKTaVHFJdNfnw/h12/h001.EwIPR9DXpae0TmtDSwZPR65LocVbDEapFl1nBLna0p8), public health officials say.

West Texas is in the middle of a still-growing [measles outbreak](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.xjnMFfva-73dHOne5Rc0eIm2XEttcyu7wgUz2Ryy6NrwjVkbm8A642OnHAFLobxggyAexxVYcSPL_u736IXJcvSxJ8PMnndC919OfgXUJrydCcwB3gZxwf3KTNqPzXf6HAt9wvithTtXsfYbYh8LgYOiFGsqTWMR_5Efzu5l-SotwACeVCS-51p3HEisz3JrVYEhP5Tge7ArLqJbTspx3is-v8TDOktieZLTJWMNawSnUJQqt7_qtsdrXeEyy0RBSaNrpPYInzoFge7TeIwMuawxjP2kz0Wo6TNKuLTr3SVLecCUsQyN4zDoo-3Tkg3Yl96eGAxeNEwDoA3tLJpZlOnQbuZvW-ZaeIfr87UddbBN3sg5lACZ70FG0f4jzxbpD6inlrKWDdIq4f_OUSEC6zo8ReqVJ-eMP6VcimCOj8rZSVx0w0yAgCtCJJxLcUlH/4fh/Z6_LIq9CQUKTaVHFJdNfnw/h13/h001.n_H1g3daaz_QdBQjKNBDMPQctB6QPfQGtBFqVkOo8G0) with 505 cases reported on Tuesday. The state expanded the number of counties in the outbreak area this week to 10. The highly contagious virus began to spread in late January and health officials say it has spread to New Mexico, Oklahoma, Kansas and Mexico.

As of Friday, there were seven cases at a day care where one young child who was infectious gave it to two other children before it spread to other classrooms, Lubbock Public Health director **Katherine Wells** said.

“Measles is so contagious I won’t be surprised if it enters other facilities,” Wells said.

There are more than 200 children at the day care, Wells said, and most have had least one dose of the measles, mumps and rubella vaccine, which is first recommended between 12 and 15 months old and a second shot between 4 and 6 years old.

“We do have some children that have only received one dose that are now infected,” she said.

The public health department is recommending that any child with only one vaccine get their second dose early, and changed its recommendation for kids in Lubbock County to get the first vaccine dose at 6 months old instead of 1. A child who is unvaccinated and attends the day care must stay home for 21 days since their last exposure, Wells said.

Case count and hospitalization numbers in Texas have climbed steadily since the outbreak began, and spiked by 81 cases from March 28 to April 4.

The U.S. Centers for Disease Control and Prevention met with Texas officials Monday to determine how many people it would send to West Texas to assist with the outbreak response, spokesman **Jason McDonald** said Monday. Become a PAID subscriber for $5/mo or $50/yr . | TOP NEWS “Texas measles outbreak tops 500 cases, including multiple at a day care in Lubbock ,” AP'sJamie Stengle — “A day care facility in a Texas county that’s part of the has multiple cases, including children too young to be , public health officials say. West Texas is in the middle of a still-growing with 505 cases reported on Tuesday. The state expanded the number of counties in the outbreak area this week to 10. The highly contagious virus began to spread in late January and health officials say it has spread to New Mexico, Oklahoma, Kansas and Mexico. Three people who were unvaccinated have died from measles-related illnesses this year, including two in Texas. The second child died Thursday at a Lubbock hospital, and Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. in Seminole, the epicenter of the outbreak. » As of Friday, there were seven cases at a day care where one young child who was infectious gave it to two other children before it spread to other classrooms, Lubbock Public Health director Katherine Wells said. “Measles is so contagious I won’t be surprised if it enters other facilities,” Wells said. There are more than 200 children at the day care, Wells said, and most have had least one dose of the measles, mumps and rubella vaccine, which is first recommended between 12 and 15 months old and a second shot between 4 and 6 years old. » “We do have some children that have only received one dose that are now infected,” she said. The public health department is recommending that any child with only one vaccine get their second dose early, and changed its recommendation for kids in Lubbock County to get the first vaccine dose at 6 months old instead of 1. A child who is unvaccinated and attends the day care must stay home for 21 days since their last exposure, Wells said. Case count and hospitalization numbers in Texas have climbed steadily since the outbreak began, and spiked by 81 cases from March 28 to April 4. On Tuesday, added another 24 cases to its count and two additional counties, Borden and Randall. One more person was hospitalized since Friday, with 57 total. Gaines County, where the virus has been spreading through , has the majority of cases, with 328 on Tuesday. Neighboring Terry County is second with 46, followed by Lubbock County with 36. The U.S. Centers for Disease Control and Prevention met with Texas officials Monday to determine how many people it would send to West Texas to assist with the outbreak response, spokesman Jason McDonald said Monday. He expected a small team to arrive later this week, followed by a bigger group on the ground next week. The CDC said its first team was in the region from early March to April 1, withdrawing on-the-ground support days before a second child died in the outbreak." | FREE SUBSCRIPTIONS HAVE ENDED : As of July 11, 2022, we have moved to a paywall for free subscribers. Peter — It’s been a _long_ two months since Trump took office for a second time. His administration wasted no time targeting vulnerable communities and putting forth cruel federal cuts that jeopardize the programs that seniors and veterans depend on. Mazie has been busy taking a stand against each and every one of Trump’s attacks on everyday people — but through it all, she wants to make sure she hears from this team. We can’t fight for progressive change and ensure that everyone gets a fair shake without your valuable input, Peter. **[So please, fill out our official April Priorities Survey to let Mazie know your top issues and concerns so she can better serve you in Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105455643/538398437/1345206354?refcode=AU_MKH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20250408_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjIxODY3Ni1kMzE0LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PWtZ7AM9lzjSUyuL7UGW7rafoeJ7IG0JLpb9kYHozy4=&emci=6b8b13dc-bc13-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=e2218676-d314-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=23190490)** | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105455644/538398438/1345206354?refcode=AU_MKH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20250408_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjIxODY3Ni1kMzE0LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PWtZ7AM9lzjSUyuL7UGW7rafoeJ7IG0JLpb9kYHozy4=&emci=6b8b13dc-bc13-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=e2218676-d314-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=23190490)

We Can't Have a Country that Works Only for the White Upper Middle Class

---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..UaNDs7yLRETjeDICWHnLKZYeyP536PuJlRNplLGNu0U?) for more
---
# [ Trump Should Hold the Line on His Tariff Policy](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=365201&post_id=160903092&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYwOTAzMDkyLCJpYXQiOjE3NDQxNTYwNjksImV4cCI6MTc0Njc0ODA2OSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM2NTIwMSIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.pvnptsSI5QCo3acznnLX6mx01i8bt2x02ZVpaJhWeRQ)
### We Can't Have a Country that Works Only for the White Upper Middle Class
| | [Joseph Bentivegna](https://substack.com/@jfbentivegna)
---
| Apr 8
---
| [](https://substack.com/@jfbentivegna)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=365201&post_id=160903092&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYwOTAzMDkyLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0NDE1NjA2OSwiZXhwIjoxNzQ2NzQ4MDY5LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzY1MjAxIiwic3ViIjoicmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.P_2tVRSY7OUWqLn4SpAWE6WEtJTav8LuyP_9Yz95czQ&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=365201&post_id=160903092&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYwOTAzMDkyLCJpYXQiOjE3NDQxNTYwNjksImV4cCI6MTc0Njc0ODA2OSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM2NTIwMSIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.pvnptsSI5QCo3acznnLX6mx01i8bt2x02ZVpaJhWeRQ&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=365201&post_id=160903092&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYwOTAzMDkyLCJpYXQiOjE3NDQxNTYwNjksImV4cCI6MTc0Njc0ODA2OSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM2NTIwMSIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.pvnptsSI5QCo3acznnLX6mx01i8bt2x02ZVpaJhWeRQ)
---
| | [](https://substack..fr4GKi0SXuHQo0iYn3K_3LcJoGDiFcCnZ5KHZEthWA0?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/jfbentivegna/p/trump-should-hold-the-line-on-his?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

April 8, 2025
President Trump has sent the financial markets into wild gyrations by fulfilling a campaign promise to impose tariffs with the goal of returning high paying manufacturing jobs to America's shores.
Thus far, he has been refused to back down, even thumbing his nose at his detractors by playing golf the same day the Dow tanked over 2,000 points.
He recently tweeted:
"The United States has a chance to do something that should have been done DECADES AGO. Don't be Weak! Don't be Stupid! Don't be a PANICAN (A new party based on Weak and Stupid people!). Be Strong, Courageous, and Patient, and GREATNESS will be the result!
America's corporate overclass is aghast. The Wall Street Journal pummels Trump daily. National Review moans. Trump-hating liberals on CNN and MSNBC have rediscovered the wonders of corporate greed and obsess about their IRAs.
Comedian Stephen Colbert went on an expletive-filled rant blaming Trump for the tanking stock market. His $75,000,000 portfolio is now only worth $68,000,000. Such suffering.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/bae5db65-b799-42cd-8da7-05d7b3c9543e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
But have any of these well-heeled complainers ever spent time in rural America? Did any of them grow up there? Do they have any friends or family from there?
When I grew up in rural western Pennsylvania in the sixties and seventies, we had manufacturing jobs, mining jobs and stable families. Yes, much of it was rough work, but it paid well. A man could support a family on one income.
Then the corporate Democrats and Republicans came up with NAFTA (The North American Free Trade Agreement) which President Clinton signed in 1994. President George W. Bush rubber stamped allowing China into the WTO (World Trade Association) in 2001.
And the race to the bottom began. Middle America lost [at least one million manufacturing jobs](https://substack.com/redirect/836f4f93-8350-420c-b9ce-f49c2bd1746a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and 80,000 plants closed. Meanwhile the Dow rose [from 8,000 in 1994 to 45,000 in 2025](https://substack.com/redirect/a4c20842-33ed-46b2-934a-1b1dc74dff24?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), a 565% increase.
The outsourcing of manufacturing jobs to cheap labor in Mexico and slave labor in China resulted in a massive wealth transfer from working class Americans to the financial class, many who became multimillionaires through speculation and finance. And the white upper middle class got in on the action, watching their portfolios skyrocket along with the housing values in their neighborhoods.
Meanwhile, rural America disintegrated. When I return to visit western Pennsylvania, the local newspapers are replete with stories of fentanyl deaths, early heart attacks, car accidents due to alcohol abuse and domestic violence.
Both political parties were in on the scam until Donald Trump came along in 2015. Furthermore, Trump had been saying for decades, as can be seen in the below interview with Oprah in the 1980s.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/3366cb04-31ad-4d9c-b3bf-626efcb7f492?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
But the trillion-dollar question is "Will tariffs help?" There are multiple cogent articles on both sides of the issue. Those who oppose tariffs state this is a huge tax on the middle class, as cars, food, clothing etc. will increase in price. But the real fear is that tariffs could cause a global recession, as the interconnected economies collectively tank. Many economists blame the Smoot-Hawley Act - which instituted tariffs - as the cause of the Great Depression in the 1930s.
Trump is gambling his presidency and the future of the Republican Party. Should the economy tank and 401K's loose half of their value, it won't matter how many ads the Republicans run against transgender athletes: Hello Bernie Sanders.
Furthermore, Trump needs to convince businesses that these tariffs are permanent. Manufacturing companies must invest huge amounts of capital in equipment and wages for years until a profit is realized. And there is always the possibility that some power-hungry liberal judge will rule Trump does not have the power to institute tariffs, creating more uncertainty.
But our corporate financial overclass and their newly discovered allies, Trump-hating white liberals, have nothing but contempt for the plight on rural Americans. This was personified by [President Obama's famous sneering comment](https://substack.com/redirect/3228550e-de7b-4457-af16-f19567ce1662?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
"_You go into these small towns in Pennsylvania and, like a lot of small towns in the Midwest, the jobs have been gone now for 25 years and nothing's replaced them ..._
_And it's not surprising then they get bitter,**they cling to guns or religion** [my emphasis] or antipathy toward people who aren't like them or anti-immigrant sentiment or anti-trade sentiment as a way to explain their frustrations."_
And during his presidency, President Obama continued to export American jobs while bailing out the Wall Street Welfare state.
Which is why President Obama's legacy can be described in two words: Donald Trump.
America would be a much happier place if the Dow were at 30,000 and working-class Americans had jobs that would enable them to support a family.
